    24Ôćĺ
    25Ôćĺconsole = Console()
    26Ôćĺ
    27Ôćĺ
    28Ôćĺasync def search_all_keywords(
    29Ôćĺ    keywords: tuple,
    30Ôćĺ    location: Optional[str] = None,
    31Ôćĺ    max_pages: int = 3,
    32Ôćĺ    experience: Optional[str] = None,
    33Ôćĺ    education: Optional[str] = None,
    34Ôćĺ    salary: Optional[str] = None,
    35Ôćĺ    browser: Optional[BrowserManager] = None,
    36Ôćĺ    start_page: int = 1,
    37Ôćĺ    seen_ids: Optional[Set[str]] = None,
    38Ôćĺ) -> List[CandidateBasic]:
    39Ôćĺ    """Search across multiple keywords with deduplication."""
    40Ôćĺ    if browser is None:
    41Ôćĺ        browser = get_browser_manager()
    42Ôćĺ
    43Ôćĺ    keyword_list = list(keywords)
    44Ôćĺ
    45Ôćĺ    emit_progress("search_start", keywords=keyword_list, max_pages=max_pages)
    46Ôćĺ
    47Ôćĺ    all_candidates = await search_candidates(
    48Ôćĺ        keywords=keyword_list,
    49Ôćĺ        location=location,
    50Ôćĺ        max_pages=max_pages,
    51Ôćĺ        experience=experience,
    52Ôćĺ        education=education,
    53Ôćĺ        salary=salary,
    54Ôćĺ        browser=browser,
    55Ôćĺ        start_page=start_page,
    56Ôćĺ    )
    57Ôćĺ
    58Ôćĺ    # Filter out already-seen candidates
    59Ôćĺ    if seen_ids:
    60Ôćĺ        all_candidates = [c for c in all_candidates if c.boss_id not in seen_ids]
    61Ôćĺ
    62Ôćĺ    emit_progress("search_complete", total_candidates=len(all_candidates))
    63Ôćĺ
    64Ôćĺ    return all_candidates
    65Ôćĺ
    66Ôćĺ
    67Ôćĺdef _build_candidate_info_for_llm(candidate) -> Dict[str, Any]:
    68Ôćĺ    """Build candidate info dict for LLM scoring."""
    69Ôćĺ    if isinstance(candidate, dict):
    70Ôćĺ        return {
    71Ôćĺ            "name": candidate.get("name", ""),
    72Ôćĺ            "title": candidate.get("title", ""),
    73Ôćĺ            "company": candidate.get("company", ""),
    74Ôćĺ            "education_level": candidate.get("education_level", ""),
    75Ôćĺ            "work_years": candidate.get("work_years", ""),
    76Ôćĺ            "skills": candidate.get("skills", []),
    77Ôćĺ            "work_experience": candidate.get("work_experience", []),
    78Ôćĺ        }
    79Ôćĺ    return {
    80Ôćĺ        "name": getattr(candidate, "name", ""),
    81Ôćĺ        "title": getattr(candidate, "title", ""),
    82Ôćĺ        "company": getattr(candidate, "company", ""),
    83Ôćĺ        "education_level": getattr(candidate, "education_level", ""),
    84Ôćĺ        "work_years": getattr(candidate, "work_years", ""),
    85Ôćĺ        "skills": getattr(candidate, "skills", []) or [],
    86Ôćĺ        "work_experience": getattr(candidate, "work_experience", []) or [],
    87Ôćĺ    }
    88Ôćĺ
    89Ôćĺ
    90Ôćĺdef _get_boss_id(candidate) -> str:
    91Ôćĺ    """Extract boss_id from candidate (dict or object)."""
    92Ôćĺ    if isinstance(candidate, dict):
    93Ôćĺ        return candidate.get("boss_id", "")
    94Ôćĺ    return getattr(candidate, "boss_id", "")
    95Ôćĺ
    96Ôćĺ
    97Ôćĺasync def send_batch(
    98Ôćĺ    candidates: List[CandidateBasic],
    99Ôćĺ    template_name: str,
   100Ôćĺ    variables: Dict[str, str],
   101Ôćĺ    keywords: tuple,
   102Ôćĺ    interactive: bool = True,
   103Ôćĺ    skip_messaged: bool = True,
   104Ôćĺ    dry_run: bool = False,
   105Ôćĺ    browser: Optional[BrowserManager] = None,
   106Ôćĺ) -> Dict[str, int]:
   107Ôćĺ    """Score candidates and send batch messages."""
   108Ôćĺ    if not candidates:
   109Ôćĺ        console.print("[yellow]No candidates to message.[/yellow]")
   110Ôćĺ        return {'sent': 0, 'failed': 0, 'skipped': 0, 'cancelled': 0}
   111Ôćĺ
   112Ôćĺ    emit_progress("scoring_start", count=len(candidates))
   113Ôćĺ
   114Ôćĺ    # Sort by score (highest priority first)
   115Ôćĺ    sorted_candidates = sort_candidates_by_score(
   116Ôćĺ        candidates,
   117Ôćĺ        search_keywords=list(keywords),
   118Ôćĺ    )
   119Ôćĺ
   120Ôćĺ    # --- Optional LLM scoring ---
   121Ôćĺ    llm_results: Dict[str, Dict] = {}
   122Ôćĺ    llm_enabled = False
   123Ôćĺ    try:
   124Ôćĺ        config = get_config()
   125Ôćĺ        llm_enabled = config.get("scoring.llm.enabled", False)
   126Ôćĺ    except Exception:
   127Ôćĺ        pass
   128Ôćĺ
   129Ôćĺ    if llm_enabled:
   130Ôćĺ        try:
   131Ôćĺ            from src.utils.llm_scorer import (
   132Ôćĺ                check_ollama_available,
   133Ôćĺ                llm_score_candidates_batch,
   134Ôćĺ            )
   135Ôćĺ
   136Ôćĺ            endpoint = config.get("scoring.llm.endpoint", "http://127.0.0.1:11434")
   137Ôćĺ            model = config.get("scoring.llm.model", "qwen2.5:7b")
   138Ôćĺ            timeout = config.get("scoring.llm.timeout_seconds", 60)
   139Ôćĺ            jd_config = config.get("scoring.jd") or {}
   140Ôćĺ
   141Ôćĺ            if check_ollama_available(endpoint):
   142Ôćĺ                console.print("[cyan]LLM scoring enabled, evaluating candidates...[/cyan]")
   143Ôćĺ
   144Ôćĺ                # Build candidate info list
   145Ôćĺ                candidates_info = [
   146Ôćĺ                    _build_candidate_info_for_llm(c) for c in sorted_candidates
   147Ôćĺ                ]
   148Ôćĺ
   149Ôćĺ                results = llm_score_candidates_batch(
   150Ôćĺ                    candidates_info, jd_config, endpoint, model, timeout,
   151Ôćĺ                )
   152Ôćĺ
   153Ôćĺ                # Merge LLM scores
   154Ôćĺ                llm_weight = config.get("scoring.weights.llm_score", 5)
   155Ôćĺ                total_weights = sum(
   156Ôćĺ                    v for k, v in (config.get("scoring.weights") or {}).items()
   157Ôćĺ                )
   158Ôćĺ                if total_weights <= 0:
   159Ôćĺ                    total_weights = 100
   160Ôćĺ
   161Ôćĺ                for c, r in zip(sorted_candidates, results):
   162Ôćĺ                    bid = _get_boss_id(c)
   163Ôćĺ                    if r and r.get("score") is not None:
   164Ôćĺ                        llm_results[bid] = r
   165Ôćĺ                        # Blend LLM score into existing score
   166Ôćĺ                        current = getattr(c, '_score', 0) if not isinstance(c, dict) else c.get("_score", 0)
   167Ôćĺ                        llm_contribution = int(round(r["score"] / 100.0 * llm_weight / total_weights * 100))
   168Ôćĺ                        new_score = min(current + llm_contribution, 100)
   169Ôćĺ                        if isinstance(c, dict):
   170Ôćĺ                            c["_score"] = new_score
   171Ôćĺ                        else:
   172Ôćĺ                            c._score = new_score
   173Ôćĺ
   174Ôćĺ                # Re-sort after LLM score merge
   175Ôćĺ                sorted_candidates.sort(
   176Ôćĺ                    key=lambda x: (x.get("_score", 0) if isinstance(x, dict) else getattr(x, "_score", 0)),
   177Ôćĺ                    reverse=True,
   178Ôćĺ                )
   179Ôćĺ
   180Ôćĺ                console.print(f"[green]LLM scoring complete: {len(llm_results)}/{len(sorted_candidates)} evaluated[/green]")
   181Ôćĺ            else:
   182Ôćĺ                console.print("[yellow]Ollama not available, skipping LLM scoring[/yellow]")
   183Ôćĺ        except Exception as e:
   184Ôćĺ            logger.warning(f"LLM scoring integration error: {e}")
   185Ôćĺ            console.print(f"[yellow]LLM scoring skipped: {e}[/yellow]")
   186Ôćĺ
   187Ôćĺ    emit_progress(
   188Ôćĺ        "scoring_complete",
   189Ôćĺ        top_score=getattr(sorted_candidates[0], '_score', 0) if sorted_candidates else 0,
   190Ôćĺ    )
   191Ôćĺ
   192Ôćĺ    # Display scored candidates
   193Ôćĺ    has_llm = bool(llm_results)
   194Ôćĺ    table = Table(title=f"Candidates Ranked by Score ({len(sorted_candidates)} total)")
   195Ôćĺ    table.add_column("Score", style="bold", width=6)
   196Ôćĺ    table.add_column("Name")
   197Ôćĺ    table.add_column("Title")
   198Ôćĺ    table.add_column("Company")
   199Ôćĺ    if has_llm:
   200Ôćĺ        table.add_column("LLM", width=40)
   201Ôćĺ    table.add_column("Boss ID", style="dim")
   202Ôćĺ
   203Ôćĺ    for c in sorted_candidates[:20]:
   204Ôćĺ        score = getattr(c, '_score', 0)
   205Ôćĺ        bid = _get_boss_id(c)
   206Ôćĺ        row = [
   207Ôćĺ            str(score),
   208Ôćĺ            c.name,
   209Ôćĺ            c.title[:30] if c.title else "",
   210Ôćĺ            c.company[:20] if c.company else "",
   211Ôćĺ        ]
   212Ôćĺ        if has_llm:
   213Ôćĺ            llm_info = llm_results.get(bid)
   214Ôćĺ            if llm_info:
   215Ôćĺ                row.append(f"[{llm_info['score']}] {llm_info.get('explanation', '')[:30]}")
   216Ôćĺ            else:
   217Ôćĺ                row.append("-")
   218Ôćĺ        row.append(bid[:20])
   219Ôćĺ        table.add_row(*row)
   220Ôćĺ
   221Ôćĺ    console.print(table)
   222Ôćĺ    if len(sorted_candidates) > 20:
   223Ôćĺ        console.print(f"[dim]...and {len(sorted_candidates) - 20} more[/dim]")
   224Ôćĺ
   225Ôćĺ    emit_progress("send_start", total=len(sorted_candidates))
   226Ôćĺ
   227Ôćĺ    # Send messages
   228Ôćĺ    stats = await send_message_batch(
   229Ôćĺ        candidates=sorted_candidates,
   230Ôćĺ        template_name=template_name,
   231Ôćĺ        variables=variables,
   232Ôćĺ        interactive=interactive,
   233Ôćĺ        skip_messaged=skip_messaged,
   234Ôćĺ        dry_run=dry_run,
   235Ôćĺ        browser=browser,
   236Ôćĺ    )
   237Ôćĺ
   238Ôćĺ    emit_progress("send_complete", **stats)
   239Ôćĺ
   240Ôćĺ    return stats
   241Ôćĺ
   242Ôćĺ
   243Ôćĺasync def run_pipeline(
   244Ôćĺ    keywords: tuple,
   245Ôćĺ    template_name: str,
   246Ôćĺ    variables: Dict[str, str],
   247Ôćĺ    location: Optional[str] = None,
   248Ôćĺ    max_pages: int = 3,
   249Ôćĺ    batch_pages: int = 0,
   250Ôćĺ    experience: Optional[str] = None,
   251Ôćĺ    education: Optional[str] = None,
   252Ôćĺ    salary: Optional[str] = None,
   253Ôćĺ    interactive: bool = True,
   254Ôćĺ    skip_messaged: bool = True,
   255Ôćĺ    dry_run: bool = False,
   256Ôćĺ    resume: bool = False,
   257Ôćĺ    browser: Optional[BrowserManager] = None,
   258Ôćĺ) -> Dict[str, Any]:
   259Ôćĺ    """Run the full pipeline: search Ôćĺ score Ôćĺ batch send."""
   260Ôćĺ    if browser is None:
   261Ôćĺ        browser = get_browser_manager()
   262Ôćĺ
   263Ôćĺ    reset_session()
   264Ôćĺ    reset_scoring_cache()
   265Ôćĺ
   266Ôćĺ    # Handle resume
   267Ôćĺ    checkpoint = None
   268Ôćĺ    start_page = 1
   269Ôćĺ    sent_ids: List[str] = []
   270Ôćĺ    seen_ids: Set[str] = set()
   271Ôćĺ
   272Ôćĺ    if resume:
   273Ôćĺ        checkpoint = CheckpointManager.load_latest()
   274Ôćĺ        if checkpoint:
   275Ôćĺ            # Validate that checkpoint parameters match current run
   276Ôćĺ            cp_params = checkpoint.params
   277Ôćĺ            cp_keywords = tuple(cp_params.get('keywords', []))
   278Ôćĺ            cp_template = cp_params.get('template', '')
   279Ôćĺ            if cp_keywords != keywords or cp_template != template_name:
   280Ôćĺ                console.print(Panel(
   281Ôćĺ                    f"[yellow]Checkpoint mismatch:[/yellow]\n"
   282Ôćĺ                    f"  Checkpoint: keywords={cp_keywords}, template={cp_template}\n"
   283Ôćĺ                    f"  Current:    keywords={keywords}, template={template_name}\n"
   284Ôćĺ                    f"[bold]Starting fresh instead of resuming.[/bold]",
   285Ôćĺ                    title="Checkpoint Mismatch",
   286Ôćĺ                    border_style="red"
   287Ôćĺ                ))
   288Ôćĺ                checkpoint = None
   289Ôćĺ            else:
   290Ôćĺ                console.print(Panel(
   291Ôćĺ                    checkpoint.summary,
   292Ôćĺ                    title="Resuming Pipeline",
   293Ôćĺ                    border_style="yellow"
   294Ôćĺ                ))
   295Ôćĺ                start_page = checkpoint.completed_pages + 1
   296Ôćĺ                sent_ids = checkpoint.sent_ids
   297Ôćĺ                seen_ids = checkpoint.seen_ids
   298Ôćĺ        else:
   299Ôćĺ            console.print("[yellow]No checkpoint found, starting fresh.[/yellow]")
   300Ôćĺ
   301Ôćĺ    if checkpoint is None:
   302Ôćĺ        checkpoint = CheckpointManager()
   303Ôćĺ
   304Ôćĺ    # Pipeline header
   305Ôćĺ    console.print(Panel(
   306Ôćĺ        f"[bold]Keywords:[/bold] {', '.join(keywords)}\n"
   307Ôćĺ        f"[bold]Template:[/bold] {template_name}\n"
   308Ôćĺ        f"[bold]Pages:[/bold] {max_pages}\n"
   309Ôćĺ        f"[bold]Location:[/bold] {location or 'Any'}\n"
   310Ôćĺ        f"[bold]Experience:[/bold] {experience or 'Any'}\n"
   311Ôćĺ        f"[bold]Education:[/bold] {education or 'Any'}\n"
   312Ôćĺ        f"[bold]Salary:[/bold] {salary or 'Any'}\n"
   313Ôćĺ        f"[bold]Dry Run:[/bold] {'Yes' if dry_run else 'No'}",
   314Ôćĺ        title="BossšŤ┤Ŕüś Pipeline",
   315Ôćĺ        border_style="cyan"
   316Ôćĺ    ))
   317Ôćĺ
   318Ôćĺ    total_stats = {'sent': 0, 'failed': 0, 'skipped': 0, 'cancelled': 0}
   319Ôćĺ    all_candidates: List[CandidateBasic] = []
   320Ôćĺ
   321Ôćĺ    if batch_pages > 0:
   322Ôćĺ        # Batch mode: search N pages, then send, repeat
   323Ôćĺ        for page_start in range(start_page, max_pages + 1, batch_pages):
   324Ôćĺ            page_end = min(page_start + batch_pages - 1, max_pages)
   325Ôćĺ            pages_this_batch = page_end - page_start + 1
   326Ôćĺ
   327Ôćĺ            console.print(f"\n[cyan]--- Batch: pages {page_start}-{page_end} ---[/cyan]")
   328Ôćĺ
   329Ôćĺ            # Search
   330Ôćĺ            batch_candidates = await search_all_keywords(
   331Ôćĺ                keywords=keywords,
   332Ôćĺ                location=location,
   333Ôćĺ                max_pages=pages_this_batch,
   334Ôćĺ                experience=experience,
   335Ôćĺ                education=education,
   336Ôćĺ                salary=salary,
   337Ôćĺ                browser=browser,
   338Ôćĺ                start_page=page_start,
   339Ôćĺ                seen_ids=seen_ids,
   340Ôćĺ            )
   341Ôćĺ
   342Ôćĺ            if not batch_candidates:
   343Ôćĺ                console.print("[yellow]No new candidates in this batch.[/yellow]")
   344Ôćĺ                continue
   345Ôćĺ
   346Ôćĺ            # Track seen IDs
   347Ôćĺ            for c in batch_candidates:
   348Ôćĺ                seen_ids.add(c.boss_id)
   349Ôćĺ
   350Ôćĺ            all_candidates.extend(batch_candidates)
   351Ôćĺ
   352Ôćĺ            # Send batch
   353Ôćĺ            batch_stats = await send_batch(
   354Ôćĺ                candidates=batch_candidates,
   355Ôćĺ                template_name=template_name,
   356Ôćĺ                variables=variables,
   357Ôćĺ                keywords=keywords,
   358Ôćĺ                interactive=interactive,
   359Ôćĺ                skip_messaged=skip_messaged,
   360Ôćĺ                dry_run=dry_run,
   361Ôćĺ                browser=browser,
   362Ôćĺ            )
   363Ôćĺ
   364Ôćĺ            # Update totals
   365Ôćĺ            for key in total_stats:
   366Ôćĺ                total_stats[key] += batch_stats.get(key, 0)
   367Ôćĺ
   368Ôćĺ            # Track processed candidate IDs for checkpoint
   369Ôćĺ            sent_id_set = set(sent_ids)
   370Ôćĺ            for c in batch_candidates:
   371Ôćĺ                if c.boss_id not in sent_id_set:
   372Ôćĺ                    sent_ids.append(c.boss_id)
   373Ôćĺ                    sent_id_set.add(c.boss_id)
   374Ôćĺ
   375Ôćĺ            # Save checkpoint
   376Ôćĺ            checkpoint.save(
   377Ôćĺ                keywords=keywords,
   378Ôćĺ                template=template_name,
   379Ôćĺ                variables=variables,
   380Ôćĺ                company=(),
   381Ôćĺ                location=location,
   382Ôćĺ                max_pages=max_pages,
   383Ôćĺ                batch_pages=batch_pages,
   384Ôćĺ                skip_messaged=skip_messaged,
   385Ôćĺ                interactive=interactive,
   386Ôćĺ                completed_pages=page_end,
   387Ôćĺ                sent_ids=sent_ids,
   388Ôćĺ                seen_ids=list(seen_ids),
   389Ôćĺ                dry_run=dry_run,
   390Ôćĺ            )
   391Ôćĺ    else:
   392Ôćĺ        # Non-batch mode: search all pages, then send all
   393Ôćĺ        all_candidates = await search_all_keywords(
   394Ôćĺ            keywords=keywords,
   395Ôćĺ            location=location,
   396Ôćĺ            max_pages=max_pages,
   397Ôćĺ            experience=experience,
   398Ôćĺ            education=education,
   399Ôćĺ            salary=salary,
   400Ôćĺ            browser=browser,
   401Ôćĺ            start_page=start_page,
   402Ôćĺ            seen_ids=seen_ids,
   403Ôćĺ        )
   404Ôćĺ
   405Ôćĺ        if all_candidates:
   406Ôćĺ            for c in all_candidates:
   407Ôćĺ                seen_ids.add(c.boss_id)
   408Ôćĺ
   409Ôćĺ            total_stats = await send_batch(
   410Ôćĺ                candidates=all_candidates,
   411Ôćĺ                template_name=template_name,
   412Ôćĺ                variables=variables,
   413Ôćĺ                keywords=keywords,
   414Ôćĺ                interactive=interactive,
   415Ôćĺ                skip_messaged=skip_messaged,
   416Ôćĺ                dry_run=dry_run,
   417Ôćĺ                browser=browser,
   418Ôćĺ            )
   419Ôćĺ
   420Ôćĺ    # Final report
   421Ôćĺ    console.print(Panel(
   422Ôćĺ        f"[bold]Candidates found:[/bold] {len(all_candidates)}\n"
   423Ôćĺ        f"[green]Messages sent:[/green] {total_stats['sent']}\n"
   424Ôćĺ        f"[red]Failed:[/red] {total_stats['failed']}\n"
   425Ôćĺ        f"[yellow]Skipped:[/yellow] {total_stats['skipped']}\n"
   426Ôćĺ        f"[dim]Cancelled:[/dim] {total_stats['cancelled']}",
   427Ôćĺ        title="Pipeline Complete",
   428Ôćĺ        border_style="green"
   429Ôćĺ    ))
   430Ôćĺ
   431Ôćĺ    # Clean up checkpoint on successful completion
   432Ôćĺ    if checkpoint:
   433Ôćĺ        checkpoint.delete()
   434Ôćĺ
   435Ôćĺ    result = {
   436Ôćĺ        'candidates_found': len(all_candidates),
   437Ôćĺ        **total_stats,
   438Ôćĺ    }
   439Ôćĺ
   440Ôćĺ    emit_progress("pipeline_complete", **result)
   441Ôćĺ
   442Ôćĺ    return result
   443Ôćĺ

1Ôćĺ"""Anti-detection module for browser automation.
     2Ôćĺ
     3ÔćĺImplements human-like interaction via Emunium + Patchright:
     4Ôćĺ- Human-like scrolling behavior (chunked, variable speed)
     5Ôćĺ- Human-like clicking via Emunium (natural mouse movement)
     6Ôćĺ- Human-like typing via Emunium (variable keystroke timing)
     7Ôćĺ
     8ÔćĺNote: Webdriver property hiding and navigator masking are handled
     9Ôćĺby Patchright automatically in CDP mode.
    10Ôćĺ"""
    11Ôćĺ
    12Ôćĺimport random
    13Ôćĺfrom typing import Optional
    14Ôćĺ
    15Ôćĺfrom patchright.async_api import Page
    16Ôćĺfrom emunium import EmuniumPlaywright
    17Ôćĺ
    18Ôćĺfrom src.exceptions.errors import SelectorNotFoundError
    19Ôćĺ
    20Ôćĺ
    21Ôćĺasync def human_scroll(page: Page, direction: str = 'down', distance: Optional[int] = None) -> None:
    22Ôćĺ    """
    23Ôćĺ    Perform human-like scrolling with variable speed.
    24Ôćĺ
    25Ôćĺ    Args:
    26Ôćĺ        page: Playwright page instance
    27Ôćĺ        direction: 'up' or 'down'
    28Ôćĺ        distance: Scroll distance in pixels (random if None)
    29Ôćĺ    """
    30Ôćĺ    if direction not in ('up', 'down'):
    31Ôćĺ        raise ValueError(f"Invalid scroll direction: {direction!r}, expected 'up' or 'down'")
    32Ôćĺ
    33Ôćĺ    if distance is None:
    34Ôćĺ        distance = random.randint(200, 600)
    35Ôćĺ
    36Ôćĺ    if direction == 'up':
    37Ôćĺ        distance = -distance
    38Ôćĺ
    39Ôćĺ    # Break scroll into smaller chunks
    40Ôćĺ    chunks = random.randint(3, 8)
    41Ôćĺ    chunk_size = distance // chunks
    42Ôćĺ
    43Ôćĺ    for i in range(chunks):
    44Ôćĺ        actual_chunk = chunk_size + random.randint(-20, 20)
    45Ôćĺ        await page.mouse.wheel(0, actual_chunk)
    46Ôćĺ        delay = random.uniform(0.05, 0.15)
    47Ôćĺ        await page.wait_for_timeout(delay * 1000)
    48Ôćĺ
    49Ôćĺ    await page.wait_for_timeout(random.uniform(0.2, 0.5) * 1000)
    50Ôćĺ
    51Ôćĺ
    52Ôćĺasync def human_click(page: Page, selector: str) -> None:
    53Ôćĺ    """
    54Ôćĺ    Click an element with human-like behavior using Emunium.
    55Ôćĺ
    56Ôćĺ    Args:
    57Ôćĺ        page: Playwright page instance
    58Ôćĺ        selector: CSS selector for element to click
    59Ôćĺ    """
    60Ôćĺ    try:
    61Ôćĺ        element = await page.wait_for_selector(selector, timeout=10000)
    62Ôćĺ    except Exception as e:
    63Ôćĺ        if "timeout" in str(type(e).__name__).lower() or "timeout" in str(e).lower():
    64Ôćĺ            raise SelectorNotFoundError(f"Element not found: {selector}")
    65Ôćĺ        raise
    66Ôćĺ
    67Ôćĺ    if element is None:
    68Ôćĺ        raise SelectorNotFoundError(f"Element resolved to None: {selector}")
    69Ôćĺ
    70Ôćĺ    emunium = EmuniumPlaywright(page)
    71Ôćĺ    await emunium.click_at(element)
    72Ôćĺ
    73Ôćĺ
    74Ôćĺasync def human_type(page: Page, selector: str, text: str) -> None:
    75Ôćĺ    """
    76Ôćĺ    Type text with human-like timing using Emunium.
    77Ôćĺ
    78Ôćĺ    Args:
    79Ôćĺ        page: Playwright page instance
    80Ôćĺ        selector: CSS selector for input element
    81Ôćĺ        text: Text to type
    82Ôćĺ    """
    83Ôćĺ    try:
    84Ôćĺ        element = await page.wait_for_selector(selector, timeout=10000)
    85Ôćĺ    except Exception as e:
    86Ôćĺ        if "timeout" in str(type(e).__name__).lower() or "timeout" in str(e).lower():
    87Ôćĺ            raise SelectorNotFoundError(f"Element not found: {selector}")
    88Ôćĺ        raise
    89Ôćĺ
    90Ôćĺ    if element is None:
    91Ôćĺ        raise SelectorNotFoundError(f"Element resolved to None: {selector}")
    92Ôćĺ
    93Ôćĺ    emunium = EmuniumPlaywright(page)
    94Ôćĺ    await emunium.type_at(element, text)
    95Ôćĺ

1Ôćĺ"""Lightweight database migration system."""
     2Ôćĺ
     3Ôćĺfrom typing import Callable, List, Tuple
     4Ôćĺ
     5Ôćĺfrom sqlalchemy import text, inspect
     6Ôćĺfrom loguru import logger
     7Ôćĺ
     8Ôćĺ_migrations: List[Tuple[int, str, Callable]] = []
     9Ôćĺ
    10Ôćĺ
    11Ôćĺdef migration(version: int, description: str):
    12Ôćĺ    """Decorator to register a migration function."""
    13Ôćĺ    def decorator(fn: Callable):
    14Ôćĺ        _migrations.append((version, description, fn))
    15Ôćĺ        return fn
    16Ôćĺ    return decorator
    17Ôćĺ
    18Ôćĺ
    19Ôćĺ@migration(1, "Initial schema ÔÇö create core tables if missing")
    20Ôćĺdef _m001_initial_schema(conn):
    21Ôćĺ    """Ensure core tables exist."""
    22Ôćĺ    pass
    23Ôćĺ
    24Ôćĺ
    25Ôćĺ@migration(2, "Add retry_count column to messages table")
    26Ôćĺdef _m002_messages_retry_count(conn):
    27Ôćĺ    inspector = inspect(conn)
    28Ôćĺ    columns = [c["name"] for c in inspector.get_columns("messages")]
    29Ôćĺ    if "retry_count" not in columns:
    30Ôćĺ        conn.execute(text("ALTER TABLE messages ADD COLUMN retry_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0"))
    31Ôćĺ
    32Ôćĺ
    33Ôćĺdef _ensure_version_table(conn) -> None:
    34Ôćĺ    conn.execute(text("""
    35Ôćĺ        CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS schema_version (
    36Ôćĺ            version INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    37Ôćĺ            description TEXT NOT NULL,
    38Ôćĺ            applied_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
    39Ôćĺ        )
    40Ôćĺ    """))
    41Ôćĺ    conn.commit()
    42Ôćĺ
    43Ôćĺ
    44Ôćĺdef _current_version(conn) -> int:
    45Ôćĺ    result = conn.execute(text("SELECT MAX(version) FROM schema_version"))
    46Ôćĺ    row = result.fetchone()
    47Ôćĺ    return row[0] or 0 if row else 0
    48Ôćĺ
    49Ôćĺ
    50Ôćĺdef run_migrations(engine) -> None:
    51Ôćĺ    """Apply all pending migrations."""
    52Ôćĺ    with engine.connect() as conn:
    53Ôćĺ        _ensure_version_table(conn)
    54Ôćĺ        current = _current_version(conn)
    55Ôćĺ
    56Ôćĺ        pending = [(v, d, fn) for v, d, fn in _migrations if v > current]
    57Ôćĺ        if not pending:
    58Ôćĺ            logger.debug(f"Database schema is up-to-date (version {current})")
    59Ôćĺ            return
    60Ôćĺ
    61Ôćĺ        for version, description, fn in sorted(pending):
    62Ôćĺ            logger.info(f"Applying migration v{version}: {description}")
    63Ôćĺ            fn(conn)
    64Ôćĺ            conn.execute(
    65Ôćĺ                text("INSERT INTO schema_version (version, description) VALUES (:v, :d)"),
    66Ôćĺ                {"v": version, "d": description},
    67Ôćĺ            )
    68Ôćĺ            conn.commit()
    69Ôćĺ
    70Ôćĺ        final = _current_version(conn)
    71Ôćĺ        logger.info(f"Migrations complete ÔÇö schema version {final}")
    72Ôćĺ

1Ôćĺ"""Custom exceptions for Boss Assistant."""
     2Ôćĺ
     3Ôćĺ
     4Ôćĺclass BossAssistantError(Exception):
     5Ôćĺ    """Base exception for all Boss Assistant errors."""
     6Ôćĺ    pass
     7Ôćĺ
     8Ôćĺ
     9Ôćĺclass BrowserError(BossAssistantError):
    10Ôćĺ    """Raised when browser automation fails."""
    11Ôćĺ    pass
    12Ôćĺ
    13Ôćĺ
    14Ôćĺclass SessionExpiredError(BossAssistantError):
    15Ôćĺ    """Raised when BossšŤ┤Ŕüś session has expired."""
    16Ôćĺ    pass
    17Ôćĺ
    18Ôćĺ
    19Ôćĺclass RateLimitExceededError(BossAssistantError):
    20Ôćĺ    """Raised when rate limit is exceeded."""
    21Ôćĺ
    22Ôćĺ    def __init__(self, action_type: str, wait_time: int, message: str = None):
    23Ôćĺ        self.action_type = action_type
    24Ôćĺ        self.wait_time = wait_time
    25Ôćĺ        if message is None:
    26Ôćĺ            message = f"Rate limit exceeded for {action_type}. Wait {wait_time} seconds."
    27Ôćĺ        super().__init__(message)
    28Ôćĺ
    29Ôćĺ
    30Ôćĺclass SelectorNotFoundError(BossAssistantError):
    31Ôćĺ    """Raised when page selector is not found."""
    32Ôćĺ    pass
    33Ôćĺ
    34Ôćĺ
    35Ôćĺclass ExtractionError(BossAssistantError):
    36Ôćĺ    """Raised when data extraction fails."""
    37Ôćĺ    pass
    38Ôćĺ
    39Ôćĺ
    40Ôćĺclass ConfigurationError(BossAssistantError):
    41Ôćĺ    """Raised when configuration is invalid."""
    42Ôćĺ    pass
    43Ôćĺ
    44Ôćĺ
    45Ôćĺclass ValidationError(BossAssistantError):
    46Ôćĺ    """Raised when input validation fails."""
    47Ôćĺ    pass
    48Ôćĺ
    49Ôćĺ
    50Ôćĺclass PermanentFailureError(BossAssistantError):
    51Ôćĺ    """Raised when a send failure is deterministic and should not be retried.
    52Ôćĺ
    53Ôćĺ    Examples: no profile URL, quota exhausted, candidate already messaged.
    54Ôćĺ    """
    55Ôćĺ    pass
    56Ôćĺ

1Ôćĺ"""Profile extraction module for BossšŤ┤Ŕüś.
     2Ôćĺ
     3ÔćĺExtracts detailed candidate profile information from BossšŤ┤Ŕüś.
     4ÔćĺProfile details are shown as a floating overlay (ŠÁ«ň▒é) on the search page,
     5Ôćĺnot as a separate page. The extraction JS also supports standalone profile
     6Ôćĺpages as a fallback.
     7Ôćĺ"""
     8Ôćĺ
     9Ôćĺfrom typing import Optional, Dict, Any
    10Ôćĺ
    11Ôćĺfrom loguru import logger
    12Ôćĺfrom rich.console import Console
    13Ôćĺfrom rich.panel import Panel
    14Ôćĺ
    15Ôćĺfrom src.core.browser import BrowserManager, get_browser_manager
    16Ôćĺfrom src.utils.delays import async_random_delay
    17Ôćĺfrom src.utils.rate_limiter import get_rate_limiter, async_check_rate_limit
    18Ôćĺfrom src.utils.captcha import check_captcha
    19Ôćĺfrom src.utils.retry import retry_navigation
    20Ôćĺfrom src.models.database import Candidate, get_db_manager
    21Ôćĺfrom src.exceptions.errors import ExtractionError
    22Ôćĺ
    23Ôćĺconsole = Console()
    24Ôćĺ
    25Ôćĺ
    26Ôćĺ# JavaScript extraction function for BossšŤ┤Ŕüś profile pages
    27ÔćĺEXTRACT_PROFILE_JS = """
    28Ôćĺ() => {
    29Ôćĺ    const result = {
    30Ôćĺ        name: '',
    31Ôćĺ        title: '',
    32Ôćĺ        company: '',
    33Ôćĺ        location: '',
    34Ôćĺ        salary_expect: '',
    35Ôćĺ        work_years: '',
    36Ôćĺ        education_level: '',
    37Ôćĺ        basic_info: {},
    38Ôćĺ        education: [],
    39Ôćĺ        work_experience: [],
    40Ôćĺ        skills: []
    41Ôćĺ    };
    42Ôćĺ
    43Ôćĺ    // Extract basic info from the profile header area
    44Ôćĺ    const nameEl = document.querySelector(
    45Ôćĺ        '[class*="geek-name"], [class*="name"], h1[class*="name"], .name'
    46Ôćĺ    );
    47Ôćĺ    result.name = nameEl ? nameEl.innerText.trim() : '';
    48Ôćĺ
    49Ôćĺ    const titleEl = document.querySelector(
    50Ôćĺ        '[class*="expect-position"], [class*="title"], [class*="position"]'
    51Ôćĺ    );
    52Ôćĺ    result.title = titleEl ? titleEl.innerText.trim() : '';
    53Ôćĺ
    54Ôćĺ    const companyEl = document.querySelector(
    55Ôćĺ        '[class*="company-name"], [class*="company"]'
    56Ôćĺ    );
    57Ôćĺ    result.company = companyEl ? companyEl.innerText.trim() : '';
    58Ôćĺ
    59Ôćĺ    const locationEl = document.querySelector(
    60Ôćĺ        '[class*="expect-area"], [class*="location"], [class*="city"]'
    61Ôćĺ    );
    62Ôćĺ    result.location = locationEl ? locationEl.innerText.trim() : '';
    63Ôćĺ
    64Ôćĺ    const salaryEl = document.querySelector(
    65Ôćĺ        '[class*="expect-salary"], [class*="salary"]'
    66Ôćĺ    );
    67Ôćĺ    result.salary_expect = salaryEl ? salaryEl.innerText.trim() : '';
    68Ôćĺ
    69Ôćĺ    // Extract info tags (work years, education, age, etc.)
    70Ôćĺ    const tagEls = document.querySelectorAll(
    71Ôćĺ        '[class*="info-tag"], [class*="base-info"] span, [class*="geek-tags"] span, ' +
    72Ôćĺ        '[class*="tag-item"], [class*="basic-info"] span'
    73Ôćĺ    );
    74Ôćĺ    const tags = Array.from(tagEls).map(el => el.innerText.trim()).filter(t => t);
    75Ôćĺ
    76Ôćĺ    for (const tag of tags) {
    77Ôćĺ        if (tag.includes('ň╣┤') && (tag.includes('š╗ĆÚ¬î') || /^\\d/.test(tag))) {
    78Ôćĺ            result.work_years = tag;
    79Ôćĺ            result.basic_info.work_years = tag;
    80Ôćĺ        } else if (['ňŹÜňúź', 'šíĽňúź', 'ŠťČšžĹ', 'ňĄžńŞô', 'ńŞşńŞô', 'ÚźśńŞş'].some(d => tag.includes(d))) {
    81Ôćĺ            result.education_level = tag;
    82Ôćĺ            result.basic_info.education = tag;
    83Ôćĺ        } else if (tag.includes('ň▓ü')) {
    84Ôćĺ            result.basic_info.age = tag;
    85Ôćĺ        } else if (tag.includes('Š▒éŔüî') || tag.includes('šŐÂŠÇü')) {
    86Ôćĺ            result.basic_info.job_status = tag;
    87Ôćĺ        }
    88Ôćĺ    }
    89Ôćĺ
    90Ôćĺ    // Extract education details
    91Ôćĺ    const eduSection = document.querySelector(
    92Ôćĺ        '[class*="resume-education"], [class*="education-list"], [class*="edu-experience"]'
    93Ôćĺ    );
    94Ôćĺ    if (eduSection) {
    95Ôćĺ        const eduItems = eduSection.querySelectorAll(
    96Ôćĺ            '[class*="resume-item"], [class*="edu-item"], [class*="item"], li'
    97Ôćĺ        );
    98Ôćĺ        for (const item of eduItems) {
    99Ôćĺ            const text = item.innerText.trim();
   100Ôćĺ            if (!text) continue;
   101Ôćĺ            const lines = text.split('\\n').filter(l => l.trim());
   102Ôćĺ            const edu = {};
   103Ôćĺ            if (lines.length >= 1) edu.school = lines[0].trim();
   104Ôćĺ            if (lines.length >= 2) edu.degree = lines[1].trim();
   105Ôćĺ            if (lines.length >= 3) edu.major = lines[2].trim();
   106Ôćĺ            if (lines.length >= 4) edu.period = lines[3].trim();
   107Ôćĺ            result.education.push(edu);
   108Ôćĺ        }
   109Ôćĺ    }
   110Ôćĺ
   111Ôćĺ    // Extract work experience
   112Ôćĺ    const workSection = document.querySelector(
   113Ôćĺ        '[class*="resume-work"], [class*="work-list"], [class*="work-experience"]'
   114Ôćĺ    );
   115Ôćĺ    if (workSection) {
   116Ôćĺ        const workItems = workSection.querySelectorAll(
   117Ôćĺ            '[class*="resume-item"], [class*="work-item"], [class*="item"], li'
   118Ôćĺ        );
   119Ôćĺ        for (const item of workItems) {
   120Ôćĺ            const text = item.innerText.trim();
   121Ôćĺ            if (!text) continue;
   122Ôćĺ            const lines = text.split('\\n').filter(l => l.trim());
   123Ôćĺ            const work = {};
   124Ôćĺ            if (lines.length >= 1) work.company = lines[0].trim();
   125Ôćĺ            if (lines.length >= 2) work.title = lines[1].trim();
   126Ôćĺ            if (lines.length >= 3) work.period = lines[2].trim();
   127Ôćĺ            if (lines.length >= 4) work.description = lines.slice(3).join(' ').trim();
   128Ôćĺ            result.work_experience.push(work);
   129Ôćĺ        }
   130Ôćĺ    }
   131Ôćĺ
   132Ôćĺ    // Extract project experience (BossšŤ┤Ŕüś specific)
   133Ôćĺ    const projectSection = document.querySelector(
   134Ôćĺ        '[class*="resume-project"], [class*="project-list"]'
   135Ôćĺ    );
   136Ôćĺ    if (projectSection) {
   137Ôćĺ        result.basic_info.has_project = true;
   138Ôćĺ    }
   139Ôćĺ
   140Ôćĺ    // Extract skills
   141Ôćĺ    const skillEls = document.querySelectorAll(
   142Ôćĺ        '[class*="skill-tag"], [class*="skill-item"], [class*="tag-item"], ' +
   143Ôćĺ        '[class*="skill"] span'
   144Ôćĺ    );
   145Ôćĺ    const skills = new Set();
   146Ôćĺ    for (const el of skillEls) {
   147Ôćĺ        const text = el.innerText.trim();
   148Ôćĺ        if (text && text.length < 30) {
   149Ôćĺ            skills.add(text);
   150Ôćĺ        }
   151Ôćĺ    }
   152Ôćĺ    result.skills = Array.from(skills);
   153Ôćĺ
   154Ôćĺ    // Extract advantages/self description
   155Ôćĺ    const advantageEl = document.querySelector(
   156Ôćĺ        '[class*="resume-advantage"], [class*="self-desc"], [class*="geek-advantage"]'
   157Ôćĺ    );
   158Ôćĺ    if (advantageEl) {
   159Ôćĺ        result.basic_info.self_description = advantageEl.innerText.trim();
   160Ôćĺ    }
   161Ôćĺ
   162Ôćĺ    return result;
   163Ôćĺ}
   164Ôćĺ"""
   165Ôćĺ
   166Ôćĺ
   167Ôćĺasync def extract_profile(
   168Ôćĺ    boss_id: str,
   169Ôćĺ    browser: Optional[BrowserManager] = None,
   170Ôćĺ) -> Dict[str, Any]:
   171Ôćĺ    """
   172Ôćĺ    Extract detailed profile for a candidate.
   173Ôćĺ
   174Ôćĺ    Args:
   175Ôćĺ        boss_id: BossšŤ┤Ŕüś candidate ID (e.g., "zp_xxx")
   176Ôćĺ        browser: Browser manager instance
   177Ôćĺ
   178Ôćĺ    Returns:
   179Ôćĺ        Dictionary with profile data
   180Ôćĺ
   181Ôćĺ    Raises:
   182Ôćĺ        ExtractionError: If profile extraction fails
   183Ôćĺ    """
   184Ôćĺ    if browser is None:
   185Ôćĺ        browser = get_browser_manager()
   186Ôćĺ
   187Ôćĺ    page = browser.page
   188Ôćĺ    if not page:
   189Ôćĺ        page = await browser.start()
   190Ôćĺ
   191Ôćĺ    rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()
   192Ôćĺ    db_manager = get_db_manager()
   193Ôćĺ
   194Ôćĺ    # Rate limit check
   195Ôćĺ    await async_check_rate_limit('view_profile')
   196Ôćĺ
   197Ôćĺ    # BossšŤ┤Ŕüś shows profile as a floating overlay (ŠÁ«ň▒é) on the search page.
   198Ôćĺ    # Strategy 1: Try to extract from an already-open overlay on the current page.
   199Ôćĺ    # Strategy 2: Navigate to profile URL as a fallback.
   200Ôćĺ    encrypt_id = boss_id.replace('zp_', '') if boss_id.startswith('zp_') else boss_id
   201Ôćĺ
   202Ôćĺ    # First check if we have a profile URL in the database
   203Ôćĺ    profile_url = None
   204Ôćĺ    with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   205Ôćĺ        candidate = session.query(Candidate).filter_by(boss_id=boss_id).first()
   206Ôćĺ        if candidate and candidate.profile_url:
   207Ôćĺ            profile_url = candidate.profile_url
   208Ôćĺ
   209Ôćĺ    if not profile_url:
   210Ôćĺ        profile_url = f"https://www.zhipin.com/web/geek/{encrypt_id}"
   211Ôćĺ
   212Ôćĺ    try:
   213Ôćĺ        # Strategy 1: Check if a profile overlay is already open on the current page
   214Ôćĺ        overlay_present = await page.evaluate("""
   215Ôćĺ            () => {
   216Ôćĺ                const overlay = document.querySelector(
   217Ôćĺ                    '[class*="dialog-wrap"].active, [class*="boss-popup__wrapper"],
   218Ôćĺ                     [class*="geek-detail"], [class*="resume-dialog"], [class*="profile-panel"]'
   219Ôćĺ                );
   220Ôćĺ                return overlay !== null;
   221Ôćĺ            }
   222Ôćĺ        """)
   223Ôćĺ
   224Ôćĺ        if not overlay_present:
   225Ôćĺ            # Strategy 2: Navigate to profile page
   226Ôćĺ            await retry_navigation(page, profile_url, wait_until='domcontentloaded')
   227Ôćĺ            await async_random_delay('page_load')
   228Ôćĺ
   229Ôćĺ            # Check for captcha
   230Ôćĺ            await check_captcha(page, report_to_rate_limiter=True)
   231Ôćĺ
   232Ôćĺ            # Wait for profile content to load
   233Ôćĺ            await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
   234Ôćĺ
   235Ôćĺ        # Extract profile data via JavaScript (works on both overlay and standalone page)
   236Ôćĺ        profile_data = await page.evaluate(EXTRACT_PROFILE_JS)
   237Ôćĺ
   238Ôćĺ        if not profile_data or not profile_data.get('name'):
   239Ôćĺ            logger.warning(f"Could not extract profile for {boss_id}")
   240Ôćĺ            raise ExtractionError(f"Failed to extract profile data for {boss_id}")
   241Ôćĺ
   242Ôćĺ        # Log action
   243Ôćĺ        rate_limiter.log_action('view_profile', {'boss_id': boss_id})
   244Ôćĺ
   245Ôćĺ        # Update database
   246Ôćĺ        _update_profile_in_db(boss_id, profile_data, db_manager)
   247Ôćĺ
   248Ôćĺ        # Display profile
   249Ôćĺ        _display_profile(boss_id, profile_data)
   250Ôćĺ
   251Ôćĺ        return profile_data
   252Ôćĺ
   253Ôćĺ    except ExtractionError:
   254Ôćĺ        raise
   255Ôćĺ    except Exception as e:
   256Ôćĺ        logger.error(f"Error extracting profile for {boss_id}: {e}")
   257Ôćĺ        raise ExtractionError(f"Failed to extract profile for {boss_id}: {e}")
   258Ôćĺ
   259Ôćĺ
   260Ôćĺdef _update_profile_in_db(boss_id: str, profile_data: Dict, db_manager) -> None:
   261Ôćĺ    """Update candidate profile in the database."""
   262Ôćĺ    with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   263Ôćĺ        candidate = session.query(Candidate).filter_by(boss_id=boss_id).first()
   264Ôćĺ
   265Ôćĺ        if not candidate:
   266Ôćĺ            # Create new candidate entry
   267Ôćĺ            candidate = Candidate(boss_id=boss_id)
   268Ôćĺ            session.add(candidate)
   269Ôćĺ
   270Ôćĺ        # Update fields
   271Ôćĺ        candidate.name = profile_data.get('name') or candidate.name
   272Ôćĺ        candidate.title = profile_data.get('title') or candidate.title
   273Ôćĺ        candidate.company = profile_data.get('company') or candidate.company
   274Ôćĺ        candidate.location = profile_data.get('location') or candidate.location
   275Ôćĺ        candidate.salary_expect = profile_data.get('salary_expect') or candidate.salary_expect
   276Ôćĺ        candidate.work_years = profile_data.get('work_years') or candidate.work_years
   277Ôćĺ        candidate.education_level = profile_data.get('education_level') or candidate.education_level
   278Ôćĺ        candidate.basic_info = profile_data.get('basic_info')
   279Ôćĺ        candidate.education = profile_data.get('education')
   280Ôćĺ        candidate.work_experience = profile_data.get('work_experience')
   281Ôćĺ        candidate.skills = profile_data.get('skills')
   282Ôćĺ
   283Ôćĺ
   284Ôćĺdef _display_profile(boss_id: str, profile_data: Dict) -> None:
   285Ôćĺ    """Display extracted profile in Rich format."""
   286Ôćĺ    name = profile_data.get('name', 'Unknown')
   287Ôćĺ    title = profile_data.get('title', '')
   288Ôćĺ    company = profile_data.get('company', '')
   289Ôćĺ    location = profile_data.get('location', '')
   290Ôćĺ    salary = profile_data.get('salary_expect', '')
   291Ôćĺ    work_years = profile_data.get('work_years', '')
   292Ôćĺ    education_level = profile_data.get('education_level', '')
   293Ôćĺ
   294Ôćĺ    # Header
   295Ôćĺ    header = f"[bold]{name}[/bold]"
   296Ôćĺ    if title:
   297Ôćĺ        header += f" - {title}"
   298Ôćĺ    if company:
   299Ôćĺ        header += f" @ {company}"
   300Ôćĺ
   301Ôćĺ    console.print(Panel(header, title=f"Profile: {boss_id}", border_style="green"))
   302Ôćĺ
   303Ôćĺ    # Basic info
   304Ôćĺ    info_parts = []
   305Ôćĺ    if location:
   306Ôćĺ        info_parts.append(f"Location: {location}")
   307Ôćĺ    if salary:
   308Ôćĺ        info_parts.append(f"Expected Salary: {salary}")
   309Ôćĺ    if work_years:
   310Ôćĺ        info_parts.append(f"Experience: {work_years}")
   311Ôćĺ    if education_level:
   312Ôćĺ        info_parts.append(f"Education: {education_level}")
   313Ôćĺ
   314Ôćĺ    if info_parts:
   315Ôćĺ        console.print("  " + " | ".join(info_parts))
   316Ôćĺ
   317Ôćĺ    # Education
   318Ôćĺ    education = profile_data.get('education', [])
   319Ôćĺ    if education:
   320Ôćĺ        console.print("\n  [cyan]Education:[/cyan]")
   321Ôćĺ        for edu in education:
   322Ôćĺ            parts = []
   323Ôćĺ            if edu.get('school'):
   324Ôćĺ                parts.append(edu['school'])
   325Ôćĺ            if edu.get('degree'):
   326Ôćĺ                parts.append(edu['degree'])
   327Ôćĺ            if edu.get('major'):
   328Ôćĺ                parts.append(edu['major'])
   329Ôćĺ            console.print(f"    - {' | '.join(parts)}")
   330Ôćĺ
   331Ôćĺ    # Work experience
   332Ôćĺ    work_exp = profile_data.get('work_experience', [])
   333Ôćĺ    if work_exp:
   334Ôćĺ        console.print("\n  [cyan]Work Experience:[/cyan]")
   335Ôćĺ        for work in work_exp:
   336Ôćĺ            line = ""
   337Ôćĺ            if work.get('company'):
   338Ôćĺ                line += work['company']
   339Ôćĺ            if work.get('title'):
   340Ôćĺ                line += f" - {work['title']}"
   341Ôćĺ            if work.get('period'):
   342Ôćĺ                line += f" ({work['period']})"
   343Ôćĺ            console.print(f"    - {line}")
   344Ôćĺ
   345Ôćĺ    # Skills
   346Ôćĺ    skills = profile_data.get('skills', [])
   347Ôćĺ    if skills:
   348Ôćĺ        console.print(f"\n  [cyan]Skills:[/cyan] {', '.join(skills)}")
   349Ôćĺ
   350Ôćĺ    # Self description
   351Ôćĺ    basic_info = profile_data.get('basic_info', {})
   352Ôćĺ    if basic_info.get('self_description'):
   353Ôćĺ        desc = basic_info['self_description'][:200]
   354Ôćĺ        console.print(f"\n  [cyan]Self Description:[/cyan]\n    {desc}")
   355Ôćĺ
   356Ôćĺ    console.print()
   357Ôćĺ

1Ôćĺ"""Authentication module for BossšŤ┤Ŕüś login.
     2Ôćĺ
     3ÔćĺIn CDP mode, the user logs in manually in their own Chrome before running
     4ÔćĺCLI commands. This module verifies login status and provides guidance
     5Ôćĺif the user is not logged in.
     6Ôćĺ"""
     7Ôćĺ
     8Ôćĺimport asyncio
     9Ôćĺfrom typing import Optional
    10Ôćĺ
    11Ôćĺfrom patchright.async_api import Page
    12Ôćĺfrom loguru import logger
    13Ôćĺfrom rich.console import Console
    14Ôćĺfrom rich.panel import Panel
    15Ôćĺ
    16Ôćĺfrom src.core.browser import BrowserManager, get_browser_manager
    17Ôćĺfrom src.utils.captcha import check_captcha
    18Ôćĺfrom src.utils.retry import retry_navigation
    19Ôćĺfrom src.exceptions.errors import SessionExpiredError
    20Ôćĺ
    21Ôćĺconsole = Console()
    22Ôćĺ
    23Ôćĺ
    24Ôćĺasync def login(browser: Optional[BrowserManager] = None) -> bool:
    25Ôćĺ    """
    26Ôćĺ    Verify login status in CDP-connected Chrome.
    27Ôćĺ
    28Ôćĺ    In CDP mode, the user is expected to already be logged in to BossšŤ┤Ŕüś.
    29Ôćĺ    If not, instructions are printed for manual login in the browser.
    30Ôćĺ
    31Ôćĺ    Args:
    32Ôćĺ        browser: Browser manager instance (uses global if None)
    33Ôćĺ
    34Ôćĺ    Returns:
    35Ôćĺ        True if logged in
    36Ôćĺ    """
    37Ôćĺ    if browser is None:
    38Ôćĺ        browser = get_browser_manager()
    39Ôćĺ
    40Ôćĺ    # Connect to Chrome via CDP
    41Ôćĺ    page = await browser.start()
    42Ôćĺ
    43Ôćĺ    # Check if already logged in
    44Ôćĺ    if await check_login_status(page):
    45Ôćĺ        console.print("[green]Already logged in to BossšŤ┤Ŕüś![/green]")
    46Ôćĺ        # Save session as backup
    47Ôćĺ        await browser.save_session()
    48Ôćĺ        return True
    49Ôćĺ
    50Ôćĺ    # Not logged in ÔÇö guide the user
    51Ôćĺ    console.print(Panel(
    52Ôćĺ        "[bold]Not Logged In[/bold]\n\n"
    53Ôćĺ        "Please log in to BossšŤ┤Ŕüś in your Chrome browser:\n"
    54Ôćĺ        "1. Go to https://www.zhipin.com/web/user/?ka=header-login in Chrome\n"
    55Ôćĺ        "2. Scan QR code with BossšŤ┤Ŕüś app, OR\n"
    56Ôćĺ        "3. Enter phone number and verification code\n\n"
    57Ôćĺ        "[dim]Then wait here, login will be detected automatically.[/dim]",
    58Ôćĺ        title="BossšŤ┤Ŕüś Login",
    59Ôćĺ        border_style="cyan"
    60Ôćĺ    ))
    61Ôćĺ
    62Ôćĺ    # Poll for login (user may log in while we wait)
    63Ôćĺ    max_wait_seconds = 300  # 5 minutes timeout
    64Ôćĺ    poll_interval = 3
    65Ôćĺ    elapsed = 0
    66Ôćĺ
    67Ôćĺ    console.print("[dim]Waiting for login... (timeout: 5 minutes)[/dim]")
    68Ôćĺ
    69Ôćĺ    while elapsed < max_wait_seconds:
    70Ôćĺ        await asyncio.sleep(poll_interval)
    71Ôćĺ        elapsed += poll_interval
    72Ôćĺ
    73Ôćĺ        # Check for captcha
    74Ôćĺ        await check_captcha(page)
    75Ôćĺ
    76Ôćĺ        if await check_login_status(page):
    77Ôćĺ            console.print("[green]Login successful![/green]")
    78Ôćĺ            await browser.save_session()
    79Ôćĺ            console.print("[green]Session saved as backup[/green]")
    80Ôćĺ            return True
    81Ôćĺ
    82Ôćĺ    console.print("[red]Login timeout. Please log in manually and try again.[/red]")
    83Ôćĺ    return False
    84Ôćĺ
    85Ôćĺ
    86Ôćĺasync def check_login_status(page: Page) -> bool:
    87Ôćĺ    """
    88Ôćĺ    Check if user is currently logged in to BossšŤ┤Ŕüś by navigating to a
    89Ôćĺ    protected page and observing whether BossšŤ┤Ŕüś redirects to the login page.
    90Ôćĺ
    91Ôćĺ    Args:
    92Ôćĺ        page: Playwright page instance
    93Ôćĺ
    94Ôćĺ    Returns:
    95Ôćĺ        True if logged in (no redirect to login page)
    96Ôćĺ    """
    97Ôćĺ    try:
    98Ôćĺ        # Navigate to a protected page that requires authentication.
    99Ôćĺ        # The Boss search page reliably triggers server-side auth checks.
   100Ôćĺ        protected_url = "https://www.zhipin.com/web/chat/search"
   101Ôćĺ        await retry_navigation(page, protected_url, wait_until='domcontentloaded')
   102Ôćĺ
   103Ôćĺ        # Wait for any redirects to settle
   104Ôćĺ        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000)
   105Ôćĺ
   106Ôćĺ        # Check 1: URL-based detection - did we get redirected to login?
   107Ôćĺ        final_url = page.url
   108Ôćĺ        if 'login' in final_url.lower() or 'signin' in final_url.lower():
   109Ôćĺ            logger.info(f"Login status check: logged_in=False, detail=redirected_to_login (url={final_url})")
   110Ôćĺ            return False
   111Ôćĺ
   112Ôćĺ        # Check 2: Page content detection - look for login form elements
   113Ôćĺ        is_login_page = await page.evaluate("""
   114Ôćĺ            () => {
   115Ôćĺ                const bodyText = document.body ? document.body.innerText : '';
   116Ôćĺ                const loginIndicators = [
   117Ôćĺ                    'ŠČóŔ┐ÄšÖ╗ňŻĽ',
   118Ôćĺ                    'ŠëźšáüšÖ╗ňŻĽ',
   119Ôćĺ                    'ň»ćšáüšÖ╗ňŻĽ',
   120Ôćĺ                    'ščşń┐íšÖ╗ňŻĽ',
   121Ôćĺ                    'Ŕ»ĚŔżôňůąŠëőŠť║ňĆĚ',
   122Ôćĺ                    'ŔÄĚňĆľÚ¬îŔ»üšáü',
   123Ôćĺ                    'ňż«ń┐íšÖ╗ňŻĽ',
   124Ôćĺ                    'šÖ╗ňŻĽ/Š│Ęňćî'
   125Ôćĺ                ];
   126Ôćĺ                for (const indicator of loginIndicators) {
   127Ôćĺ                    if (bodyText.includes(indicator)) {
   128Ôćĺ                        return { is_login: true, matched: indicator };
   129Ôćĺ                    }
   130Ôćĺ                }
   131Ôćĺ
   132Ôćĺ                // Also check for login form elements in DOM
   133Ôćĺ                const loginForm = document.querySelector(
   134Ôćĺ                    'input[type="tel"], input[placeholder*="ŠëőŠť║"], ' +
   135Ôćĺ                    '[class*="qrcode"], [class*="scan-login"], ' +
   136Ôćĺ                    '[class*="login-form"], [class*="sign-form"]'
   137Ôćĺ                );
   138Ôćĺ                if (loginForm) {
   139Ôćĺ                    return { is_login: true, matched: 'login_form_element' };
   140Ôćĺ                }
   141Ôćĺ
   142Ôćĺ                return { is_login: false, matched: null };
   143Ôćĺ            }
   144Ôćĺ        """)
   145Ôćĺ
   146Ôćĺ        if is_login_page.get('is_login', False):
   147Ôćĺ            detail = is_login_page.get('matched', 'unknown')
   148Ôćĺ            logger.info(f"Login status check: logged_in=False, detail=login_page_detected ({detail})")
   149Ôćĺ            return False
   150Ôćĺ
   151Ôćĺ        logger.info(f"Login status check: logged_in=True, detail=protected_page_accessible (url={final_url})")
   152Ôćĺ        return True
   153Ôćĺ
   154Ôćĺ    except Exception as e:
   155Ôćĺ        logger.error(f"Error checking login status: {e}")
   156Ôćĺ        return False
   157Ôćĺ
   158Ôćĺ
   159Ôćĺasync def ensure_logged_in(browser: Optional[BrowserManager] = None) -> bool:
   160Ôćĺ    """
   161Ôćĺ    Ensure user is logged in, prompting for login if needed.
   162Ôćĺ
   163Ôćĺ    Args:
   164Ôćĺ        browser: Browser manager instance
   165Ôćĺ
   166Ôćĺ    Returns:
   167Ôćĺ        True if logged in (existing or new login)
   168Ôćĺ
   169Ôćĺ    Raises:
   170Ôćĺ        SessionExpiredError: If login fails
   171Ôćĺ    """
   172Ôćĺ    if browser is None:
   173Ôćĺ        browser = get_browser_manager()
   174Ôćĺ
   175Ôćĺ    # Connect to Chrome via CDP if not already connected
   176Ôćĺ    if not browser.is_running:
   177Ôćĺ        await browser.start()
   178Ôćĺ
   179Ôćĺ    # Check login status
   180Ôćĺ    if browser.page:
   181Ôćĺ        if await check_login_status(browser.page):
   182Ôćĺ            return True
   183Ôćĺ
   184Ôćĺ    # Not logged in ÔÇö guide user
   185Ôćĺ    console.print("[yellow]Not logged in. Please log in to BossšŤ┤Ŕüś in your Chrome browser.[/yellow]")
   186Ôćĺ
   187Ôćĺ    if await login(browser):
   188Ôćĺ        return True
   189Ôćĺ
   190Ôćĺ    raise SessionExpiredError("Not logged in to BossšŤ┤Ŕüś. Please log in manually in Chrome and try again.")
   191Ôćĺ

1Ôćĺ"""Export module for exporting candidate data.
     2Ôćĺ
     3ÔćĺSupports Excel (.xlsx) and CSV formats with optional
     4Ôćĺmessage history inclusion.
     5Ôćĺ"""
     6Ôćĺ
     7Ôćĺfrom datetime import datetime
     8Ôćĺfrom pathlib import Path
     9Ôćĺfrom typing import Optional, Literal, List, Dict, Any
    10Ôćĺ
    11Ôćĺimport pandas as pd
    12Ôćĺfrom openpyxl import Workbook
    13Ôćĺfrom openpyxl.styles import Font, PatternFill, Alignment, Border, Side
    14Ôćĺfrom openpyxl.utils.dataframe import dataframe_to_rows
    15Ôćĺfrom loguru import logger
    16Ôćĺfrom rich.console import Console
    17Ôćĺ
    18Ôćĺfrom src.utils.config import get_config
    19Ôćĺfrom src.models.database import Candidate, Message, get_db_manager
    20Ôćĺ
    21Ôćĺconsole = Console()
    22Ôćĺ
    23Ôćĺ
    24Ôćĺdef export_candidates(
    25Ôćĺ    output_format: Literal["excel", "xlsx", "csv"] = "excel",
    26Ôćĺ    output_path: Optional[str] = None,
    27Ôćĺ    include_messages: bool = True
    28Ôćĺ) -> str:
    29Ôćĺ    """
    30Ôćĺ    Export candidate data to Excel or CSV.
    31Ôćĺ
    32Ôćĺ    Args:
    33Ôćĺ        output_format: Export format ('excel', 'xlsx', or 'csv')
    34Ôćĺ        output_path: Output file path (auto-generated if None)
    35Ôćĺ        include_messages: Include message history
    36Ôćĺ
    37Ôćĺ    Returns:
    38Ôćĺ        Path to exported file
    39Ôćĺ    """
    40Ôćĺ    config = get_config()
    41Ôćĺ    db_manager = get_db_manager()
    42Ôćĺ
    43Ôćĺ    if output_format == "xlsx":
    44Ôćĺ        output_format = "excel"
    45Ôćĺ
    46Ôćĺ    if output_path is None:
    47Ôćĺ        export_dir = Path(config.get('data.export_dir', 'data/exports'))
    48Ôćĺ        export_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    49Ôćĺ        timestamp = datetime.now().strftime('%Y%m%d_%H%M%S')
    50Ôćĺ        extension = 'xlsx' if output_format == 'excel' else 'csv'
    51Ôćĺ        output_path = str(export_dir / f"candidates_{timestamp}.{extension}")
    52Ôćĺ
    53Ôćĺ    Path(output_path).parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    54Ôćĺ
    55Ôćĺ    candidates_data = _get_candidates_data(db_manager, include_messages)
    56Ôćĺ
    57Ôćĺ    if not candidates_data:
    58Ôćĺ        console.print("[yellow]No candidates to export[/yellow]")
    59Ôćĺ        return ""
    60Ôćĺ
    61Ôćĺ    df = _create_dataframe(candidates_data)
    62Ôćĺ
    63Ôćĺ    if output_format == "excel":
    64Ôćĺ        _export_to_excel(df, output_path)
    65Ôćĺ    else:
    66Ôćĺ        _export_to_csv(df, output_path)
    67Ôćĺ
    68Ôćĺ    console.print(f"[green]Exported {len(candidates_data)} candidates to: {output_path}[/green]")
    69Ôćĺ    return output_path
    70Ôćĺ
    71Ôćĺ
    72Ôćĺdef _get_candidates_data(db_manager, include_messages: bool) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:
    73Ôćĺ    """Get candidate data from database."""
    74Ôćĺ    with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
    75Ôćĺ        candidates = session.query(Candidate).all()
    76Ôćĺ
    77Ôćĺ        data = []
    78Ôćĺ        for candidate in candidates:
    79Ôćĺ            record = {
    80Ôćĺ                'boss_id': candidate.boss_id,
    81Ôćĺ                'name': candidate.name,
    82Ôćĺ                'title': candidate.title,
    83Ôćĺ                'company': candidate.company,
    84Ôćĺ                'location': candidate.location,
    85Ôćĺ                'salary_expect': candidate.salary_expect,
    86Ôćĺ                'work_years': candidate.work_years,
    87Ôćĺ                'education_level': candidate.education_level,
    88Ôćĺ                'profile_url': candidate.profile_url,
    89Ôćĺ                'first_seen': candidate.first_seen,
    90Ôćĺ                'last_updated': candidate.last_updated,
    91Ôćĺ                'source_search': candidate.source_search,
    92Ôćĺ            }
    93Ôćĺ
    94Ôćĺ            # Flatten education
    95Ôćĺ            education = candidate.education or []
    96Ôćĺ            if education:
    97Ôćĺ                latest_edu = education[0]
    98Ôćĺ                record['latest_education'] = _format_education(latest_edu)
    99Ôćĺ            else:
   100Ôćĺ                record['latest_education'] = ''
   101Ôćĺ
   102Ôćĺ            # Flatten work experience
   103Ôćĺ            work_exp = candidate.work_experience or []
   104Ôćĺ            if work_exp:
   105Ôćĺ                latest_work = work_exp[0]
   106Ôćĺ                record['latest_experience'] = _format_work_experience(latest_work)
   107Ôćĺ            else:
   108Ôćĺ                record['latest_experience'] = ''
   109Ôćĺ
   110Ôćĺ            # Format skills
   111Ôćĺ            skills = candidate.skills or []
   112Ôćĺ            record['skills'] = ', '.join(skills) if skills else ''
   113Ôćĺ
   114Ôćĺ            data.append(record)
   115Ôćĺ
   116Ôćĺ        # Batch-fetch message info to avoid N+1 queries
   117Ôćĺ        if include_messages and data:
   118Ôćĺ            from sqlalchemy import func
   119Ôćĺ
   120Ôćĺ            boss_ids = [r['boss_id'] for r in data]
   121Ôćĺ            # Get message counts and latest message per candidate in bulk
   122Ôćĺ            msg_counts = {}
   123Ôćĺ            latest_msgs = {}
   124Ôćĺ
   125Ôćĺ            # Count messages per candidate
   126Ôćĺ            count_rows = session.query(
   127Ôćĺ                Message.candidate_boss_id,
   128Ôćĺ                func.count(Message.id).label('cnt')
   129Ôćĺ            ).filter(
   130Ôćĺ                Message.candidate_boss_id.in_(boss_ids)
   131Ôćĺ            ).group_by(Message.candidate_boss_id).all()
   132Ôćĺ
   133Ôćĺ            for row in count_rows:
   134Ôćĺ                msg_counts[row.candidate_boss_id] = row.cnt
   135Ôćĺ
   136Ôćĺ            # Get latest message per candidate using a subquery
   137Ôćĺ            from sqlalchemy import desc
   138Ôćĺ            all_msgs = session.query(Message).filter(
   139Ôćĺ                Message.candidate_boss_id.in_(boss_ids)
   140Ôćĺ            ).order_by(Message.candidate_boss_id, desc(Message.created_at)).all()
   141Ôćĺ
   142Ôćĺ            for msg in all_msgs:
   143Ôćĺ                if msg.candidate_boss_id not in latest_msgs:
   144Ôćĺ                    latest_msgs[msg.candidate_boss_id] = msg
   145Ôćĺ
   146Ôćĺ            for record in data:
   147Ôćĺ                bid = record['boss_id']
   148Ôćĺ                record['message_count'] = msg_counts.get(bid, 0)
   149Ôćĺ                latest_msg = latest_msgs.get(bid)
   150Ôćĺ                if latest_msg:
   151Ôćĺ                    record['last_message_status'] = latest_msg.status
   152Ôćĺ                    record['last_message_date'] = latest_msg.sent_at or latest_msg.created_at
   153Ôćĺ                    record['last_message_template'] = latest_msg.template_name
   154Ôćĺ                else:
   155Ôćĺ                    record['last_message_status'] = ''
   156Ôćĺ                    record['last_message_date'] = None
   157Ôćĺ                    record['last_message_template'] = ''
   158Ôćĺ
   159Ôćĺ        return data
   160Ôćĺ
   161Ôćĺ
   162Ôćĺdef _format_education(edu: Dict) -> str:
   163Ôćĺ    """Format education entry as string."""
   164Ôćĺ    parts = []
   165Ôćĺ    if edu.get('school'):
   166Ôćĺ        parts.append(edu['school'])
   167Ôćĺ    if edu.get('degree'):
   168Ôćĺ        parts.append(edu['degree'])
   169Ôćĺ    if edu.get('major'):
   170Ôćĺ        parts.append(edu['major'])
   171Ôćĺ    return ' - '.join(parts) if parts else ''
   172Ôćĺ
   173Ôćĺ
   174Ôćĺdef _format_work_experience(work: Dict) -> str:
   175Ôćĺ    """Format work experience entry as string."""
   176Ôćĺ    parts = []
   177Ôćĺ    if work.get('title'):
   178Ôćĺ        parts.append(work['title'])
   179Ôćĺ    if work.get('company'):
   180Ôćĺ        parts.append(f"@ {work['company']}")
   181Ôćĺ    return ' '.join(parts) if parts else ''
   182Ôćĺ
   183Ôćĺ
   184Ôćĺdef _create_dataframe(data: List[Dict[str, Any]]) -> pd.DataFrame:
   185Ôćĺ    """Create pandas DataFrame from candidate data."""
   186Ôćĺ    columns = [
   187Ôćĺ        'boss_id',
   188Ôćĺ        'name',
   189Ôćĺ        'title',
   190Ôćĺ        'company',
   191Ôćĺ        'location',
   192Ôćĺ        'salary_expect',
   193Ôćĺ        'work_years',
   194Ôćĺ        'education_level',
   195Ôćĺ        'latest_education',
   196Ôćĺ        'latest_experience',
   197Ôćĺ        'skills',
   198Ôćĺ        'profile_url',
   199Ôćĺ        'source_search',
   200Ôćĺ        'first_seen',
   201Ôćĺ        'last_updated',
   202Ôćĺ    ]
   203Ôćĺ
   204Ôćĺ    if data and 'message_count' in data[0]:
   205Ôćĺ        columns.extend([
   206Ôćĺ            'message_count',
   207Ôćĺ            'last_message_status',
   208Ôćĺ            'last_message_date',
   209Ôćĺ            'last_message_template',
   210Ôćĺ        ])
   211Ôćĺ
   212Ôćĺ    df = pd.DataFrame(data)
   213Ôćĺ
   214Ôćĺ    existing_columns = [c for c in columns if c in df.columns]
   215Ôćĺ    df = df[existing_columns]
   216Ôćĺ
   217Ôćĺ    datetime_columns = ['first_seen', 'last_updated', 'last_message_date']
   218Ôćĺ    for col in datetime_columns:
   219Ôćĺ        if col in df.columns:
   220Ôćĺ            df[col] = pd.to_datetime(df[col]).dt.strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M').replace('NaT', '')
   221Ôćĺ
   222Ôćĺ    return df
   223Ôćĺ
   224Ôćĺ
   225Ôćĺdef _export_to_excel(df: pd.DataFrame, output_path: str) -> None:
   226Ôćĺ    """Export DataFrame to Excel with formatting."""
   227Ôćĺ    wb = Workbook()
   228Ôćĺ    ws = wb.active
   229Ôćĺ    ws.title = "Candidates"
   230Ôćĺ
   231Ôćĺ    header_font = Font(bold=True, color="FFFFFF")
   232Ôćĺ    header_fill = PatternFill(start_color="4472C4", end_color="4472C4", fill_type="solid")
   233Ôćĺ    header_alignment = Alignment(horizontal="center", vertical="center", wrap_text=True)
   234Ôćĺ
   235Ôćĺ    border = Border(
   236Ôćĺ        left=Side(style='thin'),
   237Ôćĺ        right=Side(style='thin'),
   238Ôćĺ        top=Side(style='thin'),
   239Ôćĺ        bottom=Side(style='thin')
   240Ôćĺ    )
   241Ôćĺ
   242Ôćĺ    for r_idx, row in enumerate(dataframe_to_rows(df, index=False, header=True), 1):
   243Ôćĺ        for c_idx, value in enumerate(row, 1):
   244Ôćĺ            cell = ws.cell(row=r_idx, column=c_idx, value=value)
   245Ôćĺ            cell.border = border
   246Ôćĺ
   247Ôćĺ            if r_idx == 1:
   248Ôćĺ                cell.font = header_font
   249Ôćĺ                cell.fill = header_fill
   250Ôćĺ                cell.alignment = header_alignment
   251Ôćĺ            else:
   252Ôćĺ                cell.alignment = Alignment(vertical="center", wrap_text=True)
   253Ôćĺ
   254Ôćĺ    column_widths = {
   255Ôćĺ        'A': 20,  # boss_id
   256Ôćĺ        'B': 12,  # name
   257Ôćĺ        'C': 25,  # title
   258Ôćĺ        'D': 20,  # company
   259Ôćĺ        'E': 12,  # location
   260Ôćĺ        'F': 15,  # salary_expect
   261Ôćĺ        'G': 12,  # work_years
   262Ôćĺ        'H': 12,  # education_level
   263Ôćĺ        'I': 30,  # latest_education
   264Ôćĺ        'J': 30,  # latest_experience
   265Ôćĺ        'K': 40,  # skills
   266Ôćĺ        'L': 40,  # profile_url
   267Ôćĺ        'M': 20,  # source_search
   268Ôćĺ        'N': 18,  # first_seen
   269Ôćĺ        'O': 18,  # last_updated
   270Ôćĺ        'P': 12,  # message_count
   271Ôćĺ        'Q': 15,  # last_message_status
   272Ôćĺ        'R': 18,  # last_message_date
   273Ôćĺ        'S': 15,  # last_message_template
   274Ôćĺ    }
   275Ôćĺ
   276Ôćĺ    for col, width in column_widths.items():
   277Ôćĺ        ws.column_dimensions[col].width = width
   278Ôćĺ
   279Ôćĺ    ws.freeze_panes = 'A2'
   280Ôćĺ    ws.auto_filter.ref = ws.dimensions
   281Ôćĺ
   282Ôćĺ    wb.save(output_path)
   283Ôćĺ    logger.info(f"Excel file saved to: {output_path}")
   284Ôćĺ
   285Ôćĺ
   286Ôćĺdef _export_to_csv(df: pd.DataFrame, output_path: str) -> None:
   287Ôćĺ    """Export DataFrame to CSV."""
   288Ôćĺ    df.to_csv(output_path, index=False, encoding='utf-8-sig')
   289Ôćĺ    logger.info(f"CSV file saved to: {output_path}")
   290Ôćĺ

1Ôćĺ"""Message sending module for BossšŤ┤Ŕüś.
     2Ôćĺ
     3ÔćĺHandles sending templated messages to candidates through BossšŤ┤Ŕüś's
     4Ôćĺchat system. Supports single and batch message sending with
     5Ôćĺhuman confirmation and rate limiting.
     6Ôćĺ
     7ÔćĺBossšŤ┤Ŕüś chat flow:
     8Ôćĺ1. From search page (/web/chat/search), click "ŠÉťš┤óšĽůŔüŐňŹí" button
     9Ôćĺ2. Click "Ščąšťőň»╣Ŕ»Ł" to open the chat window
    10Ôćĺ3. Type message in #boss-chat-global-input
    11Ôćĺ4. Click "ňĆĹÚÇü" button
    12Ôćĺ5. Close chat via div.iboss.iboss-close
    13Ôćĺ
    14ÔćĺKey differences from Maimai:
    15Ôćĺ- BossšŤ┤Ŕüś uses "ŠÉťš┤óšĽůŔüŐňŹí" as the primary contact action from search
    16Ôćĺ- Chat input is a div with id #boss-chat-global-input (not textarea)
    17Ôćĺ- Chat opens as an overlay on the current page
    18Ôćĺ- Main page URL: /web/chat/search
    19Ôćĺ"""
    20Ôćĺ
    21Ôćĺfrom datetime import datetime, timezone
    22Ôćĺfrom typing import Dict, List, Optional
    23Ôćĺ
    24Ôćĺfrom patchright.async_api import Page
    25Ôćĺfrom loguru import logger
    26Ôćĺfrom rich.console import Console
    27Ôćĺfrom rich.panel import Panel
    28Ôćĺ
    29Ôćĺimport questionary
    30Ôćĺ
    31Ôćĺfrom src.core.browser import BrowserManager, get_browser_manager
    32Ôćĺfrom src.utils.config import get_config
    33Ôćĺfrom src.utils.delays import async_random_delay
    34Ôćĺfrom src.utils.rate_limiter import get_rate_limiter, async_check_rate_limit
    35Ôćĺfrom src.utils.captcha import check_captcha
    36Ôćĺfrom src.utils.retry import retry_navigation
    37Ôćĺfrom src.utils.validators import validate_template_variables
    38Ôćĺfrom src.models.database import Candidate, Message, get_db_manager
    39Ôćĺfrom src.exceptions.errors import (
    40Ôćĺ    BrowserError,
    41Ôćĺ    PermanentFailureError,

    44Ôćĺ
    45Ôćĺconsole = Console()

    47Ôćĺ
    48Ôćĺdef render_template(template: Dict, variables: Dict[str, str]) -> str:
    49Ôćĺ    """
    50Ôćĺ    Render a message template with variable substitution.
    51Ôćĺ
    52Ôćĺ    Uses a single-pass approach to avoid recursive replacement issues
    53Ôćĺ    (e.g., variable values containing {other_var} patterns).
    54Ôćĺ
    55Ôćĺ    Args:
    56Ôćĺ        template: Template dict with 'content' and 'variables' keys
    57Ôćĺ        variables: Variable name-value pairs
    58Ôćĺ
    59Ôćĺ    Returns:
    60Ôćĺ        Rendered message string
    61Ôćĺ    """
    62Ôćĺ    import re
    63Ôćĺ
    64Ôćĺ    content = template['content']
    65Ôćĺ
    66Ôćĺ    def replacer(match):
    67Ôćĺ        var_name = match.group(1)
    68Ôćĺ        if var_name in variables:
    69Ôćĺ            return str(variables[var_name])
    70Ôćĺ        return match.group(0)  # Keep original if no matching variable
    71Ôćĺ
    72Ôćĺ    content = re.sub(r'\{(\w+)\}', replacer, content)
    73Ôćĺ    return content
    74Ôćĺ
    75Ôćĺ
    76Ôćĺasync def send_message(
    77Ôćĺ    boss_id: str,
    78Ôćĺ    template_name: str,
    79Ôćĺ    variables: Optional[Dict[str, str]] = None,
    80Ôćĺ    preview_only: bool = False,
    81Ôćĺ    interactive: bool = True,
    82Ôćĺ    browser: Optional[BrowserManager] = None,
    83Ôćĺ) -> bool:
    84Ôćĺ    """
    85Ôćĺ    Send a templated message to a candidate on BossšŤ┤Ŕüś.
    86Ôćĺ
    87Ôćĺ    Args:
    88Ôćĺ        boss_id: Candidate Boss ID
    89Ôćĺ        template_name: Name of the message template
    90Ôćĺ        variables: Template variable overrides
    91Ôćĺ        preview_only: If True, only preview the message without sending
    92Ôćĺ        browser: Browser manager instance
    93Ôćĺ
    94Ôćĺ    Returns:
    95Ôćĺ        True if message sent successfully
    96Ôćĺ    """
    97Ôćĺ    if browser is None:
    98Ôćĺ        browser = get_browser_manager()
    99Ôćĺ
   100Ôćĺ    page = browser.page
   101Ôćĺ    if not page:
   102Ôćĺ        page = await browser.start()
   103Ôćĺ
   104Ôćĺ    config = get_config()
   105Ôćĺ    rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()
   106Ôćĺ    db_manager = get_db_manager()
   107Ôćĺ
   108Ôćĺ    # Load template
   109Ôćĺ    template = config.get_template(template_name)
   110Ôćĺ
   111Ôćĺ    # Merge variables
   112Ôćĺ    final_vars = dict(variables or {})
   113Ôćĺ
   114Ôćĺ    # Try to fill candidate info from database
   115Ôćĺ    with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   116Ôćĺ        candidate = session.query(Candidate).filter_by(boss_id=boss_id).first()
   117Ôćĺ        if candidate:
   118Ôćĺ            if 'name' not in final_vars and candidate.name:
   119Ôćĺ                final_vars['name'] = candidate.name
   120Ôćĺ            if 'company' not in final_vars and candidate.company:
   121Ôćĺ                final_vars['company'] = candidate.company
   122Ôćĺ            if 'position' not in final_vars and candidate.title:
   123Ôćĺ                final_vars['position'] = candidate.title
   124Ôćĺ
   125Ôćĺ    # Validate variables
   126Ôćĺ    validate_template_variables(template, final_vars)
   127Ôćĺ
   128Ôćĺ    # Render message
   129Ôćĺ    message_content = render_template(template, final_vars)
   130Ôćĺ
   131Ôćĺ    # Preview
   132Ôćĺ    console.print(Panel(
   133Ôćĺ        f"[bold]To:[/bold] {boss_id}\n"
   134Ôćĺ        f"[bold]Template:[/bold] {template_name}\n"
   135Ôćĺ        f"[bold]Message:[/bold]\n{message_content}",
   136Ôćĺ        title="Message Preview",
   137Ôćĺ        border_style="cyan"
   138Ôćĺ    ))
   139Ôćĺ
   140Ôćĺ    if preview_only:
   141Ôćĺ        console.print("[dim]Preview only ÔÇö message not sent.[/dim]")
   142Ôćĺ        return False
   143Ôćĺ
   144Ôćĺ    # Confirm send ÔÇö skip confirmation in non-interactive mode (Web)
   145Ôćĺ    import sys
   146Ôćĺ    if not interactive:
   147Ôćĺ        confirm = True
   148Ôćĺ    elif sys.stdin.isatty():
   149Ôćĺ        confirm = questionary.confirm(
   150Ôćĺ            "Send this message?",
   151Ôćĺ            default=False,
   152Ôćĺ        ).ask()
   153Ôćĺ    else:
   154Ôćĺ        confirm = False
   155Ôćĺ
   156Ôćĺ    if not confirm:
   157Ôćĺ        console.print("[yellow]Message cancelled.[/yellow]")
   158Ôćĺ        # Record cancellation
   159Ôćĺ        _save_message_to_db(boss_id, template_name, message_content, 'cancelled', db_manager)
   160Ôćĺ        return False
   161Ôćĺ
   162Ôćĺ    # Rate limit check
   163Ôćĺ    await async_check_rate_limit('send_message')
   164Ôćĺ
   165Ôćĺ    try:
   166Ôćĺ        # Navigate to chat with the candidate
   167Ôćĺ        success = await _navigate_to_chat(page, boss_id, db_manager)
   168Ôćĺ        if not success:
   169Ôćĺ            raise BrowserError(f"Failed to open chat with {boss_id}")
   170Ôćĺ
   171Ôćĺ        # Type and send the message
   172Ôćĺ        await _type_and_send_message(page, message_content)
   173Ôćĺ
   174Ôćĺ        # Log success
   175Ôćĺ        rate_limiter.log_action('send_message', {'boss_id': boss_id, 'template': template_name})
   176Ôćĺ        _save_message_to_db(boss_id, template_name, message_content, 'sent', db_manager)
   177Ôćĺ
   178Ôćĺ        console.print(f"[green]Message sent to {boss_id}![/green]")
   179Ôćĺ        return True
   180Ôćĺ
   181Ôćĺ    except PermanentFailureError as e:
   182Ôćĺ        logger.error(f"Permanent failure sending to {boss_id}: {e}")
   183Ôćĺ        _save_message_to_db(boss_id, template_name, message_content, 'failed', db_manager)
   184Ôćĺ        rate_limiter.report_error()
   185Ôćĺ        console.print(f"[red]Failed to send: {e}[/red]")
   186Ôćĺ        return False
   187Ôćĺ    except Exception as e:
   188Ôćĺ        logger.error(f"Error sending message to {boss_id}: {e}")
   189Ôćĺ        _save_message_to_db(boss_id, template_name, message_content, 'failed', db_manager)
   190Ôćĺ        rate_limiter.report_error()
   191Ôćĺ        console.print(f"[red]Error: {e}[/red]")
   192Ôćĺ        return False
   193Ôćĺ
   194Ôćĺ
   195Ôćĺasync def send_message_batch(
   196Ôćĺ    candidates: list,
   197Ôćĺ    template_name: str,
   198Ôćĺ    variables: Optional[Dict[str, str]] = None,
   199Ôćĺ    interactive: bool = True,
   200Ôćĺ    skip_messaged: bool = True,
   201Ôćĺ    dry_run: bool = False,
   202Ôćĺ    browser: Optional[BrowserManager] = None,
   203Ôćĺ) -> Dict[str, int]:
   204Ôćĺ    """
   205Ôćĺ    Send messages to multiple candidates.
   206Ôćĺ
   207Ôćĺ    Args:
   208Ôćĺ        candidates: List of CandidateBasic or dicts with boss_id
   209Ôćĺ        template_name: Template name
   210Ôćĺ        variables: Shared template variables
   211Ôćĺ        interactive: Confirm each message individually
   212Ôćĺ        skip_messaged: Skip candidates already messaged
   213Ôćĺ        dry_run: Simulate without actually sending
   214Ôćĺ        browser: Browser manager instance
   215Ôćĺ
   216Ôćĺ    Returns:
   217Ôćĺ        Dict with counts: sent, failed, skipped, cancelled
   218Ôćĺ    """
   219Ôćĺ    if browser is None:
   220Ôćĺ        browser = get_browser_manager()
   221Ôćĺ
   222Ôćĺ    config = get_config()
   223Ôćĺ    db_manager = get_db_manager()
   224Ôćĺ    rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()
   225Ôćĺ
   226Ôćĺ    stats = {'sent': 0, 'failed': 0, 'skipped': 0, 'cancelled': 0}
   227Ôćĺ
   228Ôćĺ    for i, candidate in enumerate(candidates):
   229Ôćĺ        if isinstance(candidate, dict):
   230Ôćĺ            boss_id = candidate.get('boss_id', '')
   231Ôćĺ            name = candidate.get('name', '')
   232Ôćĺ            title = candidate.get('title', '')
   233Ôćĺ            company = candidate.get('company', '')
   234Ôćĺ        else:
   235Ôćĺ            boss_id = getattr(candidate, 'boss_id', '')
   236Ôćĺ            name = getattr(candidate, 'name', '')
   237Ôćĺ            title = getattr(candidate, 'title', '')
   238Ôćĺ            company = getattr(candidate, 'company', '')
   239Ôćĺ
   240Ôćĺ        if not boss_id:
   241Ôćĺ            stats['skipped'] += 1
   242Ôćĺ            continue
   243Ôćĺ
   244Ôćĺ        console.print(f"\n[cyan]({i+1}/{len(candidates)})[/cyan] {name} - {title} @ {company}")
   245Ôćĺ
   246Ôćĺ        # Check if already messaged
   247Ôćĺ        if skip_messaged:
   248Ôćĺ            with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   249Ôćĺ                existing_msg = session.query(Message).filter_by(
   250Ôćĺ                    candidate_boss_id=boss_id, status='sent'
   251Ôćĺ                ).first()
   252Ôćĺ                if existing_msg:
   253Ôćĺ                    console.print(f"  [dim]Already messaged, skipping[/dim]")
   254Ôćĺ                    stats['skipped'] += 1
   255Ôćĺ                    continue
   256Ôćĺ
   257Ôćĺ        if dry_run:
   258Ôćĺ            console.print(f"  [dim]Dry run ÔÇö would send '{template_name}' template[/dim]")
   259Ôćĺ            stats['sent'] += 1
   260Ôćĺ            continue
   261Ôćĺ
   262Ôćĺ        # Build per-candidate variables
   263Ôćĺ        per_vars = dict(variables or {})
   264Ôćĺ        if name:
   265Ôćĺ            per_vars.setdefault('name', name)
   266Ôćĺ        if company:
   267Ôćĺ            per_vars.setdefault('company', company)
   268Ôćĺ        if title:
   269Ôćĺ            per_vars.setdefault('position', title)
   270Ôćĺ
   271Ôćĺ        try:
   272Ôćĺ            if interactive:
   273Ôćĺ                # Use single send (with preview + confirmation)
   274Ôćĺ                result = await send_message(
   275Ôćĺ                    boss_id=boss_id,
   276Ôćĺ                    template_name=template_name,
   277Ôćĺ                    variables=per_vars,
   278Ôćĺ                    browser=browser,
   279Ôćĺ                )
   280Ôćĺ                if result:
   281Ôćĺ                    stats['sent'] += 1
   282Ôćĺ                else:
   283Ôćĺ                    stats['cancelled'] += 1
   284Ôćĺ            else:
   285Ôćĺ                # Non-interactive: send without confirmation
   286Ôćĺ                await async_check_rate_limit('send_message')
   287Ôćĺ
   288Ôćĺ                template = config.get_template(template_name)
   289Ôćĺ                validate_template_variables(template, per_vars)
   290Ôćĺ                message_content = render_template(template, per_vars)
   291Ôćĺ
   292Ôćĺ                page = browser.page
   293Ôćĺ                success = await _navigate_to_chat(page, boss_id, db_manager)
   294Ôćĺ                if success:
   295Ôćĺ                    await _type_and_send_message(page, message_content)
   296Ôćĺ                    rate_limiter.log_action('send_message', {'boss_id': boss_id})
   297Ôćĺ                    _save_message_to_db(boss_id, template_name, message_content, 'sent', db_manager)
   298Ôćĺ                    stats['sent'] += 1
   299Ôćĺ                    console.print(f"  [green]Sent![/green]")
   300Ôćĺ                else:
   301Ôćĺ                    _save_message_to_db(boss_id, template_name, message_content, 'failed', db_manager)
   302Ôćĺ                    stats['failed'] += 1
   303Ôćĺ                    console.print(f"  [red]Failed to open chat[/red]")
   304Ôćĺ
   305Ôćĺ        except Exception as e:
   306Ôćĺ            logger.error(f"Error sending to {boss_id}: {e}")
   307Ôćĺ            stats['failed'] += 1
   308Ôćĺ            console.print(f"  [red]Error: {e}[/red]")
   309Ôćĺ
   310Ôćĺ        # Delay between messages
   311Ôćĺ        if i < len(candidates) - 1:
   312Ôćĺ            await async_random_delay('message')
   313Ôćĺ
   314Ôćĺ    # Summary
   315Ôćĺ    console.print(Panel(
   316Ôćĺ        f"[green]Sent: {stats['sent']}[/green] | "
   317Ôćĺ        f"[red]Failed: {stats['failed']}[/red] | "
   318Ôćĺ        f"[yellow]Skipped: {stats['skipped']}[/yellow] | "
   319Ôćĺ        f"[dim]Cancelled: {stats['cancelled']}[/dim]",
   320Ôćĺ        title="Batch Message Summary",
   321Ôćĺ    ))
   322Ôćĺ
   323Ôćĺ    return stats
   324Ôćĺ
   325Ôćĺ
   326Ôćĺasync def _navigate_to_chat(page: Page, boss_id: str, db_manager) -> bool:
   327Ôćĺ    """
   328Ôćĺ    Navigate to the chat window for a candidate.
   329Ôćĺ
   330Ôćĺ    Tries multiple strategies:
   331Ôćĺ    1. Direct chat URL (if known)
   332Ôćĺ    2. Navigate to candidate profile and click "šźőňŹ│Š▓čÚÇÜ"
   333Ôćĺ    3. Search in existing conversations
   334Ôćĺ
   335Ôćĺ    Args:
   336Ôćĺ        page: Playwright page instance
   337Ôćĺ        boss_id: Candidate Boss ID
   338Ôćĺ        db_manager: Database manager
   339Ôćĺ
   340Ôćĺ    Returns:
   341Ôćĺ        True if chat window is ready
   342Ôćĺ    """
   343Ôćĺ    encrypt_id = boss_id.replace('zp_', '') if boss_id.startswith('zp_') else boss_id
   344Ôćĺ
   345Ôćĺ    # Get profile URL from database
   346Ôćĺ    profile_url = None
   347Ôćĺ    with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   348Ôćĺ        candidate = session.query(Candidate).filter_by(boss_id=boss_id).first()
   349Ôćĺ        if candidate and candidate.profile_url:
   350Ôćĺ            profile_url = candidate.profile_url
   351Ôćĺ
   352Ôćĺ    # Strategy 1: Navigate to profile and click chat button
   353Ôćĺ    if profile_url:
   354Ôćĺ        try:
   355Ôćĺ            await retry_navigation(page, profile_url, wait_until='domcontentloaded')
   356Ôćĺ            await async_random_delay('page_load')
   357Ôćĺ            await check_captcha(page, report_to_rate_limiter=True)
   358Ôćĺ
   359Ôćĺ            # Look for "šźőňŹ│Š▓čÚÇÜ" button

   369Ôćĺ

   374Ôćĺ        await async_random_delay('page_load')

   377Ôćĺ        chat_button = await _find_chat_button(page)
