   403Ôćĺasync def _find_chat_button(page: Page):
   404Ôćĺ    """Find the chat/communication button on the page."""
   405Ôćĺ    selectors = [
   406Ôćĺ        'button:has-text("ŠÉťš┤óšĽůŔüŐňŹí")',
   407Ôćĺ        'button:has-text("šźőňŹ│Š▓čÚÇÜ")',
   408Ôćĺ        'a:has-text("šźőňŹ│Š▓čÚÇÜ")',
   409Ôćĺ        'button:has-text("ň╝ÇňžőŠ▓čÚÇÜ")',
   410Ôćĺ        'button:has-text("š╗žš╗şŠ▓čÚÇÜ")',
   411Ôćĺ        '[class*="btn-chat"]',
   412Ôćĺ        '[class*="chat-btn"]',
   413Ôćĺ    ]
   414Ôćĺ
   415Ôćĺ    for selector in selectors:
   416Ôćĺ        try:
   417Ôćĺ            element = await page.query_selector(selector)
   418Ôćĺ            if element and await element.is_visible():
   419Ôćĺ                return element
   420Ôćĺ        except Exception:
   421Ôćĺ            continue
   422Ôćĺ
   423Ôćĺ    return None
   424Ôćĺ
   425Ôćĺ
   426Ôćĺasync def _type_and_send_message(page: Page, message: str) -> None:
   427Ôćĺ    """
   428Ôćĺ    Type a message into the chat input and send it.
   429Ôćĺ
   430Ôćĺ    Args:
   431Ôćĺ        page: Playwright page instance
   432Ôćĺ        message: Message text to send
   433Ôćĺ    """
   434Ôćĺ    # Find the message input
   435Ôćĺ    # Recording confirmed: #boss-chat-global-input is the primary chat input (a div element)
   436Ôćĺ    input_selectors = [
   437Ôćĺ        '#boss-chat-global-input',
   438Ôćĺ        '[contenteditable="true"]',
   439Ôćĺ        '[class*="chat-input"] textarea',
   440Ôćĺ        '[class*="input-area"] textarea',
   441Ôćĺ        'textarea[class*="message"]',
   442Ôćĺ        'textarea',
   443Ôćĺ    ]
   444Ôćĺ
   445Ôćĺ    input_element = None
   446Ôćĺ    for selector in input_selectors:
   447Ôćĺ        try:
   448Ôćĺ            element = await page.query_selector(selector)
   449Ôćĺ            if element and await element.is_visible():
   450Ôćĺ                input_element = element
   451Ôćĺ                break
   452Ôćĺ        except Exception:
   453Ôćĺ            continue
   454Ôćĺ
   455Ôćĺ    if not input_element:
   456Ôćĺ        raise SelectorNotFoundError("Chat message input not found")
   457Ôćĺ
   458Ôćĺ    # Click to focus
   459Ôćĺ    await input_element.click()
   460Ôćĺ    await page.wait_for_timeout(300)
   461Ôćĺ
   462Ôćĺ    # Clear any existing content (use Meta+a on macOS, Control+a elsewhere)
   463Ôćĺ    import sys
   464Ôćĺ    select_all_key = "Meta+a" if sys.platform == "darwin" else "Control+a"
   465Ôćĺ    await page.keyboard.press(select_all_key)
   466Ôćĺ    await page.keyboard.press("Backspace")
   467Ôćĺ    await page.wait_for_timeout(200)
   468Ôćĺ
   469Ôćĺ    # Type message with human-like timing
   470Ôćĺ    # For longer messages, use fill() to avoid timeout, then add small delay
   471Ôćĺ    if len(message) > 50:
   472Ôćĺ        await input_element.fill(message)
   473Ôćĺ    else:
   474Ôćĺ        await input_element.type(message, delay=80)
   475Ôćĺ
   476Ôćĺ    await async_random_delay('action')
   477Ôćĺ
   478Ôćĺ    # Find and click send button
   479Ôćĺ    # Recording confirmed: send button contains text "ňĆĹÚÇü" (span inside button)
   480Ôćĺ    send_selectors = [
   481Ôćĺ        'text="ňĆĹÚÇü"',
   482Ôćĺ        'button:has-text("ňĆĹÚÇü")',
   483Ôćĺ        '[class*="btn-send"]',
   484Ôćĺ        '[class*="send-btn"]',
   485Ôćĺ    ]
   486Ôćĺ
   487Ôćĺ    for selector in send_selectors:
   488Ôćĺ        try:
   489Ôćĺ            btn = await page.query_selector(selector)
   490Ôćĺ            if btn and await btn.is_visible():
   491Ôćĺ                await btn.click()
   492Ôćĺ                await page.wait_for_timeout(1000)
   493Ôćĺ                logger.info("Message sent via send button click")
   494Ôćĺ                return
   495Ôćĺ        except Exception:
   496Ôćĺ            continue
   497Ôćĺ
   498Ôćĺ    # Fallback: try pressing Enter to send
   499Ôćĺ    await page.keyboard.press("Enter")
   500Ôćĺ    await page.wait_for_timeout(1000)
   501Ôćĺ    logger.info("Message sent via Enter key")
   502Ôćĺ
   503Ôćĺ
   504Ôćĺdef _save_message_to_db(
   505Ôćĺ    boss_id: str,
   506Ôćĺ    template_name: str,
   507Ôćĺ    content: str,
   508Ôćĺ    status: str,
   509Ôćĺ    db_manager,
   510Ôćĺ) -> None:
   511Ôćĺ    """Save a message record to the database."""
   512Ôćĺ    with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   513Ôćĺ        message = Message(
   514Ôćĺ            candidate_boss_id=boss_id,
   515Ôćĺ            template_name=template_name,
   516Ôćĺ            content=content,
   517Ôćĺ            status=status,
   518Ôćĺ            sent_at=datetime.now(timezone.utc) if status == 'sent' else None,
   519Ôćĺ        )
   520Ôćĺ        session.add(message)
   521Ôćĺ

1Ôćĺ"""Candidate search module for BossšŤ┤Ŕüś.

     7ÔćĺUses page.evaluate() for JavaScript-based DOM extraction rather than
     8ÔćĺCSS selectors for better reliability against page structure changes.
     9Ôćĺ"""
    10Ôćĺ

    30Ôćĺ@dataclass
    31Ôćĺclass CandidateBasic:
    32Ôćĺ    """Basic candidate info extracted from search results."""
    33Ôćĺ    boss_id: str
    34Ôćĺ    name: str
    35Ôćĺ    title: str
    36Ôćĺ    company: str
    37Ôćĺ    location: Optional[str] = None

    42Ôćĺ    _score: int = field(default=0, init=False, repr=False)
    43Ôćĺ
    44Ôćĺ    def __hash__(self):
    45Ôćĺ        return hash(self.boss_id)

    47Ôćĺ    def __eq__(self, other):

    53Ôćĺ# Non-R&D roles to filter out
    54ÔćĺNON_RD_KEYWORDS = {
    55Ôćĺ    "ÚöÇňö«", "ń║žňôüš╗ĆšÉć", "ňŞéňť║", "Ŕ┐ÉŔÉą", "ŔíîŠö┐", "ń║║ń║ő", "Ŕ┤óňŐí",
    56Ôćĺ    "Š│ĽňŐí", "ÚççŔ┤ş", "ň«óŠťŹ", "ňëŹňĆ░", "ňŐęšÉć", "šžśń╣Ž",
    57Ôćĺ}

    60Ôćĺdef _is_non_rd_role(title: str) -> bool:
    61Ôćĺ    """Check if title indicates a non-R&D role."""
    62Ôćĺ    if not title:
    63Ôćĺ        return False
    64Ôćĺ    for keyword in NON_RD_KEYWORDS:
    65Ôćĺ        if keyword in title:
    66Ôćĺ            return True
    67Ôćĺ    return False

    69Ôćĺ
    70Ôćĺdef _generate_boss_id(name: str, company: str) -> str:
    71Ôćĺ    """Generate a fallback Boss ID from name + company hash.
    72Ôćĺ
    73Ôćĺ    Uses SHA-256 with 20 hex chars to reduce collision probability
    74Ôćĺ    compared to MD5 with 12 chars.
    75Ôćĺ    """
    76Ôćĺ    raw = f"{name}_{company}"
    77Ôćĺ    h = hashlib.sha256(raw.encode()).hexdigest()[:20]
    78Ôćĺ    return f"zp_{h}"

    81Ôćĺ# JavaScript extraction function for BossšŤ┤Ŕüś search results page
    82ÔćĺEXTRACT_CANDIDATES_JS = """

   127Ôćĺ

   133Ôćĺ
   134Ôćĺ            // Extract education

   139Ôćĺ
   140Ôćĺ            // Try to extract profile URL and encrypted geek ID
   141Ôćĺ            let profileUrl = '';
   142Ôćĺ            let bossId = '';
   143Ôćĺ
   144Ôćĺ            // Check for links in the card
   145Ôćĺ            const link = card.querySelector('a[href*="/web/geek/"], a[href*="geek"], a[href*="resume"]');
   146Ôćĺ            if (link) {
   147Ôćĺ                profileUrl = link.href;
   148Ôćĺ                // Try to extract encryptGeekId from URL
   149Ôćĺ                const match = profileUrl.match(/\\/web\\/geek\\/([^?/]+)/);
   150Ôćĺ                if (match) {

   154Ôćĺ
   155Ôćĺ            // Fallback: check data attributes
   156Ôćĺ            if (!bossId) {
   157Ôćĺ                const dataId = card.getAttribute('data-geekid') ||

   159Ôćĺ                               card.getAttribute('data-id') ||

   161Ôćĺ                if (dataId) {

   165Ôćĺ
   166Ôćĺ            // Fallback: check card onclick or inner links for IDs
   167Ôćĺ            if (!bossId) {
   168Ôćĺ                const allLinks = card.querySelectorAll('a[href]');
   169Ôćĺ                for (const a of allLinks) {

   195Ôćĺ
   196Ôćĺ    // Strategy 2: If no cards found, try extracting from list items

   239Ôćĺ    return candidates;

   243Ôćĺ
   244Ôćĺasync def search_candidates(
   245Ôćĺ    keywords: List[str],
   246Ôćĺ    location: Optional[str] = None,
   247Ôćĺ    max_pages: int = 1,
   248Ôćĺ    experience: Optional[str] = None,
   249Ôćĺ    education: Optional[str] = None,
   250Ôćĺ    salary: Optional[str] = None,
   251Ôćĺ    browser: Optional[BrowserManager] = None,
   252Ôćĺ    start_page: int = 1,
   253Ôćĺ) -> List[CandidateBasic]:
   254Ôćĺ    """
   255Ôćĺ    Search for candidates on BossšŤ┤Ŕüś.
   256Ôćĺ
   257Ôćĺ    Supports multi-keyword search with deduplication.
   258Ôćĺ
   259Ôćĺ    Args:
   260Ôćĺ        keywords: List of search keywords
   261Ôćĺ        location: Location filter (e.g., "ňîŚń║Č")
   262Ôćĺ        max_pages: Maximum number of pages to scrape per keyword
   263Ôćĺ        experience: Experience filter (e.g., "3-5ň╣┤")
   264Ôćĺ        education: Education filter (e.g., "ŠťČšžĹ")
   265Ôćĺ        salary: Salary filter (e.g., "20-40K")
   266Ôćĺ        browser: Browser manager instance
   267Ôćĺ
   268Ôćĺ    Returns:
   269Ôćĺ        List of CandidateBasic instances
   270Ôćĺ    """
   271Ôćĺ    if browser is None:
   272Ôćĺ        browser = get_browser_manager()
   273Ôćĺ
   274Ôćĺ    page = browser.page
   275Ôćĺ    if not page:
   276Ôćĺ        page = await browser.start()
   277Ôćĺ
   278Ôćĺ    rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()
   279Ôćĺ    db_manager = get_db_manager()
   280Ôćĺ
   281Ôćĺ    all_candidates: List[CandidateBasic] = []
   282Ôćĺ    seen_ids: Set[str] = set()
   283Ôćĺ    seen_dedup_keys: Set[str] = set()
   284Ôćĺ
   285Ôćĺ    for keyword in keywords:
   286Ôćĺ        console.print(f"\n[cyan]Searching for: {keyword}[/cyan]")
   287Ôćĺ
   288Ôćĺ        # Rate limit check
   289Ôćĺ        await async_check_rate_limit('search')
   290Ôćĺ
   291Ôćĺ        try:
   292Ôćĺ            # Navigate to search page
   293Ôćĺ            search_url = _build_search_url(keyword, location, experience, education, salary)
   294Ôćĺ            await retry_navigation(page, search_url, wait_until='domcontentloaded')
   295Ôćĺ            await async_random_delay('page_load')
   296Ôćĺ
   297Ôćĺ            # Check for captcha
   298Ôćĺ            await check_captcha(page, report_to_rate_limiter=True)
   299Ôćĺ
   300Ôćĺ            # Check for quota exhaustion page
   301Ôćĺ            if await _check_quota_exhausted(page):
   302Ôćĺ                console.print("[red]Daily contact quota exhausted. Stopping search.[/red]")
   303Ôćĺ                break
   304Ôćĺ
   305Ôćĺ            # BossšŤ┤Ŕüś uses infinite scroll (auto-load on scroll), no pagination buttons.
   306Ôćĺ            # Scroll multiple rounds to load more candidates.
   307Ôćĺ            # start_page allows resuming from a previous scroll position.
   308Ôćĺ            total_rounds = start_page + max_pages - 1
   309Ôćĺ            for scroll_round in range(start_page, total_rounds + 1):
   310Ôćĺ                console.print(f"  [dim]Scroll round {scroll_round}/{total_rounds}...[/dim]")
   311Ôćĺ
   312Ôćĺ                # Scroll within the content container to trigger auto-load.
   313Ôćĺ                # The page uses an inner scrollable container, not window scroll.
   314Ôćĺ                await _scroll_search_results(page)
   315Ôćĺ                await async_random_delay('scroll')
   316Ôćĺ
   317Ôćĺ            # Extract candidates via JavaScript after all scrolling is done
   318Ôćĺ            raw_candidates = await page.evaluate(EXTRACT_CANDIDATES_JS)
   319Ôćĺ
   320Ôćĺ            if not raw_candidates:
   321Ôćĺ                logger.warning(f"No candidates found for '{keyword}'")
   322Ôćĺ                continue
   323Ôćĺ
   324Ôćĺ            # Process results
   325Ôćĺ            page_count = 0
   326Ôćĺ            for raw in raw_candidates:
   327Ôćĺ                name = raw.get('name', '').strip()
   328Ôćĺ                title = raw.get('title', '').strip()
   329Ôćĺ                company = raw.get('company', '').strip()
   330Ôćĺ
   331Ôćĺ                if not name:
   332Ôćĺ                    continue
   333Ôćĺ
   334Ôćĺ                # Filter non-R&D roles
   335Ôćĺ                if _is_non_rd_role(title):
   336Ôćĺ                    continue
   337Ôćĺ
   338Ôćĺ                # Generate or use boss_id
   339Ôćĺ                boss_id = raw.get('boss_id', '')
   340Ôćĺ                if not boss_id:
   341Ôćĺ                    boss_id = _generate_boss_id(name, company)
   342Ôćĺ
   343Ôćĺ                # Deduplicate
   344Ôćĺ                if boss_id in seen_ids:
   345Ôćĺ                    continue
   346Ôćĺ
   347Ôćĺ                # Also check name+company dedup
   348Ôćĺ                dedup_key = f"{name}_{company}"
   349Ôćĺ                if dedup_key in seen_dedup_keys:
   350Ôćĺ                    continue
   351Ôćĺ
   352Ôćĺ                seen_ids.add(boss_id)
   353Ôćĺ                seen_dedup_keys.add(dedup_key)
   354Ôćĺ
   355Ôćĺ                candidate = CandidateBasic(
   356Ôćĺ                    boss_id=boss_id,
   357Ôćĺ                    name=name,
   358Ôćĺ                    title=title,
   359Ôćĺ                    company=company,
   360Ôćĺ                    location=raw.get('location', ''),
   361Ôćĺ                    salary_expect=raw.get('salary_expect', ''),
   362Ôćĺ                    work_years=raw.get('work_years', ''),
   363Ôćĺ                    education_level=raw.get('education_level', ''),
   364Ôćĺ                    profile_url=raw.get('profile_url', ''),
   365Ôćĺ                )
   366Ôćĺ
   367Ôćĺ                all_candidates.append(candidate)
   368Ôćĺ                page_count += 1
   369Ôćĺ
   370Ôćĺ            # Log action
   371Ôćĺ            rate_limiter.log_action('search', {
   372Ôćĺ                'keyword': keyword,
   373Ôćĺ                'scroll_rounds': max_pages,
   374Ôćĺ                'results': page_count,
   375Ôćĺ            })
   376Ôćĺ
   377Ôćĺ            console.print(f"  [green]Found {page_count} candidates for '{keyword}'[/green]")
   378Ôćĺ
   379Ôćĺ            # Save search history
   380Ôćĺ            with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   381Ôćĺ                history = SearchHistory(
   382Ôćĺ                    criteria={
   383Ôćĺ                        'keywords': keyword,
   384Ôćĺ                        'location': location,
   385Ôćĺ                        'scroll_rounds': max_pages,
   386Ôćĺ                        'experience': experience,
   387Ôćĺ                        'education': education,
   388Ôćĺ                        'salary': salary,
   389Ôćĺ                    },
   390Ôćĺ                    results_count=page_count,
   391Ôćĺ                )
   392Ôćĺ                session.add(history)
   393Ôćĺ
   394Ôćĺ        except Exception as e:
   395Ôćĺ            logger.error(f"Error searching for '{keyword}': {e}")
   396Ôćĺ            console.print(f"  [red]Error: {e}[/red]")
   397Ôćĺ            rate_limiter.report_error()
   398Ôćĺ
   399Ôćĺ    # Save candidates to database
   400Ôćĺ    _save_candidates_to_db(all_candidates, keywords, db_manager)
   401Ôćĺ
   402Ôćĺ    # Display results summary
   403Ôćĺ    _display_results(all_candidates, keywords)
   404Ôćĺ
   405Ôćĺ    return all_candidates
   406Ôćĺ
   407Ôćĺ
   408Ôćĺdef _build_search_url(
   409Ôćĺ    keyword: str,
   410Ôćĺ    location: Optional[str] = None,
   411Ôćĺ    experience: Optional[str] = None,
   412Ôćĺ    education: Optional[str] = None,
   413Ôćĺ    salary: Optional[str] = None,
   414Ôćĺ) -> str:
   415Ôćĺ    """Build BossšŤ┤Ŕüś search URL with query parameters.
   416Ôćĺ
   417Ôćĺ    Note: BossšŤ┤Ŕüś search uses infinite scroll, not URL-based pagination.
   418Ôćĺ    """
   419Ôćĺ    base_url = "https://www.zhipin.com/web/chat/search"
   420Ôćĺ
   421Ôćĺ    params = {"query": keyword}
   422Ôćĺ
   423Ôćĺ    if location:
   424Ôćĺ        params["city"] = location
   425Ôćĺ
   426Ôćĺ    if experience:
   427Ôćĺ        params["experience"] = experience
   428Ôćĺ
   429Ôćĺ    if education:
   430Ôćĺ        params["degree"] = education
   431Ôćĺ
   432Ôćĺ    if salary:
   433Ôćĺ        params["salary"] = salary
   434Ôćĺ
   435Ôćĺ    url = f"{base_url}?{urlencode(params)}"
   436Ôćĺ    return url
   437Ôćĺ
   438Ôćĺ
   439Ôćĺasync def _scroll_search_results(page: Page) -> None:
   440Ôćĺ    """
   441Ôćĺ    Scroll the search results container to trigger auto-load.
   442Ôćĺ
   443Ôćĺ    BossšŤ┤Ŕüś uses infinite scroll within an inner container,
   444Ôćĺ    not window-level scroll. We scroll the container or fall back
   445Ôćĺ    to keyboard-based scrolling.
   446Ôćĺ    """
   447Ôćĺ    # Try scrolling within the candidate list container
   448Ôćĺ    scrolled = await page.evaluate("""
   449Ôćĺ        () => {
   450Ôćĺ            // Find the scrollable container for search results
   451Ôćĺ            const containers = document.querySelectorAll(
   452Ôćĺ                '[class*="recommend-list"], [class*="geek-list"], [class*="search-result"],
   453Ôćĺ                 [class*="candidate-list"], [class*="card-list"], [class*="scroll-container"]'
   454Ôćĺ            );
   455Ôćĺ            for (const c of containers) {
   456Ôćĺ                if (c.scrollHeight > c.clientHeight) {
   457Ôćĺ                    c.scrollTop += 600;
   458Ôćĺ                    return true;
   459Ôćĺ                }
   460Ôćĺ            }
   461Ôćĺ
   462Ôćĺ            // Fallback: find any large scrollable div
   463Ôćĺ            const allDivs = document.querySelectorAll('div');
   464Ôćĺ            for (const d of allDivs) {
   465Ôćĺ                if (d.scrollHeight > d.clientHeight + 100 && d.clientHeight > 300) {
   466Ôćĺ                    d.scrollTop += 600;
   467Ôćĺ                    return true;
   468Ôćĺ                }
   469Ôćĺ            }
   470Ôćĺ
   471Ôćĺ            return false;
   472Ôćĺ        }
   473Ôćĺ    """)
   474Ôćĺ
   475Ôćĺ    if not scrolled:
   476Ôćĺ        # Final fallback: use keyboard Page Down
   477Ôćĺ        await page.keyboard.press('PageDown')
   478Ôćĺ        await page.wait_for_timeout(500)
   479Ôćĺ        await page.keyboard.press('PageDown')
   480Ôćĺ
   481Ôćĺ    # Wait for new content to load
   482Ôćĺ    await page.wait_for_timeout(1500)
   483Ôćĺ
   484Ôćĺ
   485Ôćĺasync def _check_quota_exhausted(page: Page) -> bool:
   486Ôćĺ    """Check if BossšŤ┤Ŕüś shows a quota exhaustion page."""
   487Ôćĺ    try:
   488Ôćĺ        result = await page.evaluate("""
   489Ôćĺ            () => {
   490Ôćĺ                const bodyText = document.body ? document.body.innerText : '';
   491Ôćĺ                const quotaIndicators = [
   492Ôćĺ                    'ń╗ŐŠŚąŠ▓čÚÇÜŠČíŠĽ░ňĚ▓šöĘň«î',
   493Ôćĺ                    'Š▓čÚÇÜŠČíŠĽ░ňĚ▓ŔżżńŞŐÚÖÉ',
   494Ôćĺ                    'ń╗ŐŠŚąŔüöš│╗ń║║ŠĽ░ňĚ▓Š╗í',
   495Ôćĺ                    'ňŹçš║žń╝ÜňĹś',
   496Ôćĺ                    'ň╝ÇÚÇÜń╝ÜňĹśń║źŠŤ┤ňĄÜŠ▓čÚÇÜ'
   497Ôćĺ                ];
   498Ôćĺ                for (const indicator of quotaIndicators) {
   499Ôćĺ                    if (bodyText.includes(indicator)) {
   500Ôćĺ                        return true;
   501Ôćĺ                    }
   502Ôćĺ                }
   503Ôćĺ                return false;
   504Ôćĺ            }
   505Ôćĺ        """)
   506Ôćĺ        return result
   507Ôćĺ    except Exception:
   508Ôćĺ        return False
   509Ôćĺ
   510Ôćĺ
   511Ôćĺdef _save_candidates_to_db(
   512Ôćĺ    candidates: List[CandidateBasic],
   513Ôćĺ    keywords: List[str],
   514Ôćĺ    db_manager,
   515Ôćĺ) -> None:
   516Ôćĺ    """Save or update candidates in the database."""
   517Ôćĺ    source = ', '.join(keywords)
   518Ôćĺ
   519Ôćĺ    with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   520Ôćĺ        # Batch-fetch existing candidates to avoid N+1 queries
   521Ôćĺ        boss_ids = [c.boss_id for c in candidates]
   522Ôćĺ        existing_map = {}
   523Ôćĺ        # Query in chunks of 500 to avoid SQLite variable limit
   524Ôćĺ        for i in range(0, len(boss_ids), 500):
   525Ôćĺ            chunk = boss_ids[i:i + 500]
   526Ôćĺ            rows = session.query(Candidate).filter(
   527Ôćĺ                Candidate.boss_id.in_(chunk)
   528Ôćĺ            ).all()
   529Ôćĺ            for row in rows:
   530Ôćĺ                existing_map[row.boss_id] = row
   531Ôćĺ
   532Ôćĺ        for c in candidates:
   533Ôćĺ            existing = existing_map.get(c.boss_id)
   534Ôćĺ            if existing:
   535Ôćĺ                existing.name = c.name or existing.name
   536Ôćĺ                existing.title = c.title or existing.title
   537Ôćĺ                existing.company = c.company or existing.company
   538Ôćĺ                existing.location = c.location or existing.location
   539Ôćĺ                existing.salary_expect = c.salary_expect or existing.salary_expect
   540Ôćĺ                existing.work_years = c.work_years or existing.work_years
   541Ôćĺ                existing.education_level = c.education_level or existing.education_level
   542Ôćĺ                existing.profile_url = c.profile_url or existing.profile_url
   543Ôćĺ                if source and source not in (existing.source_search or ''):
   544Ôćĺ                    existing.source_search = f"{existing.source_search or ''}, {source}".strip(', ')
   545Ôćĺ            else:
   546Ôćĺ                new_candidate = Candidate(
   547Ôćĺ                    boss_id=c.boss_id,
   548Ôćĺ                    name=c.name,
   549Ôćĺ                    title=c.title,
   550Ôćĺ                    company=c.company,
   551Ôćĺ                    location=c.location,
   552Ôćĺ                    salary_expect=c.salary_expect,
   553Ôćĺ                    work_years=c.work_years,
   554Ôćĺ                    education_level=c.education_level,
   555Ôćĺ                    profile_url=c.profile_url,
   556Ôćĺ                    source_search=source,
   557Ôćĺ                )
   558Ôćĺ                session.add(new_candidate)
   559Ôćĺ
   560Ôćĺ
   561Ôćĺdef _display_results(candidates: List[CandidateBasic], keywords: List[str]) -> None:
   562Ôćĺ    """Display search results in a Rich table."""
   563Ôćĺ    if not candidates:
   564Ôćĺ        console.print("[yellow]No candidates found.[/yellow]")
   565Ôćĺ        return
   566Ôćĺ
   567Ôćĺ    table = Table(title=f"Search Results ({len(candidates)} candidates)")
   568Ôćĺ    table.add_column("Boss ID", style="dim", max_width=20)
   569Ôćĺ    table.add_column("Name", style="bold")
   570Ôćĺ    table.add_column("Title")
   571Ôćĺ    table.add_column("Company")
   572Ôćĺ    table.add_column("Location")
   573Ôćĺ    table.add_column("Salary Expect")
   574Ôćĺ    table.add_column("Experience")
   575Ôćĺ    table.add_column("Education")
   576Ôćĺ
   577Ôćĺ    for c in candidates[:50]:  # Show max 50 in table
   578Ôćĺ        table.add_row(
   579Ôćĺ            c.boss_id[:20],
   580Ôćĺ            c.name,
   581Ôćĺ            c.title[:30] if c.title else "",
   582Ôćĺ            c.company[:20] if c.company else "",
   583Ôćĺ            c.location or "",
   584Ôćĺ            c.salary_expect or "",
   585Ôćĺ            c.work_years or "",
   586Ôćĺ            c.education_level or "",
   587Ôćĺ        )
   588Ôćĺ
   589Ôćĺ    console.print(table)
   590Ôćĺ
   591Ôćĺ    if len(candidates) > 50:
   592Ôćĺ        console.print(f"[dim]...and {len(candidates) - 50} more candidates[/dim]")
   593Ôćĺ

1Ôćĺ"""Input validation utilities."""
     2Ôćĺ
     3Ôćĺimport re
     4Ôćĺfrom typing import Dict, Any
     5Ôćĺ
     6Ôćĺfrom src.exceptions.errors import ValidationError
     7Ôćĺ
     8Ôćĺ
     9Ôćĺdef validate_boss_id(boss_id: str) -> str:
    10Ôćĺ    """Validate BossšŤ┤Ŕüś candidate ID format.
    11Ôćĺ
    12Ôćĺ    BossšŤ┤Ŕüś uses encrypted IDs (encryptGeekId), stored as zp_{id}.
    13Ôćĺ
    14Ôćĺ    Args:
    15Ôćĺ        boss_id: BossšŤ┤Ŕüś candidate ID to validate
    16Ôćĺ
    17Ôćĺ    Returns:
    18Ôćĺ        Validated and cleaned ID
    19Ôćĺ
    20Ôćĺ    Raises:
    21Ôćĺ        ValidationError: If ID format is invalid
    22Ôćĺ    """
    23Ôćĺ    if not boss_id:
    24Ôćĺ        raise ValidationError("Boss ID cannot be empty")
    25Ôćĺ
    26Ôćĺ    boss_id = str(boss_id).strip()
    27Ôćĺ
    28Ôćĺ    if not re.match(r'^[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+$', boss_id):
    29Ôćĺ        raise ValidationError(f"Invalid Boss ID format: {boss_id}")
    30Ôćĺ
    31Ôćĺ    return boss_id
    32Ôćĺ
    33Ôćĺ
    34Ôćĺdef validate_keywords(keywords: str) -> str:
    35Ôćĺ    """Validate search keywords."""
    36Ôćĺ    if not keywords or not keywords.strip():
    37Ôćĺ        raise ValidationError("Search keywords cannot be empty")
    38Ôćĺ
    39Ôćĺ    keywords = keywords.strip()
    40Ôćĺ
    41Ôćĺ    if len(keywords) < 2:
    42Ôćĺ        raise ValidationError("Search keywords must be at least 2 characters")
    43Ôćĺ
    44Ôćĺ    if len(keywords) > 200:
    45Ôćĺ        raise ValidationError("Search keywords cannot exceed 200 characters")
    46Ôćĺ
    47Ôćĺ    return keywords
    48Ôćĺ
    49Ôćĺ
    50Ôćĺdef validate_template_variables(template: Dict[str, Any], variables: Dict[str, str]) -> None:
    51Ôćĺ    """Validate that all required template variables are provided."""
    52Ôćĺ    required_vars = template.get('variables', [])
    53Ôćĺ    provided_vars = set(variables.keys())
    54Ôćĺ    required_set = set(required_vars)
    55Ôćĺ
    56Ôćĺ    missing_vars = required_set - provided_vars
    57Ôćĺ
    58Ôćĺ    if missing_vars:
    59Ôćĺ        raise ValidationError(
    60Ôćĺ            f"Missing required template variables: {', '.join(missing_vars)}"
    61Ôćĺ        )
    62Ôćĺ

1Ôćĺ"""Configuration loader and manager."""
     2Ôćĺ
     3Ôćĺimport json
     4Ôćĺfrom pathlib import Path
     5Ôćĺfrom typing import Any, Dict
     6Ôćĺ
     7Ôćĺfrom loguru import logger
     8Ôćĺ
     9Ôćĺfrom src.exceptions.errors import ConfigurationError
    10Ôćĺ
    11Ôćĺ
    12Ôćĺclass Config:
    13Ôćĺ    """Configuration manager for Boss Assistant."""
    14Ôćĺ
    15Ôćĺ    def __init__(self, config_dir: str = None):
    16Ôćĺ        if config_dir is None:
    17Ôćĺ            # Use project root (where this source file lives) to find config/
    18Ôćĺ            config_dir = str(Path(__file__).resolve().parent.parent.parent / "config")
    19Ôćĺ        self.config_dir = Path(config_dir)
    20Ôćĺ        self._settings: Dict[str, Any] = {}
    21Ôćĺ        self._selectors: Dict[str, Any] = {}
    22Ôćĺ        self._message_templates: Dict[str, Any] = {}
    23Ôćĺ
    24Ôćĺ        self._load_all()
    25Ôćĺ
    26Ôćĺ    def _load_json(self, filename: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:
    27Ôćĺ        filepath = self.config_dir / filename
    28Ôćĺ        try:
    29Ôćĺ            with open(filepath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    30Ôćĺ                return json.load(f)
    31Ôćĺ        except FileNotFoundError:
    32Ôćĺ            raise ConfigurationError(f"Configuration file not found: {filepath}")
    33Ôćĺ        except json.JSONDecodeError as e:
    34Ôćĺ            raise ConfigurationError(f"Invalid JSON in {filepath}: {e}")
    35Ôćĺ
    36Ôćĺ    def _load_all(self):
    37Ôćĺ        logger.info("Loading configuration files...")
    38Ôćĺ        self._settings = self._load_json("settings.json")
    39Ôćĺ        self._selectors = self._load_json("selectors.json")
    40Ôćĺ        self._message_templates = self._load_json("message_templates.json")
    41Ôćĺ        logger.info("Configuration loaded successfully")
    42Ôćĺ
    43Ôćĺ    _MISSING = object()
    44Ôćĺ
    45Ôćĺ    def get(self, key: str, default: Any = None) -> Any:
    46Ôćĺ        """Get setting by dot-notation key.
    47Ôćĺ
    48Ôćĺ        Distinguishes between a key not found and a key explicitly set to null.
    49Ôćĺ        """
    50Ôćĺ        keys = key.split('.')
    51Ôćĺ        value = self._settings
    52Ôćĺ
    53Ôćĺ        for k in keys:
    54Ôćĺ            if isinstance(value, dict):
    55Ôćĺ                value = value.get(k, self._MISSING)
    56Ôćĺ                if value is self._MISSING:
    57Ôćĺ                    return default
    58Ôćĺ            else:
    59Ôćĺ                return default
    60Ôćĺ
    61Ôćĺ        return value
    62Ôćĺ
    63Ôćĺ    def get_selector(self, selector_path: str) -> str:
    64Ôćĺ        """Get selector by dot-notation path."""
    65Ôćĺ        keys = selector_path.split('.')
    66Ôćĺ        value = self._selectors.get('selectors', {})
    67Ôćĺ
    68Ôćĺ        for k in keys:
    69Ôćĺ            if isinstance(value, dict):
    70Ôćĺ                value = value.get(k)
    71Ôćĺ                if value is None:
    72Ôćĺ                    raise ConfigurationError(f"Selector not found: {selector_path}")
    73Ôćĺ            else:
    74Ôćĺ                raise ConfigurationError(f"Invalid selector path: {selector_path}")
    75Ôćĺ
    76Ôćĺ        return value
    77Ôćĺ
    78Ôćĺ    def get_template(self, template_name: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:
    79Ôćĺ        template = self._message_templates.get(template_name)
    80Ôćĺ        if template is None:
    81Ôćĺ            raise ConfigurationError(f"Message template not found: {template_name}")
    82Ôćĺ        return template
    83Ôćĺ
    84Ôćĺ    def list_templates(self) -> list:
    85Ôćĺ        return list(self._message_templates.keys())
    86Ôćĺ
    87Ôćĺ
    88Ôćĺ_config_instance = None
    89Ôćĺ
    90Ôćĺ
    91Ôćĺdef get_config() -> Config:
    92Ôćĺ    global _config_instance
    93Ôćĺ    if _config_instance is None:
    94Ôćĺ        _config_instance = Config()
    95Ôćĺ    return _config_instance
    96Ôćĺ
    97Ôćĺ
    98Ôćĺdef reset_config() -> None:
    99Ôćĺ    """Reset global config instance (for testing)."""
   100Ôćĺ    global _config_instance
   101Ôćĺ    _config_instance = None
   102Ôćĺ

1Ôćĺ"""Rate limiter for preventing account bans."""
     2Ôćĺ
     3Ôćĺimport asyncio
     4Ôćĺfrom datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone
     5Ôćĺfrom typing import Tuple, Optional
     6Ôćĺ
     7Ôćĺfrom loguru import logger
     8Ôćĺfrom sqlalchemy import func
     9Ôćĺ
    10Ôćĺfrom src.models.database import ActionLog, get_db_manager, DatabaseManager
    11Ôćĺfrom src.utils.config import get_config, Config
    12Ôćĺfrom src.exceptions.errors import RateLimitExceededError
    13Ôćĺ
    14Ôćĺ
    15Ôćĺclass RateLimiter:
    16Ôćĺ    """Rate limiter for controlling action frequency.
    17Ôćĺ
    18Ôćĺ    Supports adaptive throttling: when captchas or errors are reported,
    19Ôćĺ    limits are temporarily tightened to reduce detection risk.
    20Ôćĺ    """
    21Ôćĺ
    22Ôćĺ    def __init__(self, config: Optional[Config] = None, db_manager: Optional[DatabaseManager] = None):
    23Ôćĺ        self.config = config or get_config()
    24Ôćĺ        self.db_manager = db_manager or get_db_manager()
    25Ôćĺ
    26Ôćĺ        self._throttle_factor: float = 1.0
    27Ôćĺ        self._captcha_timestamps: list = []
    28Ôćĺ        self._error_timestamps: list = []
    29Ôćĺ        self._pruned: bool = False
    30Ôćĺ
    31Ôćĺ    def report_captcha(self) -> None:
    32Ôćĺ        now = datetime.now(timezone.utc)
    33Ôćĺ        self._captcha_timestamps.append(now)
    34Ôćĺ        cutoff = now - timedelta(minutes=30)
    35Ôćĺ        self._captcha_timestamps = [t for t in self._captcha_timestamps if t >= cutoff]
    36Ôćĺ        self._update_throttle_factor()
    37Ôćĺ
    38Ôćĺ    def report_error(self) -> None:
    39Ôćĺ        """Report an error to adaptive throttling (e.g. page load failure, selector not found)."""
    40Ôćĺ        now = datetime.now(timezone.utc)
    41Ôćĺ        self._error_timestamps.append(now)
    42Ôćĺ        cutoff = now - timedelta(minutes=30)
    43Ôćĺ        self._error_timestamps = [t for t in self._error_timestamps if t >= cutoff]
    44Ôćĺ        self._update_throttle_factor()
    45Ôćĺ
    46Ôćĺ    def _update_throttle_factor(self) -> None:
    47Ôćĺ        captcha_count = len(self._captcha_timestamps)
    48Ôćĺ        error_count = len(self._error_timestamps)
    49Ôćĺ        combined = captcha_count + error_count * 0.5
    50Ôćĺ
    51Ôćĺ        if combined >= 3:
    52Ôćĺ            self._throttle_factor = 0.3
    53Ôćĺ        elif combined >= 2:
    54Ôćĺ            self._throttle_factor = 0.5
    55Ôćĺ        elif combined >= 1:
    56Ôćĺ            self._throttle_factor = 0.7
    57Ôćĺ        else:
    58Ôćĺ            self._throttle_factor = 1.0
    59Ôćĺ
    60Ôćĺ        if self._throttle_factor < 1.0:
    61Ôćĺ            logger.warning(
    62Ôćĺ                f"Adaptive throttle active: factor={self._throttle_factor:.1f} "
    63Ôćĺ                f"(captchas={captcha_count}, errors={error_count} in last 30min)"
    64Ôćĺ            )
    65Ôćĺ
    66Ôćĺ    def _refresh_throttle(self) -> None:
    67Ôćĺ        cutoff = datetime.now(timezone.utc) - timedelta(minutes=30)
    68Ôćĺ        self._captcha_timestamps = [t for t in self._captcha_timestamps if t >= cutoff]
    69Ôćĺ        self._error_timestamps = [t for t in self._error_timestamps if t >= cutoff]
    70Ôćĺ        self._update_throttle_factor()
    71Ôćĺ
    72Ôćĺ    @property
    73Ôćĺ    def throttle_factor(self) -> float:
    74Ôćĺ        return self._throttle_factor
    75Ôćĺ
    76Ôćĺ    def _get_limits(self, action_type: str) -> Tuple[int, int, int]:
    77Ôćĺ        action_map = {
    78Ôćĺ            'search': ('search_per_hour', 'search_per_day'),
    79Ôćĺ            'view_profile': ('profile_view_per_hour', 'profile_view_per_day'),
    80Ôćĺ            'send_message': ('message_per_hour', 'message_per_day'),
    81Ôćĺ        }
    82Ôćĺ
    83Ôćĺ        if action_type not in action_map:
    84Ôćĺ            raise ValueError(f"Unknown action type: {action_type}")
    85Ôćĺ
    86Ôćĺ        hour_key, day_key = action_map[action_type]
    87Ôćĺ
    88Ôćĺ        per_hour = self.config.get(f'rate_limits.{hour_key}', 20)
    89Ôćĺ        per_day = self.config.get(f'rate_limits.{day_key}', 100)
    90Ôćĺ        min_interval = self.config.get('rate_limits.min_interval_seconds', 35)
    91Ôćĺ
    92Ôćĺ        per_hour = max(1, int(per_hour * self._throttle_factor))
    93Ôćĺ        per_day = max(1, int(per_day * self._throttle_factor))
    94Ôćĺ        if self._throttle_factor < 1.0:
    95Ôćĺ            min_interval = int(min_interval / self._throttle_factor)
    96Ôćĺ
    97Ôćĺ        return per_hour, per_day, min_interval
    98Ôćĺ
    99Ôćĺ    def _count_actions(self, action_type: str, since: datetime) -> int:
   100Ôćĺ        with self.db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   101Ôćĺ            count = session.query(func.count(ActionLog.id)).filter(
   102Ôćĺ                ActionLog.action_type == action_type,
   103Ôćĺ                ActionLog.timestamp >= since
   104Ôćĺ            ).scalar()
   105Ôćĺ            return count or 0
   106Ôćĺ
   107Ôćĺ    def _get_last_action_time(self, action_type: Optional[str] = None) -> Optional[datetime]:
   108Ôćĺ        with self.db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   109Ôćĺ            query = session.query(func.max(ActionLog.timestamp))
   110Ôćĺ            if action_type:
   111Ôćĺ                query = query.filter(ActionLog.action_type == action_type)
   112Ôćĺ            last_time = query.scalar()
   113Ôćĺ            return last_time
   114Ôćĺ
   115Ôćĺ    def check_rate_limit(self, action_type: str) -> None:
   116Ôćĺ        if not self._pruned:
   117Ôćĺ            self.prune_old_entries()
   118Ôćĺ            self._pruned = True
   119Ôćĺ
   120Ôćĺ        self._refresh_throttle()
   121Ôćĺ        per_hour, per_day, min_interval = self._get_limits(action_type)
   122Ôćĺ
   123Ôćĺ        now = datetime.now(timezone.utc)
   124Ôćĺ        one_hour_ago = now - timedelta(hours=1)
   125Ôćĺ        one_day_ago = now - timedelta(days=1)
   126Ôćĺ
   127Ôćĺ        hourly_count = self._count_actions(action_type, one_hour_ago)
   128Ôćĺ        if hourly_count >= per_hour:
   129Ôćĺ            with self.db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   130Ôćĺ                oldest_in_window = session.query(ActionLog.timestamp).filter(
   131Ôćĺ                    ActionLog.action_type == action_type,
   132Ôćĺ                    ActionLog.timestamp >= one_hour_ago
   133Ôćĺ                ).order_by(ActionLog.timestamp.asc()).first()
   134Ôćĺ
   135Ôćĺ                if oldest_in_window:
   136Ôćĺ                    wait_until = oldest_in_window[0] + timedelta(hours=1)
   137Ôćĺ                    wait_seconds = max(1, int((wait_until - now).total_seconds()))
   138Ôćĺ                else:
   139Ôćĺ                    wait_seconds = 3600
   140Ôćĺ
   141Ôćĺ            raise RateLimitExceededError(
   142Ôćĺ                action_type=action_type,
   143Ôćĺ                wait_time=wait_seconds,
   144Ôćĺ                message=f"Hourly rate limit exceeded for {action_type}. "
   145Ôćĺ                        f"Limit: {per_hour}/hour. Wait {wait_seconds // 60} minutes."
   146Ôćĺ            )
   147Ôćĺ
   148Ôćĺ        daily_count = self._count_actions(action_type, one_day_ago)
   149Ôćĺ        if daily_count >= per_day:
   150Ôćĺ            with self.db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   151Ôćĺ                oldest_in_window = session.query(ActionLog.timestamp).filter(
   152Ôćĺ                    ActionLog.action_type == action_type,
   153Ôćĺ                    ActionLog.timestamp >= one_day_ago
   154Ôćĺ                ).order_by(ActionLog.timestamp.asc()).first()
   155Ôćĺ
   156Ôćĺ                if oldest_in_window:
   157Ôćĺ                    wait_until = oldest_in_window[0] + timedelta(days=1)
   158Ôćĺ                    wait_seconds = max(1, int((wait_until - now).total_seconds()))
   159Ôćĺ                else:
   160Ôćĺ                    wait_seconds = 86400
   161Ôćĺ
   162Ôćĺ            raise RateLimitExceededError(
   163Ôćĺ                action_type=action_type,
   164Ôćĺ                wait_time=wait_seconds,
   165Ôćĺ                message=f"Daily rate limit exceeded for {action_type}. "
   166Ôćĺ                        f"Limit: {per_day}/day. Wait {wait_seconds // 3600} hours."
   167Ôćĺ            )
   168Ôćĺ
   169Ôćĺ        last_action = self._get_last_action_time(action_type=action_type)
   170Ôćĺ        if last_action:
   171Ôćĺ            elapsed = (now - last_action).total_seconds()
   172Ôćĺ            if elapsed < min_interval:
   173Ôćĺ                wait_seconds = max(1, int(min_interval - elapsed))
   174Ôćĺ                raise RateLimitExceededError(
   175Ôćĺ                    action_type=action_type,
   176Ôćĺ                    wait_time=wait_seconds,
   177Ôćĺ                    message=f"Minimum interval not met for {action_type}. Wait {wait_seconds} seconds."
   178Ôćĺ                )
   179Ôćĺ
   180Ôćĺ        logger.debug(f"Rate limit check passed for {action_type}")
   181Ôćĺ
   182Ôćĺ    def log_action(self, action_type: str, details: Optional[dict] = None) -> None:
   183Ôćĺ        with self.db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   184Ôćĺ            action_log = ActionLog(
   185Ôćĺ                action_type=action_type,
   186Ôćĺ                timestamp=datetime.now(timezone.utc),
   187Ôćĺ                details=details or {}
   188Ôćĺ            )
   189Ôćĺ            session.add(action_log)
   190Ôćĺ        logger.debug(f"Logged action: {action_type}")
   191Ôćĺ
   192Ôćĺ    def prune_old_entries(self, retention_hours: int = 48) -> int:
   193Ôćĺ        cutoff = datetime.now(timezone.utc) - timedelta(hours=retention_hours)
   194Ôćĺ        try:
   195Ôćĺ            with self.db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   196Ôćĺ                count = session.query(ActionLog).filter(
   197Ôćĺ                    ActionLog.timestamp < cutoff
   198Ôćĺ                ).delete()
   199Ôćĺ                logger.debug(f"Pruned {count} old ActionLog entries (older than {retention_hours}h)")
   200Ôćĺ                return count
   201Ôćĺ        except Exception as e:
   202Ôćĺ            logger.error(f"Failed to prune ActionLog entries: {e}")
   203Ôćĺ            return 0
   204Ôćĺ
   205Ôćĺ    def get_quota_status(self, action_type: str) -> dict:
   206Ôćĺ        per_hour, per_day, _ = self._get_limits(action_type)
   207Ôćĺ
   208Ôćĺ        now = datetime.now(timezone.utc)
   209Ôćĺ        one_hour_ago = now - timedelta(hours=1)
   210Ôćĺ        one_day_ago = now - timedelta(days=1)
   211Ôćĺ
   212Ôćĺ        hourly_used = self._count_actions(action_type, one_hour_ago)
   213Ôćĺ        daily_used = self._count_actions(action_type, one_day_ago)
   214Ôćĺ
   215Ôćĺ        return {
   216Ôćĺ            'action_type': action_type,
   217Ôćĺ            'hourly': {
   218Ôćĺ                'used': hourly_used,
   219Ôćĺ                'limit': per_hour,
   220Ôćĺ                'remaining': max(0, per_hour - hourly_used)
   221Ôćĺ            },
   222Ôćĺ            'daily': {
   223Ôćĺ                'used': daily_used,
   224Ôćĺ                'limit': per_day,
   225Ôćĺ                'remaining': max(0, per_day - daily_used)
   226Ôćĺ            }
   227Ôćĺ        }
   228Ôćĺ
   229Ôćĺ
   230Ôćĺasync def async_check_rate_limit(
   231Ôćĺ    action_type: str,
   232Ôćĺ    max_retries: int = 60,
   233Ôćĺ    max_total_wait: int = 1800,
   234Ôćĺ) -> None:
   235Ôćĺ    """Check rate limit, waiting through violations until the action is allowed.
   236Ôćĺ
   237Ôćĺ    Raises RateLimitExceededError if still blocked after max_retries attempts
   238Ôćĺ    or max_total_wait seconds (prevents hanging for hours on daily limits).
   239Ôćĺ    """
   240Ôćĺ    import time
   241Ôćĺ    rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()
   242Ôćĺ    start = time.monotonic()
   243Ôćĺ    for attempt in range(max_retries):
   244Ôćĺ        try:
   245Ôćĺ            rate_limiter.check_rate_limit(action_type)
   246Ôćĺ            return
   247Ôćĺ        except RateLimitExceededError as e:
   248Ôćĺ            elapsed = time.monotonic() - start
   249Ôćĺ            if attempt >= max_retries - 1 or elapsed + e.wait_time > max_total_wait:
   250Ôćĺ                raise
   251Ôćĺ            wait = e.wait_time + 1  # +1s buffer
   252Ôćĺ            logger.info(
   253Ôćĺ                f"Rate limit hit: {e}. Waiting {wait}s before retrying "
   254Ôćĺ                f"(attempt {attempt + 1}/{max_retries}, elapsed {elapsed:.0f}s)..."
   255Ôćĺ            )
   256Ôćĺ            await asyncio.sleep(wait)
   257Ôćĺ
   258Ôćĺ
   259Ôćĺ_rate_limiter = None
   260Ôćĺ
   261Ôćĺ
   262Ôćĺdef get_rate_limiter() -> RateLimiter:
   263Ôćĺ    global _rate_limiter
   264Ôćĺ    if _rate_limiter is None:
   265Ôćĺ        _rate_limiter = RateLimiter()
   266Ôćĺ    return _rate_limiter
   267Ôćĺ
   268Ôćĺ
   269Ôćĺdef reset_rate_limiter() -> None:
   270Ôćĺ    """Reset global rate limiter instance (for testing)."""
   271Ôćĺ    global _rate_limiter
   272Ôćĺ    _rate_limiter = None
   273Ôćĺ

1Ôćĺ"""Random delay generators for human-like behavior simulation."""
     2Ôćĺ
     3Ôćĺimport math
     4Ôćĺimport random
     5Ôćĺimport asyncio
     6Ôćĺimport time
     7Ôćĺfrom loguru import logger
     8Ôćĺfrom src.utils.config import get_config
     9Ôćĺ
    10Ôćĺ
    11Ôćĺ_session_start: float = time.monotonic()
    12Ôćĺ_action_count: int = 0
    13Ôćĺ
    14Ôćĺ
    15Ôćĺdef reset_session():
    16Ôćĺ    global _session_start, _action_count
    17Ôćĺ    _session_start = time.monotonic()
    18Ôćĺ    _action_count = 0
    19Ôćĺ
    20Ôćĺ
    21Ôćĺdef _lognormal_delay(min_val: float, max_val: float) -> float:
    22Ôćĺ    mid = (min_val + max_val) / 2
    23Ôćĺ    mu = math.log(mid)
    24Ôćĺ    sigma = 0.4
    25Ôćĺ    delay = random.lognormvariate(mu, sigma)
    26Ôćĺ    return max(min_val, min(delay, max_val * 1.5))
    27Ôćĺ
    28Ôćĺ
    29Ôćĺdef _fatigue_multiplier() -> float:
    30Ôćĺ    elapsed_minutes = (time.monotonic() - _session_start) / 60.0
    31Ôćĺ    if elapsed_minutes < 10:
    32Ôćĺ        return 1.0
    33Ôćĺ    factor = 1.0 + 0.006 * min(elapsed_minutes - 10, 100)
    34Ôćĺ    return min(factor, 1.6)
    35Ôćĺ
    36Ôćĺ
    37Ôćĺdef _maybe_distraction_pause() -> float:
    38Ôćĺ    global _action_count
    39Ôćĺ    _action_count += 1
    40Ôćĺ    if _action_count < 5:
    41Ôćĺ        return 0.0
    42Ôćĺ    if random.random() < 0.03:
    43Ôćĺ        pause = random.uniform(5.0, 30.0)
    44Ôćĺ        logger.debug(f"Simulating distraction pause: {pause:.1f}s")
    45Ôćĺ        return pause
    46Ôćĺ    return 0.0
    47Ôćĺ
    48Ôćĺ
    49Ôćĺdef _time_of_day_multiplier() -> float:
    50Ôćĺ    import datetime
    51Ôćĺ    hour = datetime.datetime.now().hour
    52Ôćĺ    if 23 <= hour or hour < 7:
    53Ôćĺ        return 1.3
    54Ôćĺ    elif (10 <= hour <= 12) or (14 <= hour <= 17):
    55Ôćĺ        return 1.0
    56Ôćĺ    else:
    57Ôćĺ        return 1.1
    58Ôćĺ
    59Ôćĺ
    60Ôćĺdef get_random_delay(delay_type: str = 'action') -> float:
    61Ôćĺ    config = get_config()
    62Ôćĺ
    63Ôćĺ    delay_ranges = {
    64Ôćĺ        'page_load': (
    65Ôćĺ            config.get('delays.page_load_min', 2),
    66Ôćĺ            config.get('delays.page_load_max', 5)
    67Ôćĺ        ),
    68Ôćĺ        'action': (
    69Ôćĺ            config.get('delays.action_min', 0.5),
    70Ôćĺ            config.get('delays.action_max', 2.0)
    71Ôćĺ        ),
    72Ôćĺ        'typing': (
    73Ôćĺ            config.get('delays.typing_min', 0.05),
    74Ôćĺ            config.get('delays.typing_max', 0.15)
    75Ôćĺ        ),
    76Ôćĺ        'scroll': (
    77Ôćĺ            config.get('delays.scroll_min', 0.5),
    78Ôćĺ            config.get('delays.scroll_max', 1.5)
    79Ôćĺ        ),
    80Ôćĺ        'message': (
    81Ôćĺ            config.get('delays.action_min', 0.5),
    82Ôćĺ            config.get('delays.action_max', 2.0)
    83Ôćĺ        ),
    84Ôćĺ    }
    85Ôćĺ
    86Ôćĺ    min_delay, max_delay = delay_ranges.get(delay_type, (0.5, 2.0))
    87Ôćĺ    base_delay = _lognormal_delay(min_delay, max_delay)
    88Ôćĺ
    89Ôćĺ    if delay_type != 'typing':
    90Ôćĺ        base_delay *= _fatigue_multiplier()
    91Ôćĺ        base_delay *= _time_of_day_multiplier()
    92Ôćĺ
    93Ôćĺ    if delay_type in ('action', 'page_load', 'message'):
    94Ôćĺ        base_delay += _maybe_distraction_pause()
    95Ôćĺ
    96Ôćĺ    return base_delay
    97Ôćĺ
    98Ôćĺ
    99Ôćĺasync def async_random_delay(delay_type: str = 'action'):
   100Ôćĺ    delay = get_random_delay(delay_type)
   101Ôćĺ    await asyncio.sleep(delay)
   102Ôćĺ

1Ôćĺ"""Pipeline checkpoint manager for resume capability."""
     2Ôćĺ
     3Ôćĺimport json
     4Ôćĺimport os
     5Ôćĺimport tempfile
     6Ôćĺfrom datetime import datetime, timezone
     7Ôćĺfrom pathlib import Path
     8Ôćĺfrom typing import Any, Dict, List, Optional, Set
     9Ôćĺ
    10Ôćĺfrom loguru import logger
    11Ôćĺ
    12Ôćĺ
    13ÔćĺCHECKPOINT_DIR = Path("data/.checkpoints")
    14Ôćĺ
    15Ôćĺ
    16Ôćĺclass CheckpointManager:
    17Ôćĺ    """Manages pipeline checkpoint save/load for resume support."""
    18Ôćĺ
    19Ôćĺ    def __init__(self, checkpoint_id: Optional[str] = None):
    20Ôćĺ        CHECKPOINT_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    21Ôćĺ
    22Ôćĺ        if checkpoint_id:
    23Ôćĺ            self.checkpoint_path = CHECKPOINT_DIR / f"{checkpoint_id}.json"
    24Ôćĺ        else:
    25Ôćĺ            ts = datetime.now(timezone.utc).strftime("%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")
    26Ôćĺ            self.checkpoint_path = CHECKPOINT_DIR / f"pipeline_{ts}.json"
    27Ôćĺ
    28Ôćĺ        self._data: Dict[str, Any] = {}
    29Ôćĺ
    30Ôćĺ    def save(
    31Ôćĺ        self,
    32Ôćĺ        keywords: tuple,
    33Ôćĺ        template: str,
    34Ôćĺ        variables: dict,
    35Ôćĺ        company: tuple,
    36Ôćĺ        location: Optional[str],
    37Ôćĺ        max_pages: int,
    38Ôćĺ        batch_pages: int,
    39Ôćĺ        skip_messaged: bool,
    40Ôćĺ        interactive: bool,
    41Ôćĺ        completed_pages: int,
    42Ôćĺ        sent_ids: List[str],
    43Ôćĺ        seen_ids: List[str],
    44Ôćĺ        total_results: Optional[dict] = None,
    45Ôćĺ        mode: str = "recommend",
    46Ôćĺ        dry_run: bool = False,
    47Ôćĺ    ) -> None:
    48Ôćĺ        self._data = {
    49Ôćĺ            "created_at": self._data.get("created_at", datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat()),
    50Ôćĺ            "updated_at": datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),
    51Ôćĺ            "params": {
    52Ôćĺ                "keywords": list(keywords),
    53Ôćĺ                "template": template,
    54Ôćĺ                "variables": variables,
    55Ôćĺ                "company": list(company) if company else [],
    56Ôćĺ                "location": location,
    57Ôćĺ                "max_pages": max_pages,
    58Ôćĺ                "batch_pages": batch_pages,
    59Ôćĺ                "skip_messaged": skip_messaged,
    60Ôćĺ                "interactive": interactive,
    61Ôćĺ                "mode": mode,
    62Ôćĺ                "dry_run": dry_run,
    63Ôćĺ            },
    64Ôćĺ            "progress": {
    65Ôćĺ                "completed_pages": completed_pages,
    66Ôćĺ                "sent_ids": sent_ids,
    67Ôćĺ                "seen_ids": seen_ids,
    68Ôćĺ                "total_results": total_results or {},
    69Ôćĺ            },
    70Ôćĺ        }
    71Ôćĺ
    72Ôćĺ        try:
    73Ôćĺ            tmp_fd, tmp_path = tempfile.mkstemp(
    74Ôćĺ                dir=self.checkpoint_path.parent, suffix=".tmp"
    75Ôćĺ            )
    76Ôćĺ            try:
    77Ôćĺ                with os.fdopen(tmp_fd, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    78Ôćĺ                    json.dump(self._data, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)
    79Ôćĺ                os.replace(tmp_path, self.checkpoint_path)
    80Ôćĺ            except BaseException:
    81Ôćĺ                try:
    82Ôćĺ                    os.unlink(tmp_path)
    83Ôćĺ                except OSError:
    84Ôćĺ                    pass
    85Ôćĺ                raise
    86Ôćĺ            logger.debug(f"Checkpoint saved: {self.checkpoint_path}")
    87Ôćĺ        except Exception as e:
    88Ôćĺ            logger.error(f"Failed to save checkpoint: {e}")
    89Ôćĺ            raise
    90Ôćĺ
    91Ôćĺ    @classmethod
    92Ôćĺ    def load_latest(cls) -> Optional["CheckpointManager"]:
    93Ôćĺ        CHECKPOINT_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    94Ôćĺ        files = sorted(CHECKPOINT_DIR.glob("pipeline_*.json"), key=lambda p: p.stat().st_mtime, reverse=True)
    95Ôćĺ
    96Ôćĺ        if not files:
    97Ôćĺ            return None
    98Ôćĺ
    99Ôćĺ        try:
   100Ôćĺ            mgr = object.__new__(cls)
   101Ôćĺ            mgr.checkpoint_path = files[0]
   102Ôćĺ            mgr._data = {}
   103Ôćĺ            with open(files[0], "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
   104Ôćĺ                mgr._data = json.load(f)
   105Ôćĺ            logger.info(f"Loaded checkpoint: {files[0]}")
   106Ôćĺ            return mgr
   107Ôćĺ        except Exception as e:
   108Ôćĺ            logger.error(f"Failed to load checkpoint: {e}")
   109Ôćĺ            return None
   110Ôćĺ
   111Ôćĺ    @property
   112Ôćĺ    def params(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
   113Ôćĺ        return self._data.get("params", {})
   114Ôćĺ
   115Ôćĺ    @property
   116Ôćĺ    def progress(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
   117Ôćĺ        return self._data.get("progress", {})
   118Ôćĺ
   119Ôćĺ    @property
   120Ôćĺ    def completed_pages(self) -> int:
   121Ôćĺ        return self.progress.get("completed_pages", 0)
   122Ôćĺ
   123Ôćĺ    @property
   124Ôćĺ    def sent_ids(self) -> List[str]:
   125Ôćĺ        return list(self.progress.get("sent_ids", []))
   126Ôćĺ
   127Ôćĺ    @property
   128Ôćĺ    def seen_ids(self) -> Set[str]:
   129Ôćĺ        return set(self.progress.get("seen_ids", []))
   130Ôćĺ
   131Ôćĺ    @property
   132Ôćĺ    def total_results(self) -> Dict[str, int]:
   133Ôćĺ        return self.progress.get("total_results", {})
   134Ôćĺ
   135Ôćĺ    @property
   136Ôćĺ    def summary(self) -> str:
   137Ôćĺ        p = self.params
   138Ôćĺ        pr = self.progress
   139Ôćĺ        created = self._data.get("created_at", "unknown")
   140Ôćĺ        updated = self._data.get("updated_at", "unknown")
   141Ôćĺ        mode = p.get("mode", "recommend")
   142Ôćĺ        return (
   143Ôćĺ            f"Keywords: {p.get('keywords', [])}\n"
   144Ôćĺ            f"Template: {p.get('template', '')}\n"
   145Ôćĺ            f"Mode: {mode}\n"
   146Ôćĺ            f"Pages completed: {pr.get('completed_pages', 0)} / {p.get('max_pages', '?')}\n"
   147Ôćĺ            f"Candidates seen: {len(pr.get('seen_ids', []))}\n"
   148Ôćĺ            f"Messages sent: {len(pr.get('sent_ids', []))}\n"
   149Ôćĺ            f"Created: {created}\n"
   150Ôćĺ            f"Last updated: {updated}"
   151Ôćĺ        )
   152Ôćĺ
   153Ôćĺ    def delete(self) -> None:
   154Ôćĺ        try:
   155Ôćĺ            if self.checkpoint_path.exists():
   156Ôćĺ                self.checkpoint_path.unlink()
   157Ôćĺ                logger.debug(f"Checkpoint deleted: {self.checkpoint_path}")
   158Ôćĺ        except Exception as e:
   159Ôćĺ            logger.error(f"Failed to delete checkpoint: {e}")
   160Ôćĺ

1Ôćĺ"""Retry utilities for navigation and network operations."""
     2Ôćĺ
     3Ôćĺfrom tenacity import retry, stop_after_attempt, wait_exponential, retry_if_exception_type
     4Ôćĺfrom patchright.async_api import Page, Error as PlaywrightError
     5Ôćĺfrom loguru import logger
     6Ôćĺ
     7Ôćĺ
     8Ôćĺ@retry(
     9Ôćĺ    stop=stop_after_attempt(3),
    10Ôćĺ    wait=wait_exponential(multiplier=1, min=2, max=10),
    11Ôćĺ    retry=retry_if_exception_type((PlaywrightError, TimeoutError, ConnectionError)),
    12Ôćĺ    before_sleep=lambda retry_state: logger.warning(
    13Ôćĺ        f"Navigation failed (attempt {retry_state.attempt_number}), retrying..."
    14Ôćĺ    ),
    15Ôćĺ    reraise=True,
    16Ôćĺ)
    17Ôćĺasync def retry_navigation(page: Page, url: str, **kwargs) -> None:
    18Ôćĺ    """Navigate to a URL with automatic retry on failure.
    19Ôćĺ
    20Ôćĺ    Args:
    21Ôćĺ        page: Playwright page instance
    22Ôćĺ        url: URL to navigate to
    23Ôćĺ        **kwargs: Additional arguments passed to page.goto()
    24Ôćĺ    """
    25Ôćĺ    await page.goto(url, **kwargs)
    26Ôćĺ

1Ôćĺ"""Candidate scoring for priority-based messaging.
     2Ôćĺ
     3ÔćĺTwo-layer architecture:
     4Ôćĺ1. Rule engine: seniority, company tier, education, experience, jieba skill matching,
     5Ôćĺ   keyword relevance, R&D bonus ÔÇö weighted and normalized to 100.
     6Ôćĺ2. Optional LLM scoring via Ollama (integrated in pipeline).
     7Ôćĺ
     8ÔćĺWhen no scoring config is present in settings.json, behavior is backward-compatible
     9Ôćĺwith the original simple scoring.
    10Ôćĺ"""
    11Ôćĺ
    12Ôćĺimport re
    13Ôćĺfrom typing import Any, Dict, List, Optional
    14Ôćĺ
    15Ôćĺfrom loguru import logger
    16Ôćĺ
    17Ôćĺ# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    18Ôćĺ# Try importing jieba; fall back to substring matching if unavailable

    22Ôćĺ
    23Ôćĺ    _HAS_JIEBA = True
    24Ôćĺexcept ImportError:

    26Ôćĺ    logger.debug("jieba not installed, skill matching will use substring fallback")
    27Ôćĺ
    28Ôćĺ# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    29Ôćĺ# Constants
    30Ôćĺ# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    31Ôćĺ

    36Ôćĺ    "ŠŐÇŠť»Ŕ┤čŔ┤úń║║": 35, "Ŕ┤čŔ┤úń║║": 30, "Tech Lead": 35,
    37Ôćĺ    "Š×ÂŠ×äňŞł": 35, "ńŞôň«Â": 30, "staff": 30, "Staff": 30,
    38Ôćĺ    "principal": 35, "Principal": 35,
    39Ôćĺ    "ŔÁäŠĚ▒": 25, "Úźśš║ž": 20, "Senior": 20, "senior": 20,
    40Ôćĺ    "š╗ĆšÉć": 15, "ńŞ╗š«í": 15, "lead": 15, "Lead": 15,
    41Ôćĺ    "ńŞşš║ž": 10,
    42Ôćĺ    "ňłŁš║ž": 5, "Junior": 5, "junior": 5,
    43Ôćĺ    "ňŐęšÉć": 3, "ň«×ń╣á": 1,
    44Ôćĺ}
