    48Ôćĺ    "šÖżň║Ž", "Baidu", "šżÄňŤó", "Meituan", "ń║ČńŞť", "JD", "Šő╝ňĄÜňĄÜ", "PDD",
    49Ôćĺ    "ňŹÄńŞ║", "Huawei", "ň░Ćš▒│", "Xiaomi", "šŻĹŠśô", "NetEase", "ň┐źŠëő", "Kwai",
    50Ôćĺ    "ŔÜéŔÜüÚŤćňŤó", "ŔÜéŔÜüÚçĹŠťŹ", "Š╗┤Š╗┤", "DiDi",
    51Ôćĺ    "Google", "Ŕ░ĚŠşî", "Microsoft", "ňż«ŔŻ»", "Apple", "Ŕő╣Š×ť",
    52Ôćĺ    "Amazon", "ń║ÜÚęČÚÇŐ", "Meta", "Facebook",
    53Ôćĺ    "Netflix", "Uber", "OpenAI", "Anthropic",
    54Ôćĺ}
    55Ôćĺ
    56ÔćĺTIER2_COMPANIES = {
    57Ôćĺ    "ŠÉ║šĘő", "Trip.com", "BšźÖ", "bilibili", "ňôöňôęňôöňôę",
    58Ôćĺ    "ščąń╣Ä", "Zhihu", "ň░Ćš║óń╣Ž", "ňżŚšëę", "SHEIN",
    59Ôćĺ    "ňĽćŠ▒Ą", "ŠŚĚŔžć", "ńżŁňŤż", "ň»ĺŠşŽš║¬", "ňť░ň╣│š║┐",
    60Ôćĺ    "šÉćŠâ│Š▒ŻŔŻŽ", "ŔöÜŠŁą", "ň░ĆÚ╣Ć", "ňĄžšľć", "DJI",
    61Ôćĺ    "š▒│ňôłŠŞŞ", "miHoYo", "ŔÄëŔÄëńŞŁ", "ňĆáš║Ş",
    62Ôćĺ    "360", "Šľ░ŠÁ¬", "ňż«ňŹÜ", "ŠÉťšőÉ", "šł▒ňąçŔë║",
    63Ôćĺ    "OPPO", "vivo", "ńŞÇňŐá", "ŔüöŠâ│", "Lenovo",
    64Ôćĺ    "SAP", "Oracle", "IBM", "Adobe", "Salesforce",
    65Ôćĺ    "Stripe", "Airbnb", "Spotify", "Twitter", "X",
    66Ôćĺ}
    67Ôćĺ
    68ÔćĺEDUCATION_SCORES: Dict[str, int] = {
    69Ôćĺ    "ňŹÜňúź": 100,
    70Ôćĺ    "šíĽňúź": 80,
    71Ôćĺ    "ŠťČšžĹ": 60,
    72Ôćĺ    "ňĄžńŞô": 40,
    73Ôćĺ    "ńŞşńŞô": 20,
    74Ôćĺ    "ÚźśńŞş": 10,
    75Ôćĺ}
    76Ôćĺ
    77Ôćĺ# Default weights (used when no config present)
    78Ôćĺ_DEFAULT_WEIGHTS: Dict[str, float] = {
    79Ôćĺ    "seniority": 15,
    80Ôćĺ    "company_tier": 15,
    81Ôćĺ    "education": 10,
    82Ôćĺ    "experience": 15,
    83Ôćĺ    "skill_match": 25,
    84Ôćĺ    "keyword_relevance": 10,
    85Ôćĺ    "rd_bonus": 5,
    86Ôćĺ    "llm_score": 5,
    87Ôćĺ}
    88Ôćĺ
    89Ôćĺ# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    90Ôćĺ# Config helpers (lazy-loaded, cached)
    91Ôćĺ# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    92Ôćĺ_cached_jd_config: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None
    93Ôćĺ_cached_weights: Optional[Dict[str, float]] = None
    94Ôćĺ
    95Ôćĺ
    96Ôćĺdef _get_jd_config() -> Optional[Dict[str, Any]]:
    97Ôćĺ    """Load JD config from settings.json, cached after first call."""
    98Ôćĺ    global _cached_jd_config
    99Ôćĺ    if _cached_jd_config is not None:
   100Ôćĺ        return _cached_jd_config
   101Ôćĺ    try:
   102Ôćĺ        from src.utils.config import get_config
   103Ôćĺ        cfg = get_config()
   104Ôćĺ        jd = cfg.get("scoring.jd")
   105Ôćĺ        if jd:
   106Ôćĺ            _cached_jd_config = jd
   107Ôćĺ            return _cached_jd_config
   108Ôćĺ    except Exception:
   109Ôćĺ        pass
   110Ôćĺ    return None
   111Ôćĺ
   112Ôćĺ
   113Ôćĺdef _get_weights() -> Dict[str, float]:
   114Ôćĺ    """Load scoring weights from settings.json, cached after first call."""
   115Ôćĺ    global _cached_weights
   116Ôćĺ    if _cached_weights is not None:
   117Ôćĺ        return _cached_weights
   118Ôćĺ    try:
   119Ôćĺ        from src.utils.config import get_config
   120Ôćĺ        cfg = get_config()
   121Ôćĺ        w = cfg.get("scoring.weights")
   122Ôćĺ        if w and isinstance(w, dict):
   123Ôćĺ            _cached_weights = w
   124Ôćĺ            return _cached_weights
   125Ôćĺ    except Exception:
   126Ôćĺ        pass
   127Ôćĺ    _cached_weights = _DEFAULT_WEIGHTS
   128Ôćĺ    return _cached_weights
   129Ôćĺ
   130Ôćĺ
   131Ôćĺdef reset_scoring_cache():
   132Ôćĺ    """Reset cached config (useful for testing)."""
   133Ôćĺ    global _cached_jd_config, _cached_weights
   134Ôćĺ    _cached_jd_config = None
   135Ôćĺ    _cached_weights = None
   136Ôćĺ
   137Ôćĺ
   138Ôćĺ# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   139Ôćĺ# Individual scoring factors (all return 0.0 ÔÇô 1.0)
   140Ôćĺ# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   141Ôćĺ
   142Ôćĺdef _score_seniority(title: str) -> float:
   143Ôćĺ    """Score based on job title seniority. Returns 0.0-1.0."""
   144Ôćĺ    if not title:
   145Ôćĺ        return 0.0
   146Ôćĺ    title_lower = title.lower()
   147Ôćĺ    best = 0
   148Ôćĺ    for keyword, points in SENIORITY_SCORES.items():
   149Ôćĺ        if keyword.lower() in title_lower or keyword in title:
   150Ôćĺ            best = max(best, points)
   151Ôćĺ    # Max seniority score is 50 (CTO)
   152Ôćĺ    return min(best / 50.0, 1.0)
   153Ôćĺ
   154Ôćĺ
   155Ôćĺdef _score_company(company: str) -> float:
   156Ôćĺ    """Score based on company tier. Returns 0.0-1.0."""
   157Ôćĺ    if not company:
   158Ôćĺ        return 0.0
   159Ôćĺ    company_lower = company.lower()
   160Ôćĺ    for t1 in TIER1_COMPANIES:
   161Ôćĺ        t1_lower = t1.lower()
   162Ôćĺ        if len(t1_lower) >= 2 and len(company_lower) >= 2:
   163Ôćĺ            if (t1_lower == company_lower
   164Ôćĺ                    or (len(t1_lower) >= 3 and t1_lower in company_lower)
   165Ôćĺ                    or (len(company_lower) >= 3 and company_lower in t1_lower)):
   166Ôćĺ                return 1.0
   167Ôćĺ    for t2 in TIER2_COMPANIES:
   168Ôćĺ        t2_lower = t2.lower()
   169Ôćĺ        if len(t2_lower) >= 2 and len(company_lower) >= 2:
   170Ôćĺ            if (t2_lower == company_lower
   171Ôćĺ                    or (len(t2_lower) >= 3 and t2_lower in company_lower)
   172Ôćĺ                    or (len(company_lower) >= 3 and company_lower in t2_lower)):
   173Ôćĺ                return 0.67
   174Ôćĺ    return 0.0
   175Ôćĺ
   176Ôćĺ
   177Ôćĺdef _score_education(education_level: Optional[str], preferred: Optional[str] = None) -> float:
   178Ôćĺ    """Score based on education level. Returns 0.0-1.0."""
   179Ôćĺ    if not education_level:
   180Ôćĺ        return 0.0
   181Ôćĺ    # Find the candidate's education rank
   182Ôćĺ    candidate_score = 0
   183Ôćĺ    for edu, points in EDUCATION_SCORES.items():
   184Ôćĺ        if edu in education_level:
   185Ôćĺ            candidate_score = points
   186Ôćĺ            break
   187Ôćĺ    if candidate_score == 0:
   188Ôćĺ        return 0.0
   189Ôćĺ    # If preferred education specified, score relative to it
   190Ôćĺ    if preferred:
   191Ôćĺ        preferred_score = EDUCATION_SCORES.get(preferred, 60)
   192Ôćĺ        if candidate_score >= preferred_score:
   193Ôćĺ            return 1.0
   194Ôćĺ        else:
   195Ôćĺ            return candidate_score / preferred_score
   196Ôćĺ    # Without preference, just normalize
   197Ôćĺ    return candidate_score / 100.0
   198Ôćĺ
   199Ôćĺ
   200Ôćĺdef _parse_experience_years(work_years: Optional[str]) -> Optional[int]:
   201Ôćĺ    """Parse Chinese experience strings like '5ň╣┤', '3-5ň╣┤', '10ň╣┤ń╗ąńŞŐ' Ôćĺ int."""
   202Ôćĺ    if not work_years:
   203Ôćĺ        return None
   204Ôćĺ    # Try "X-Yň╣┤" pattern Ôćĺ take the higher number
   205Ôćĺ    m = re.search(r"(\d+)\s*[-ÔÇô~]\s*(\d+)", work_years)
   206Ôćĺ    if m:
   207Ôćĺ        return int(m.group(2))
   208Ôćĺ    # Try single number "Xň╣┤"
   209Ôćĺ    m = re.search(r"(\d+)", work_years)
   210Ôćĺ    if m:
   211Ôćĺ        return int(m.group(1))
   212Ôćĺ    return None
   213Ôćĺ
   214Ôćĺ
   215Ôćĺdef _score_experience(work_years: Optional[str], min_years: Optional[int] = None) -> float:
   216Ôćĺ    """Score based on experience years. Returns 0.0-1.0."""
   217Ôćĺ    years = _parse_experience_years(work_years)
   218Ôćĺ    if years is None:
   219Ôćĺ        return 0.0
   220Ôćĺ    if min_years is None or min_years <= 0:
   221Ôćĺ        # Without min requirement, just normalize (cap at 15 years)
   222Ôćĺ        return min(years / 15.0, 1.0)
   223Ôćĺ    if years >= min_years:
   224Ôćĺ        # Meet or exceed ÔÇö bonus for exceeding, capped at 1.0
   225Ôćĺ        return min(1.0, 0.8 + 0.2 * min(years / (min_years * 2), 1.0))
   226Ôćĺ    else:
   227Ôćĺ        # Below minimum
   228Ôćĺ        return years / min_years
   229Ôćĺ
   230Ôćĺ
   231Ôćĺdef _build_candidate_text(
   232Ôćĺ    title: str = "",
   233Ôćĺ    company: str = "",
   234Ôćĺ    skills: Optional[List[str]] = None,
   235Ôćĺ    work_experience: Optional[List[Dict]] = None,
   236Ôćĺ    basic_info: Optional[Dict] = None,
   237Ôćĺ) -> str:
   238Ôćĺ    """Concatenate all available candidate text for skill matching."""
   239Ôćĺ    parts = []
   240Ôćĺ    if title:
   241Ôćĺ        parts.append(title)
   242Ôćĺ    if company:
   243Ôćĺ        parts.append(company)
   244Ôćĺ    if skills:
   245Ôćĺ        parts.append(" ".join(skills))
   246Ôćĺ    if work_experience:
   247Ôćĺ        for exp in work_experience:
   248Ôćĺ            if isinstance(exp, dict):
   249Ôćĺ                parts.append(exp.get("company", ""))
   250Ôćĺ                parts.append(exp.get("title", ""))
   251Ôćĺ                parts.append(exp.get("description", ""))
   252Ôćĺ    if basic_info and isinstance(basic_info, dict):
   253Ôćĺ        for v in basic_info.values():
   254Ôćĺ            if isinstance(v, str):
   255Ôćĺ                parts.append(v)
   256Ôćĺ    return " ".join(parts)
   257Ôćĺ
   258Ôćĺ
   259Ôćĺdef _tokenize(text: str) -> set:
   260Ôćĺ    """Tokenize text using jieba or fallback to whitespace/punctuation splitting."""
   261Ôćĺ    if not text:
   262Ôćĺ        return set()
   263Ôćĺ    if _HAS_JIEBA:
   264Ôćĺ        return set(w.lower() for w in jieba.cut(text) if len(w.strip()) > 0)
   265Ôćĺ    # Fallback: split on whitespace + punctuation, return lowered tokens
   266Ôćĺ    tokens = re.split(r"[\s,´╝î;´╝ŤŃÇü/|]+", text.lower())
   267Ôćĺ    return set(t for t in tokens if t)
   268Ôćĺ
   269Ôćĺ
   270Ôćĺdef _score_skills_jieba(
   271Ôćĺ    candidate_text: str,
   272Ôćĺ    candidate_skills: Optional[List[str]],
   273Ôćĺ    required_skills: Optional[List[str]] = None,
   274Ôćĺ    preferred_skills: Optional[List[str]] = None,
   275Ôćĺ) -> float:
   276Ôćĺ    """Score skill match using jieba tokenization. Returns 0.0-1.0."""
   277Ôćĺ    if not required_skills and not preferred_skills:
   278Ôćĺ        return 0.0
   279Ôćĺ
   280Ôćĺ    # Build candidate token set
   281Ôćĺ    tokens = _tokenize(candidate_text)
   282Ôćĺ    if candidate_skills:
   283Ôćĺ        for s in candidate_skills:
   284Ôćĺ            tokens.update(_tokenize(s))
   285Ôćĺ
   286Ôćĺ    def _match_skill(skill: str, token_set: set) -> bool:
   287Ôćĺ        skill_lower = skill.lower()
   288Ôćĺ        # Exact token match
   289Ôćĺ        if skill_lower in token_set:
   290Ôćĺ            return True
   291Ôćĺ        # Substring match in original text
   292Ôćĺ        if skill_lower in candidate_text.lower():
   293Ôćĺ            return True
   294Ôćĺ        # Tokenized skill match
   295Ôćĺ        skill_tokens = _tokenize(skill)
   296Ôćĺ        if skill_tokens and skill_tokens.issubset(token_set):
   297Ôćĺ            return True
   298Ôćĺ        return False
   299Ôćĺ
   300Ôćĺ    score = 0.0
   301Ôćĺ    total_weight = 0.0
   302Ôćĺ
   303Ôćĺ    if required_skills:
   304Ôćĺ        required_weight = 0.7
   305Ôćĺ        matched = sum(1 for s in required_skills if _match_skill(s, tokens))
   306Ôćĺ        score += required_weight * (matched / len(required_skills))
   307Ôćĺ        total_weight += required_weight
   308Ôćĺ
   309Ôćĺ    if preferred_skills:
   310Ôćĺ        preferred_weight = 0.3
   311Ôćĺ        matched = sum(1 for s in preferred_skills if _match_skill(s, tokens))
   312Ôćĺ        score += preferred_weight * (matched / len(preferred_skills))
   313Ôćĺ        total_weight += preferred_weight
   314Ôćĺ
   315Ôćĺ    if total_weight > 0:
   316Ôćĺ        return score / total_weight
   317Ôćĺ
   318Ôćĺ    return 0.0
   319Ôćĺ
   320Ôćĺ
   321Ôćĺdef _score_keyword_relevance(title: str, company: str, search_keywords: Optional[List[str]]) -> float:
   322Ôćĺ    """Score keyword relevance. Returns 0.0-1.0."""
   323Ôćĺ    if not search_keywords or not title:
   324Ôćĺ        return 0.0
   325Ôćĺ    title_lower = title.lower()
   326Ôćĺ    company_lower = (company or "").lower()
   327Ôćĺ    points = 0
   328Ôćĺ    for kw in search_keywords:
   329Ôćĺ        kw_lower = kw.lower()
   330Ôćĺ        if kw_lower in title_lower:
   331Ôćĺ            points += 10
   332Ôćĺ        elif kw_lower in company_lower:
   333Ôćĺ            points += 5
   334Ôćĺ    return min(points / 20.0, 1.0)
   335Ôćĺ
   336Ôćĺ
   337Ôćĺdef _score_rd_bonus(title: str) -> float:
   338Ôćĺ    """R&D role bonus. Returns 0.0 or 1.0."""
   339Ôćĺ    if not title:
   340Ôćĺ        return 0.0
   341Ôćĺ    rd_patterns = [
   342Ôćĺ        r"ňĚąšĘőňŞł", r"ň╝ÇňĆĹ", r"Š×ÂŠ×ä", r"š«ŚŠ│Ľ", r"šáöňĆĹ",
   343Ôćĺ        r"engineer", r"developer", r"architect",
   344Ôćĺ    ]
   345Ôćĺ    for pattern in rd_patterns:
   346Ôćĺ        if re.search(pattern, title, re.IGNORECASE):
   347Ôćĺ            return 1.0
   348Ôćĺ    return 0.0
   349Ôćĺ
   350Ôćĺ
   351Ôćĺ# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   352Ôćĺ# Main scoring function
   353Ôćĺ# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   354Ôćĺ
   355Ôćĺ_UNSET = object()
   356Ôćĺ
   357Ôćĺ
   358Ôćĺdef score_candidate(
   359Ôćĺ    name: str,
   360Ôćĺ    title: str,
   361Ôćĺ    company: str,
   362Ôćĺ    search_keywords: Optional[List[str]] = None,
   363Ôćĺ    *,
   364Ôćĺ    education_level: Optional[str] = None,
   365Ôćĺ    work_years: Optional[str] = None,
   366Ôćĺ    skills: Optional[List[str]] = None,
   367Ôćĺ    work_experience: Optional[List[Dict]] = None,
   368Ôćĺ    basic_info: Optional[Dict] = None,
   369Ôćĺ    jd_config: Any = _UNSET,
   370Ôćĺ    weights: Optional[Dict[str, float]] = None,
   371Ôćĺ) -> int:
   372Ôćĺ    """Score a candidate with multi-factor weighted scoring.
   373Ôćĺ
   374Ôćĺ    Without keyword-only args, behavior is backward-compatible with the
   375Ôćĺ    original implementation: seniority + company tier + keyword + rd_bonus
   376Ôćĺ    scored on the original absolute scale.
   377Ôćĺ    """
   378Ôćĺ    # Determine if we should use enhanced scoring
   379Ôćĺ    has_enhanced_info = any([education_level, work_years, skills, work_experience, basic_info])
   380Ôćĺ
   381Ôćĺ    if jd_config is _UNSET:
   382Ôćĺ        # Only auto-load JD config when enhanced candidate data is available
   383Ôćĺ        jd = _get_jd_config() if has_enhanced_info else None
   384Ôćĺ    else:
   385Ôćĺ        jd = jd_config
   386Ôćĺ
   387Ôćĺ    if jd is None and not has_enhanced_info:
   388Ôćĺ        # Legacy mode: original absolute scoring
   389Ôćĺ        return _legacy_score(name, title, company, search_keywords)
   390Ôćĺ
   391Ôćĺ    # Enhanced mode: weighted factor scoring
   392Ôćĺ    w = weights if weights is not None else _get_weights()
   393Ôćĺ    total_weight = sum(v for k, v in w.items() if k != "llm_score")
   394Ôćĺ    if total_weight <= 0:
   395Ôćĺ        total_weight = 1.0
   396Ôćĺ
   397Ôćĺ    # Compute each factor (0.0-1.0)
   398Ôćĺ    seniority = _score_seniority(title)
   399Ôćĺ    company_tier = _score_company(company)
   400Ôćĺ    education = _score_education(
   401Ôćĺ        education_level,
   402Ôćĺ        jd.get("preferred_education") if jd else None,
   403Ôćĺ    )
   404Ôćĺ    experience = _score_experience(
   405Ôćĺ        work_years,
   406Ôćĺ        jd.get("min_experience_years") if jd else None,
   407Ôćĺ    )
   408Ôćĺ
   409Ôćĺ    # Skill matching
   410Ôćĺ    candidate_text = _build_candidate_text(title, company, skills, work_experience, basic_info)
   411Ôćĺ    skill_match = _score_skills_jieba(
   412Ôćĺ        candidate_text,
   413Ôćĺ        skills,
   414Ôćĺ        jd.get("required_skills") if jd else None,
   415Ôćĺ        jd.get("preferred_skills") if jd else None,
   416Ôćĺ    )
   417Ôćĺ
   418Ôćĺ    keyword_rel = _score_keyword_relevance(title, company, search_keywords)
   419Ôćĺ    rd_bonus = _score_rd_bonus(title)
   420Ôćĺ
   421Ôćĺ    # Weighted sum (exclude llm_score from rule engine)
   422Ôćĺ    factors = {
   423Ôćĺ        "seniority": seniority,
   424Ôćĺ        "company_tier": company_tier,
   425Ôćĺ        "education": education,
   426Ôćĺ        "experience": experience,
   427Ôćĺ        "skill_match": skill_match,
   428Ôćĺ        "keyword_relevance": keyword_rel,
   429Ôćĺ        "rd_bonus": rd_bonus,
   430Ôćĺ    }
   431Ôćĺ
   432Ôćĺ    weighted_sum = 0.0
   433Ôćĺ    for factor_name, factor_value in factors.items():
   434Ôćĺ        factor_weight = w.get(factor_name, 0)
   435Ôćĺ        weighted_sum += factor_value * factor_weight
   436Ôćĺ
   437Ôćĺ    # Normalize to 0-100 scale
   438Ôćĺ    score = int(round(weighted_sum / total_weight * 100))
   439Ôćĺ    return max(0, min(score, 100))
   440Ôćĺ
   441Ôćĺ
   442Ôćĺdef _legacy_score(
   443Ôćĺ    _name: str,
   444Ôćĺ    title: str,
   445Ôćĺ    company: str,
   446Ôćĺ    search_keywords: Optional[List[str]],
   447Ôćĺ) -> int:
   448Ôćĺ    """Original scoring logic for backward compatibility."""
   449Ôćĺ    score = 0
   450Ôćĺ
   451Ôćĺ    title_lower = title.lower() if title else ""
   452Ôćĺ    best_seniority = 0
   453Ôćĺ    for keyword, points in SENIORITY_SCORES.items():
   454Ôćĺ        if keyword.lower() in title_lower or keyword in title:
   455Ôćĺ            best_seniority = max(best_seniority, points)
   456Ôćĺ    score += best_seniority
   457Ôćĺ
   458Ôćĺ    if company:
   459Ôćĺ        company_lower = company.lower()
   460Ôćĺ        company_matched = False
   461Ôćĺ        for t1 in TIER1_COMPANIES:
   462Ôćĺ            t1_lower = t1.lower()
   463Ôćĺ            if len(t1_lower) >= 2 and len(company_lower) >= 2:
   464Ôćĺ                if (t1_lower == company_lower
   465Ôćĺ                        or (len(t1_lower) >= 3 and t1_lower in company_lower)
   466Ôćĺ                        or (len(company_lower) >= 3 and company_lower in t1_lower)):
   467Ôćĺ                    score += 30
   468Ôćĺ                    company_matched = True
   469Ôćĺ                    break
   470Ôćĺ        if not company_matched:
   471Ôćĺ            for t2 in TIER2_COMPANIES:
   472Ôćĺ                t2_lower = t2.lower()
   473Ôćĺ                if len(t2_lower) >= 2 and len(company_lower) >= 2:
   474Ôćĺ                    if (t2_lower == company_lower
   475Ôćĺ                            or (len(t2_lower) >= 3 and t2_lower in company_lower)
   476Ôćĺ                            or (len(company_lower) >= 3 and company_lower in t2_lower)):
   477Ôćĺ                        score += 20
   478Ôćĺ                        break
   479Ôćĺ
   480Ôćĺ    if search_keywords and title:
   481Ôćĺ        keyword_score = 0
   482Ôćĺ        for kw in search_keywords:
   483Ôćĺ            kw_lower = kw.lower()
   484Ôćĺ            if kw_lower in title_lower:
   485Ôćĺ                keyword_score += 10
   486Ôćĺ            elif kw_lower in (company or "").lower():
   487Ôćĺ                keyword_score += 5
   488Ôćĺ        score += min(keyword_score, 20)
   489Ôćĺ
   490Ôćĺ    rd_bonus_patterns = [
   491Ôćĺ        r"ňĚąšĘőňŞł", r"ň╝ÇňĆĹ", r"Š×ÂŠ×ä", r"š«ŚŠ│Ľ", r"šáöňĆĹ",
   492Ôćĺ        r"engineer", r"developer", r"architect",
   493Ôćĺ    ]
   494Ôćĺ    for pattern in rd_bonus_patterns:
   495Ôćĺ        if re.search(pattern, title, re.IGNORECASE):
   496Ôćĺ            score += 5
   497Ôćĺ            break
   498Ôćĺ
   499Ôćĺ    return score
   500Ôćĺ
   501Ôćĺ
   502Ôćĺ# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   503Ôćĺ# Batch sorting
   504Ôćĺ# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   505Ôćĺ
   506Ôćĺdef sort_candidates_by_score(
   507Ôćĺ    candidates: list,
   508Ôćĺ    search_keywords: Optional[List[str]] = None,
   509Ôćĺ    *,
   510Ôćĺ    enrich_from_db: bool = True,
   511Ôćĺ) -> list:
   512Ôćĺ    """Sort candidates by score descending.
   513Ôćĺ
   514Ôćĺ    When enrich_from_db=True, batch-queries the DB for detailed profile data
   515Ôćĺ    (skills, work_experience, etc.) to enable deep scoring. Falls back to
   516Ôćĺ    basic scoring when DB data is unavailable.
   517Ôćĺ    """
   518Ôćĺ    # Batch load enrichment data from DB
   519Ôćĺ    enrichment: Dict[str, Dict[str, Any]] = {}
   520Ôćĺ    if enrich_from_db:
   521Ôćĺ        enrichment = _batch_load_enrichment(candidates)
   522Ôćĺ
   523Ôćĺ    scored = []
   524Ôćĺ    for c in candidates:
   525Ôćĺ        if isinstance(c, dict):
   526Ôćĺ            name = c.get("name", "")
   527Ôćĺ            title = c.get("title", "")
   528Ôćĺ            company = c.get("company", "")
   529Ôćĺ            boss_id = c.get("boss_id", "")
   530Ôćĺ        else:
   531Ôćĺ            name = getattr(c, "name", "")
   532Ôćĺ            title = getattr(c, "title", "")
   533Ôćĺ            company = getattr(c, "company", "")
   534Ôćĺ            boss_id = getattr(c, "boss_id", "")
   535Ôćĺ
   536Ôćĺ        # Get enrichment data if available
   537Ôćĺ        extra = enrichment.get(boss_id, {})
   538Ôćĺ
   539Ôćĺ        # Use enrichment data or fall back to candidate object attributes
   540Ôćĺ        education_level = extra.get("education_level") or (
   541Ôćĺ            c.get("education_level") if isinstance(c, dict) else getattr(c, "education_level", None)
   542Ôćĺ        )
   543Ôćĺ        work_years = extra.get("work_years") or (
   544Ôćĺ            c.get("work_years") if isinstance(c, dict) else getattr(c, "work_years", None)
   545Ôćĺ        )
   546Ôćĺ        skills_data = extra.get("skills") or (
   547Ôćĺ            c.get("skills") if isinstance(c, dict) else getattr(c, "skills", None)
   548Ôćĺ        )
   549Ôćĺ        work_exp = extra.get("work_experience") or (
   550Ôćĺ            c.get("work_experience") if isinstance(c, dict) else getattr(c, "work_experience", None)
   551Ôćĺ        )
   552Ôćĺ        basic_info = extra.get("basic_info") or (
   553Ôćĺ            c.get("basic_info") if isinstance(c, dict) else getattr(c, "basic_info", None)
   554Ôćĺ        )
   555Ôćĺ
   556Ôćĺ        s = score_candidate(
   557Ôćĺ            name, title, company, search_keywords,
   558Ôćĺ            education_level=education_level,
   559Ôćĺ            work_years=work_years,
   560Ôćĺ            skills=skills_data if isinstance(skills_data, list) else None,
   561Ôćĺ            work_experience=work_exp if isinstance(work_exp, list) else None,
   562Ôćĺ            basic_info=basic_info if isinstance(basic_info, dict) else None,
   563Ôćĺ        )
   564Ôćĺ
   565Ôćĺ        if isinstance(c, dict):
   566Ôćĺ            c["_score"] = s
   567Ôćĺ        else:
   568Ôćĺ            c._score = s
   569Ôćĺ
   570Ôćĺ        scored.append((s, c))
   571Ôćĺ
   572Ôćĺ    scored.sort(key=lambda x: x[0], reverse=True)
   573Ôćĺ
   574Ôćĺ    result = [item[1] for item in scored]
   575Ôćĺ
   576Ôćĺ    if result:
   577Ôćĺ        top = scored[0][0]
   578Ôćĺ        bottom = scored[-1][0]
   579Ôćĺ        logger.info(f"Candidates scored: top={top}, bottom={bottom}, count={len(result)}")
   580Ôćĺ
   581Ôćĺ    return result
   582Ôćĺ
   583Ôćĺ
   584Ôćĺdef _batch_load_enrichment(candidates: list) -> Dict[str, Dict[str, Any]]:
   585Ôćĺ    """Batch-load candidate details from DB."""
   586Ôćĺ    enrichment: Dict[str, Dict[str, Any]] = {}
   587Ôćĺ    boss_ids = []
   588Ôćĺ    for c in candidates:
   589Ôćĺ        bid = c.get("boss_id", "") if isinstance(c, dict) else getattr(c, "boss_id", "")
   590Ôćĺ        if bid:
   591Ôćĺ            boss_ids.append(bid)
   592Ôćĺ
   593Ôćĺ    if not boss_ids:
   594Ôćĺ        return enrichment
   595Ôćĺ
   596Ôćĺ    try:
   597Ôćĺ        from src.models.database import get_db_manager, Candidate
   598Ôćĺ        db = get_db_manager()
   599Ôćĺ        with db.session_scope() as session:
   600Ôćĺ            rows = session.query(Candidate).filter(
   601Ôćĺ                Candidate.boss_id.in_(boss_ids)
   602Ôćĺ            ).all()
   603Ôćĺ            for row in rows:
   604Ôćĺ                enrichment[row.boss_id] = {
   605Ôćĺ                    "education_level": row.education_level,
   606Ôćĺ                    "work_years": row.work_years,
   607Ôćĺ                    "skills": row.skills,
   608Ôćĺ                    "work_experience": row.work_experience,
   609Ôćĺ                    "basic_info": row.basic_info,
   610Ôćĺ                }
   611Ôćĺ        logger.debug(f"Enriched {len(enrichment)}/{len(boss_ids)} candidates from DB")
   612Ôćĺ    except Exception as e:
   613Ôćĺ        logger.debug(f"DB enrichment skipped: {e}")
   614Ôćĺ
   615Ôćĺ    return enrichment
   616Ôćĺ

1Ôćĺ"""Shared captcha detection utility.
     2Ôćĺ
     3ÔćĺDetects captcha elements on page and pauses for manual resolution.
     4ÔćĺBossšŤ┤Ŕüś may use Geetest slider captcha or similar mechanisms.
     5Ôćĺ
     6ÔćĺIn Web mode, emits an SSE notification via emit_progress and polls
     7Ôćĺuntil the captcha element disappears (user solves it in Chrome).
     8Ôćĺ"""
     9Ôćĺ
    10Ôćĺimport asyncio
    11Ôćĺ
    12Ôćĺfrom patchright.async_api import Page
    13Ôćĺfrom loguru import logger
    14Ôćĺ
    15Ôćĺfrom src.utils.progress import emit_progress
    16Ôćĺ
    17Ôćĺ
    18ÔćĺCAPTCHA_SELECTORS = [
    19Ôćĺ    '[class*="captcha"]',
    20Ôćĺ    '[class*="verify"]',
    21Ôćĺ    '[id*="captcha"]',
    22Ôćĺ    '[class*="slider"]',
    23Ôćĺ    '[class*="geetest"]',
    24Ôćĺ    'iframe[src*="captcha"]',
    25Ôćĺ    '[class*="verify-wrap"]',
    26Ôćĺ    '[class*="slide-verify"]',
    27Ôćĺ]
    28Ôćĺ
    29Ôćĺ
    30Ôćĺasync def _captcha_still_visible(page: Page) -> bool:
    31Ôćĺ    """Check if any captcha selector is still visible on the page."""
    32Ôćĺ    for selector in CAPTCHA_SELECTORS:
    33Ôćĺ        try:
    34Ôćĺ            elem = await page.query_selector(selector)
    35Ôćĺ            if elem and await elem.is_visible():
    36Ôćĺ                return True
    37Ôćĺ        except Exception as e:
    38Ôćĺ            logger.debug(f"Captcha selector check failed for '{selector}': {e}")
    39Ôćĺ            continue
    40Ôćĺ    return False
    41Ôćĺ
    42Ôćĺ
    43Ôćĺasync def check_captcha(
    44Ôćĺ    page: Page,
    45Ôćĺ    report_to_rate_limiter: bool = False,
    46Ôćĺ) -> None:
    47Ôćĺ    """Detect captcha elements on page and pause for manual resolution.
    48Ôćĺ
    49Ôćĺ    In Web mode (emit_progress callback set), polls until captcha disappears.
    50Ôćĺ    In CLI mode, blocks on stdin for user to solve manually.
    51Ôćĺ    """
    52Ôćĺ    for selector in CAPTCHA_SELECTORS:
    53Ôćĺ        try:
    54Ôćĺ            elem = await page.query_selector(selector)
    55Ôćĺ            if elem and await elem.is_visible():
    56Ôćĺ                if report_to_rate_limiter:
    57Ôćĺ                    from src.utils.rate_limiter import get_rate_limiter
    58Ôćĺ                    rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()
    59Ôćĺ                    rate_limiter.report_captcha()
    60Ôćĺ
    61Ôćĺ                emit_progress("captcha_detected")
    62Ôćĺ                logger.warning("Captcha detected ÔÇö waiting for user to solve in Chrome")
    63Ôćĺ
    64Ôćĺ                # Poll until captcha disappears (works for both Web and CLI)
    65Ôćĺ                max_wait = 300  # 5 minutes
    66Ôćĺ                elapsed = 0
    67Ôćĺ                while elapsed < max_wait:
    68Ôćĺ                    await asyncio.sleep(3)
    69Ôćĺ                    elapsed += 3
    70Ôćĺ                    if not await _captcha_still_visible(page):
    71Ôćĺ                        logger.info("Captcha resolved")
    72Ôćĺ                        await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
    73Ôćĺ                        return
    74Ôćĺ                logger.error("Captcha timeout after 5 minutes")
    75Ôćĺ                return
    76Ôćĺ        except Exception as e:
    77Ôćĺ            logger.debug(f"Captcha detection failed for '{selector}': {e}")
    78Ôćĺ            continue
    79Ôćĺ

1Ôćĺ"""Logging configuration using Loguru."""
     2Ôćĺ
     3Ôćĺimport sys
     4Ôćĺfrom pathlib import Path
     5Ôćĺ
     6Ôćĺfrom loguru import logger
     7Ôćĺ
     8Ôćĺfrom src.utils.config import get_config
     9Ôćĺ
    10Ôćĺ
    11Ôćĺdef setup_logger():
    12Ôćĺ    """Configure Loguru logger with settings from config."""
    13Ôćĺ    config = get_config()
    14Ôćĺ
    15Ôćĺ    logger.remove()
    16Ôćĺ
    17Ôćĺ    log_level = config.get('logging.level', 'INFO')
    18Ôćĺ    log_format = config.get('logging.format')
    19Ôćĺ    rotation = config.get('logging.rotation', '10 MB')
    20Ôćĺ    retention = config.get('logging.retention', '30 days')
    21Ôćĺ    log_dir = Path(config.get('data.log_dir', 'data/logs'))
    22Ôćĺ
    23Ôćĺ    log_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    24Ôćĺ
    25Ôćĺ    logger.add(
    26Ôćĺ        sys.stdout,
    27Ôćĺ        format=log_format,
    28Ôćĺ        level=log_level,
    29Ôćĺ        colorize=True,
    30Ôćĺ    )
    31Ôćĺ
    32Ôćĺ    logger.add(
    33Ôćĺ        log_dir / "boss_assistant_{time:YYYY-MM-DD}.log",
    34Ôćĺ        format=log_format,
    35Ôćĺ        level=log_level,
    36Ôćĺ        rotation=rotation,
    37Ôćĺ        retention=retention,
    38Ôćĺ        encoding='utf-8',
    39Ôćĺ    )
    40Ôćĺ
    41Ôćĺ    logger.info(f"Logger initialized with level: {log_level}")
    42Ôćĺ

1Ôćĺ"""Ollama LLM-based candidate scoring.
     2Ôćĺ
     3ÔćĺProvides optional deep semantic evaluation of candidates against job
     4Ôćĺdescriptions using a local Ollama instance. All functions are fault-tolerant:
     5Ôćĺerrors return None and never block the pipeline.
     6Ôćĺ"""
     7Ôćĺ
     8Ôćĺimport json
     9Ôćĺimport re
    10Ôćĺfrom typing import Any, Dict, List, Optional
    11Ôćĺ
    12Ôćĺimport httpx
    13Ôćĺfrom loguru import logger
    14Ôćĺ
    15Ôćĺ
    16Ôćĺdef check_ollama_available(endpoint: str = "http://127.0.0.1:11434") -> bool:

    45Ôćĺ
    46Ôćĺ    return f"""ńŻáŠś»ńŞÇńŻŹŔÁäŠĚ▒ŠŐÇŠť»ŠőŤŔüśńŞôň«ÂŃÇéŔ»ĚŠá╣ŠŹ«ŔüîńŻŹŠĆĆŔ┐░Ŕ»äń╝░ń╗ąńŞőňÇÖÚÇëń║║šÜäňî╣ÚůŹšĘőň║ŽŃÇé
    47Ôćĺ
    48Ôćĺ## ŔüîńŻŹŠĆĆŔ┐░

    63Ôćĺ- ňĚąńŻťš╗ĆňÄć:
    64Ôćĺ{work_exp_text or 'Šť¬ŠĆÉńżŤ'}
    65Ôćĺ
    66Ôćĺ## Ŕ»äń╝░ŔŽüŠ▒é
    67Ôćĺš╗╝ňÉłŔÇâŔÖĹŠŐÇŔâŻňî╣ÚůŹň║ŽŃÇüš╗ĆÚ¬îšŤŞňů│ŠÇžŃÇüňşŽňÄćŔâîŠÖ»ŃÇüŔüîńŞÜňĆĹň▒ĽŔŻĘŔ┐╣´╝îš╗Öňç║0-100ňłćšÜäŔ»äňłćŃÇé
    68Ôćĺ
    69ÔćĺŔ»ĚńŞąŠá╝Šîëń╗ąńŞőJSONŠá╝ň╝ĆŔ┐öňŤ×´╝łńŞŹŔŽüňîůňÉźňůÂń╗ľňćůň«╣´╝ë:
    70Ôćĺ{{"score": <0-100šÜäŠĽ┤ŠĽ░>, "explanation": "<ńŞÇňĆąŔ»ŁńŞşŠľçŔ»┤ŠśÄ>"}}"""
    71Ôćĺ
    72Ôćĺ
    73Ôćĺdef _parse_llm_response(text: str) -> Optional[Dict[str, Any]]:
    74Ôćĺ    """Parse LLM response with multiple fallback strategies."""
    75Ôćĺ    if not text:
    76Ôćĺ        return None
    77Ôćĺ
    78Ôćĺ    # Strategy 1: Direct JSON parse
    79Ôćĺ    try:
    80Ôćĺ        result = json.loads(text.strip())
    81Ôćĺ        if isinstance(result, dict) and "score" in result:
    82Ôćĺ            return _validate_result(result)
    83Ôćĺ    except json.JSONDecodeError:
    84Ôćĺ        pass
    85Ôćĺ
    86Ôćĺ    # Strategy 2: Extract from code block
    87Ôćĺ    code_block = re.search(r"```(?:json)?\s*(\{.*?\})\s*```", text, re.DOTALL)
    88Ôćĺ    if code_block:
    89Ôćĺ        try:
    90Ôćĺ            result = json.loads(code_block.group(1))
    91Ôćĺ            if isinstance(result, dict) and "score" in result:
    92Ôćĺ                return _validate_result(result)
    93Ôćĺ        except json.JSONDecodeError:
    94Ôćĺ            pass
    95Ôćĺ
    96Ôćĺ    # Strategy 3: Find JSON object in text
    97Ôćĺ    json_match = re.search(r"\{[^{}]*\"score\"\s*:\s*\d+[^{}]*\}", text)
    98Ôćĺ    if json_match:
    99Ôćĺ        try:
   100Ôćĺ            result = json.loads(json_match.group(0))
   101Ôćĺ            return _validate_result(result)
   102Ôćĺ        except json.JSONDecodeError:
   103Ôćĺ            pass
   104Ôćĺ
   105Ôćĺ    # Strategy 4: Regex extract score number
   106Ôćĺ    score_match = re.search(r"[\"']?score[\"']?\s*[:´╝Ü]\s*(\d+)", text)
   107Ôćĺ    if score_match:
   108Ôćĺ        score = int(score_match.group(1))
   109Ôćĺ        explanation_match = re.search(r"[\"']?explanation[\"']?\s*[:´╝Ü]\s*[\"']([^\"']+)[\"']", text)
   110Ôćĺ        explanation = explanation_match.group(1) if explanation_match else ""
   111Ôćĺ        return _validate_result({"score": score, "explanation": explanation})
   112Ôćĺ
   113Ôćĺ    logger.warning(f"Failed to parse LLM response: {text[:200]}")
   114Ôćĺ    return None
   115Ôćĺ
   116Ôćĺ
   117Ôćĺdef _validate_result(result: Dict[str, Any]) -> Optional[Dict[str, Any]]:
   118Ôćĺ    """Validate and clamp the score."""
   119Ôćĺ    try:
   120Ôćĺ        score = int(result.get("score", -1))
   121Ôćĺ        if 0 <= score <= 100:
   122Ôćĺ            return {
   123Ôćĺ                "score": score,
   124Ôćĺ                "explanation": str(result.get("explanation", "")),
   125Ôćĺ            }
   126Ôćĺ    except (ValueError, TypeError):
   127Ôćĺ        pass
   128Ôćĺ    return None
   129Ôćĺ
   130Ôćĺ
   131Ôćĺdef llm_score_candidate(
   132Ôćĺ    candidate_info: Dict[str, Any],
   133Ôćĺ    jd_config: Dict[str, Any],
   134Ôćĺ    endpoint: str = "http://127.0.0.1:11434",
   135Ôćĺ    model: str = "qwen2.5:7b",
   136Ôćĺ    timeout_seconds: int = 60,
   137Ôćĺ) -> Optional[Dict[str, Any]]:
   138Ôćĺ    """Score a single candidate using Ollama LLM.
   139Ôćĺ
   140Ôćĺ    Returns:
   141Ôćĺ        {"score": 0-100, "explanation": "..."} or None on failure.
   142Ôćĺ    """
   143Ôćĺ    prompt = _build_scoring_prompt(candidate_info, jd_config)
   144Ôćĺ
   145Ôćĺ    try:
   146Ôćĺ        resp = httpx.post(
   147Ôćĺ            f"{endpoint.rstrip('/')}/api/chat",
   148Ôćĺ            json={
   149Ôćĺ                "model": model,
   150Ôćĺ                "messages": [{"role": "user", "content": prompt}],
   151Ôćĺ                "stream": False,
   152Ôćĺ                "options": {"temperature": 0.1},
   153Ôćĺ            },
   154Ôćĺ            timeout=timeout_seconds,
   155Ôćĺ        )
   156Ôćĺ        resp.raise_for_status()
   157Ôćĺ        data = resp.json()
   158Ôćĺ        content = data.get("message", {}).get("content", "")
   159Ôćĺ        result = _parse_llm_response(content)
   160Ôćĺ        if result:
   161Ôćĺ            logger.debug(f"LLM scored {candidate_info.get('name', '?')}: {result['score']}")
   162Ôćĺ        return result
   163Ôćĺ    except Exception as e:
   164Ôćĺ        logger.warning(f"LLM scoring failed for {candidate_info.get('name', '?')}: {e}")
   165Ôćĺ        return None
   166Ôćĺ
   167Ôćĺ
   168Ôćĺdef llm_score_candidates_batch(
   169Ôćĺ    candidates_info: List[Dict[str, Any]],
   170Ôćĺ    jd_config: Dict[str, Any],
   171Ôćĺ    endpoint: str = "http://127.0.0.1:11434",
   172Ôćĺ    model: str = "qwen2.5:7b",
   173Ôćĺ    timeout_seconds: int = 60,
   174Ôćĺ) -> List[Optional[Dict[str, Any]]]:
   175Ôćĺ    """Score multiple candidates sequentially.
   176Ôćĺ
   177Ôćĺ    Returns:
   178Ôćĺ        List of results, same length as input. None for failed entries.
   179Ôćĺ    """
   180Ôćĺ    results = []
   181Ôćĺ    for i, info in enumerate(candidates_info):
   182Ôćĺ        logger.info(f"LLM scoring candidate {i+1}/{len(candidates_info)}: {info.get('name', '?')}")
   183Ôćĺ        result = llm_score_candidate(info, jd_config, endpoint, model, timeout_seconds)
   184Ôćĺ        results.append(result)
   185Ôćĺ    return results
   186Ôćĺ

1Ôćĺ"""Serial browser task queue with priority support.
     2Ôćĺ
     3ÔćĺAll browser operations go through this queue to ensure only one
     4Ôćĺbrowser action runs at a time (Chrome CDP is a serial resource).
     5ÔćĺNon-browser operations (DB queries, template listing) bypass the queue.
     6Ôćĺ"""
     7Ôćĺ
     8Ôćĺimport asyncio
     9Ôćĺimport uuid
    10Ôćĺfrom datetime import datetime, timezone, timedelta
    11Ôćĺfrom enum import IntEnum
    12Ôćĺfrom typing import Any, Awaitable, Callable, Dict, Optional
    13Ôćĺ
    14Ôćĺfrom loguru import logger
    15Ôćĺ
    16Ôćĺfrom src.utils.progress import set_progress_callback, reset_progress_callback
    17Ôćĺ
    18Ôćĺ
    19Ôćĺclass TaskPriority(IntEnum):
    20Ôćĺ    """Task priority levels. Lower value = higher priority."""
    21Ôćĺ    HIGH = 1      # Status checks, auth
    22Ôćĺ    NORMAL = 5    # Search, message
    23Ôćĺ    LOW = 10      # Pipeline (long-running)
    24Ôćĺ
    25Ôćĺ
    26Ôćĺclass TaskStatus:
    27Ôćĺ    QUEUED = "queued"
    28Ôćĺ    RUNNING = "running"
    29Ôćĺ    COMPLETED = "completed"
    30Ôćĺ    FAILED = "failed"
    31Ôćĺ    CANCELLED = "cancelled"
    32Ôćĺ
    33Ôćĺ
    34Ôćĺclass BrowserTask:
    35Ôćĺ    """A task to be executed in the browser queue."""
    36Ôćĺ
    37Ôćĺ    def __init__(
    38Ôćĺ        self,
    39Ôćĺ        name: str,
    40Ôćĺ        coroutine_factory: Callable[[], Awaitable[Any]],
    41Ôćĺ        priority: TaskPriority = TaskPriority.NORMAL,
    42Ôćĺ        task_id: Optional[str] = None,
    43Ôćĺ    ):
    44Ôćĺ        self.task_id = task_id or str(uuid.uuid4())[:8]
    45Ôćĺ        self.name = name
    46Ôćĺ        self.coroutine_factory = coroutine_factory
    47Ôćĺ        self.priority = priority
    48Ôćĺ        self.status = TaskStatus.QUEUED
    49Ôćĺ        self.result: Any = None
    50Ôćĺ        self.error: Optional[str] = None
    51Ôćĺ        self.created_at = datetime.now(timezone.utc)
    52Ôćĺ        self.started_at: Optional[datetime] = None
    53Ôćĺ        self.completed_at: Optional[datetime] = None
    54Ôćĺ        self._done_event = asyncio.Event()
    55Ôćĺ        self.cancel_event = asyncio.Event()
    56Ôćĺ
    57Ôćĺ    def __lt__(self, other: 'BrowserTask') -> bool:
    58Ôćĺ        """Compare by (priority, creation time) for PriorityQueue."""
    59Ôćĺ        if self.priority != other.priority:
    60Ôćĺ            return self.priority < other.priority
    61Ôćĺ        return self.created_at < other.created_at
    62Ôćĺ
    63Ôćĺ    async def wait(self, timeout: Optional[float] = None) -> None:
    64Ôćĺ        """Wait for task completion."""
    65Ôćĺ        if timeout:
    66Ôćĺ            await asyncio.wait_for(self._done_event.wait(), timeout=timeout)
    67Ôćĺ        else:
    68Ôćĺ            await self._done_event.wait()
    69Ôćĺ
    70Ôćĺ    def mark_done(self) -> None:
    71Ôćĺ        self._done_event.set()
    72Ôćĺ
    73Ôćĺ    def to_dict(self) -> dict:
    74Ôćĺ        return {
    75Ôćĺ            "task_id": self.task_id,
    76Ôćĺ            "name": self.name,
    77Ôćĺ            "status": self.status,
    78Ôćĺ            "priority": self.priority.name,
    79Ôćĺ            "created_at": self.created_at.isoformat(),
    80Ôćĺ            "started_at": self.started_at.isoformat() if self.started_at else None,
    81Ôćĺ            "completed_at": self.completed_at.isoformat() if self.completed_at else None,
    82Ôćĺ            "error": self.error,
    83Ôćĺ        }
    84Ôćĺ
    85Ôćĺ
    86Ôćĺclass TaskQueue:
    87Ôćĺ    """Async serial task queue for browser operations.
    88Ôćĺ
    89Ôćĺ    Uses asyncio.PriorityQueue so higher-priority tasks run first.
    90Ôćĺ    A single background worker consumes tasks one at a time.
    91Ôćĺ    Progress is injected via ContextVar and delivered through per-task
    92Ôćĺ    asyncio.Queue for SSE streaming.
    93Ôćĺ    """
    94Ôćĺ
    95Ôćĺ    def __init__(self):
    96Ôćĺ        self._queue: asyncio.PriorityQueue[BrowserTask] = asyncio.PriorityQueue()
    97Ôćĺ        self._worker_task: Optional[asyncio.Task] = None
    98Ôćĺ        self._tasks: Dict[str, BrowserTask] = {}
    99Ôćĺ        self._progress_queues: Dict[str, asyncio.Queue] = {}
   100Ôćĺ        self._running: bool = False
   101Ôćĺ        self._current_task: Optional[BrowserTask] = None
   102Ôćĺ        self._completed_count: int = 0
   103Ôćĺ
   104Ôćĺ    async def start(self) -> None:
   105Ôćĺ        """Start the background worker."""
   106Ôćĺ        if self._running:
   107Ôćĺ            return
   108Ôćĺ        self._running = True
   109Ôćĺ        self._worker_task = asyncio.create_task(self._worker())
   110Ôćĺ        logger.info("Task queue worker started")
   111Ôćĺ
   112Ôćĺ    async def stop(self) -> None:
   113Ôćĺ        """Stop the background worker."""
   114Ôćĺ        self._running = False
   115Ôćĺ        # Cancel running task
   116Ôćĺ        if self._current_task and self._current_task.cancel_event:
   117Ôćĺ            self._current_task.cancel_event.set()
   118Ôćĺ        if self._worker_task:
   119Ôćĺ            self._worker_task.cancel()
   120Ôćĺ            try:
   121Ôćĺ                await self._worker_task
   122Ôćĺ            except asyncio.CancelledError:
   123Ôćĺ                pass
   124Ôćĺ            finally:
   125Ôćĺ                self._worker_task = None
   126Ôćĺ        logger.info("Task queue worker stopped")
   127Ôćĺ
   128Ôćĺ    async def submit(self, task: BrowserTask) -> BrowserTask:
   129Ôćĺ        """Submit a task to the queue."""
   130Ôćĺ        self._tasks[task.task_id] = task
   131Ôćĺ        self._progress_queues[task.task_id] = asyncio.Queue()
   132Ôćĺ        await self._queue.put(task)
   133Ôćĺ        logger.info(f"Task queued: {task.task_id} ({task.name}) priority={task.priority.name}")
   134Ôćĺ        return task
   135Ôćĺ
   136Ôćĺ    def get_task(self, task_id: str) -> Optional[BrowserTask]:
   137Ôćĺ        return self._tasks.get(task_id)
   138Ôćĺ
   139Ôćĺ    @property
   140Ôćĺ    def is_busy(self) -> bool:
   141Ôćĺ        return self._current_task is not None
   142Ôćĺ
   143Ôćĺ    @property
   144Ôćĺ    def current_task(self) -> Optional[BrowserTask]:
   145Ôćĺ        return self._current_task
   146Ôćĺ
   147Ôćĺ    @property
   148Ôćĺ    def current_task_id(self) -> Optional[str]:
   149Ôćĺ        return self._current_task.task_id if self._current_task else None
   150Ôćĺ
   151Ôćĺ    @property
   152Ôćĺ    def queue_size(self) -> int:
   153Ôćĺ        return self._queue.qsize()
   154Ôćĺ
   155Ôćĺ    def get_queue_status(self) -> dict:
   156Ôćĺ        pending = [
   157Ôćĺ            t.to_dict() for t in self._tasks.values()
   158Ôćĺ            if t.status == TaskStatus.QUEUED
   159Ôćĺ        ]
   160Ôćĺ        return {
   161Ôćĺ            "queue_size": self._queue.qsize(),
   162Ôćĺ            "current_task": self._current_task.to_dict() if self._current_task else None,
   163Ôćĺ            "pending_tasks": pending,
   164Ôćĺ            "total_tracked": len(self._tasks),
   165Ôćĺ        }
   166Ôćĺ
   167Ôćĺ    async def cancel_task(self, task_id: str) -> bool:
   168Ôćĺ        """Cancel a specific task (running or queued)."""
   169Ôćĺ        task = self._tasks.get(task_id)
   170Ôćĺ        if not task:
   171Ôćĺ            return False
   172Ôćĺ        task.cancel_event.set()
   173Ôćĺ        if task.status == TaskStatus.QUEUED:
   174Ôćĺ            task.status = TaskStatus.CANCELLED
   175Ôćĺ            task.completed_at = datetime.now(timezone.utc)
   176Ôćĺ            task.mark_done()
   177Ôćĺ        logger.info(f"Cancel requested for task {task_id}")
   178Ôćĺ        return True
   179Ôćĺ
   180Ôćĺ    async def cancel_current(self) -> bool:
   181Ôćĺ        """Cancel the currently running task."""
   182Ôćĺ        if not self._current_task:
   183Ôćĺ            return False
   184Ôćĺ        return await self.cancel_task(self._current_task.task_id)
   185Ôćĺ
   186Ôćĺ    # --- Progress / SSE ---
   187Ôćĺ
   188Ôćĺ    def _make_progress_callback(self, task_id: str):
   189Ôćĺ        """Create a progress callback bound to a task's SSE queue."""
   190Ôćĺ        async def callback(event: str, data: Dict[str, Any] = None):
   191Ôćĺ            queue = self._progress_queues.get(task_id)
   192Ôćĺ            if queue:
   193Ôćĺ                await queue.put({"event": event, "data": data or {}})
   194Ôćĺ        return callback
   195Ôćĺ
   196Ôćĺ    async def subscribe_progress(self, task_id: str):
   197Ôćĺ        """Async generator yielding progress events for SSE."""
   198Ôćĺ        queue = self._progress_queues.get(task_id)
   199Ôćĺ        if not queue:
   200Ôćĺ            yield {"event": "error", "data": {"message": "Task not found"}}
   201Ôćĺ            return
   202Ôćĺ
   203Ôćĺ        while True:
   204Ôćĺ            try:
   205Ôćĺ                msg = await asyncio.wait_for(queue.get(), timeout=30)
   206Ôćĺ                yield msg
   207Ôćĺ                if msg["event"] == "done":
   208Ôćĺ                    break
   209Ôćĺ            except asyncio.TimeoutError:
   210Ôćĺ                yield {"event": "keepalive", "data": {}}
   211Ôćĺ
   212Ôćĺ    # --- Worker ---
   213Ôćĺ
   214Ôćĺ    async def _worker(self) -> None:
   215Ôćĺ        """Background worker: dequeue and execute tasks serially."""
   216Ôćĺ        while self._running:
   217Ôćĺ            try:
   218Ôćĺ                task = await asyncio.wait_for(self._queue.get(), timeout=1.0)
   219Ôćĺ            except asyncio.TimeoutError:
   220Ôćĺ                continue
   221Ôćĺ            except asyncio.CancelledError:
   222Ôćĺ                break
   223Ôćĺ
   224Ôćĺ            # Skip cancelled tasks that were cancelled while queued
   225Ôćĺ            if task.cancel_event.is_set():
   226Ôćĺ                if task.status != TaskStatus.CANCELLED:
   227Ôćĺ                    task.status = TaskStatus.CANCELLED
   228Ôćĺ                    task.completed_at = datetime.now(timezone.utc)
   229Ôćĺ                    task.mark_done()
   230Ôćĺ                self._queue.task_done()
   231Ôćĺ                continue
   232Ôćĺ
   233Ôćĺ            self._current_task = task
   234Ôćĺ            task.status = TaskStatus.RUNNING
   235Ôćĺ            task.started_at = datetime.now(timezone.utc)
   236Ôćĺ            logger.info(f"Task running: {task.task_id} ({task.name})")
   237Ôćĺ
   238Ôćĺ            token = set_progress_callback(self._make_progress_callback(task.task_id))
   239Ôćĺ            try:
   240Ôćĺ                task.result = await task.coroutine_factory()
   241Ôćĺ                task.status = TaskStatus.COMPLETED
   242Ôćĺ                logger.info(f"Task completed: {task.task_id}")
   243Ôćĺ            except asyncio.CancelledError:
   244Ôćĺ                task.status = TaskStatus.CANCELLED
   245Ôćĺ                task.error = "cancelled"
   246Ôćĺ                logger.warning(f"Task cancelled: {task.task_id}")
   247Ôćĺ            except Exception as e:
   248Ôćĺ                task.status = TaskStatus.FAILED
   249Ôćĺ                task.error = str(e)
   250Ôćĺ                logger.error(f"Task failed: {task.task_id} ÔÇö {e}")
   251Ôćĺ            finally:
   252Ôćĺ                reset_progress_callback(token)
   253Ôćĺ                task.completed_at = datetime.now(timezone.utc)
   254Ôćĺ                task.mark_done()
   255Ôćĺ                # Send single done event with final status for SSE
   256Ôćĺ                queue = self._progress_queues.get(task.task_id)
   257Ôćĺ                if queue:
   258Ôćĺ                    done_data = {"status": task.status}
   259Ôćĺ                    if task.error:
   260Ôćĺ                        done_data["message"] = task.error
   261Ôćĺ                    await queue.put({"event": "done", "data": done_data})
   262Ôćĺ                self._current_task = None
   263Ôćĺ                self._queue.task_done()
   264Ôćĺ
   265Ôćĺ                self._completed_count += 1
   266Ôćĺ                if self._completed_count % 10 == 0:
   267Ôćĺ                    self._cleanup_old_tasks()
   268Ôćĺ
   269Ôćĺ    def _cleanup_old_tasks(self, max_age_hours: int = 24) -> int:
   270Ôćĺ        cutoff = datetime.now(timezone.utc) - timedelta(hours=max_age_hours)
   271Ôćĺ        to_remove = [
   272Ôćĺ            tid for tid, t in self._tasks.items()
   273Ôćĺ            if t.status in (TaskStatus.COMPLETED, TaskStatus.FAILED, TaskStatus.CANCELLED)
   274Ôćĺ            and t.completed_at and t.completed_at < cutoff
   275Ôćĺ        ]
   276Ôćĺ        for tid in to_remove:
   277Ôćĺ            del self._tasks[tid]
   278Ôćĺ            self._progress_queues.pop(tid, None)
   279Ôćĺ        if to_remove:
   280Ôćĺ            logger.debug(f"Cleaned up {len(to_remove)} old tasks")
   281Ôćĺ        return len(to_remove)
   282Ôćĺ

1Ôćĺ"""ContextVars-based progress emission.
     2Ôćĺ
     3ÔćĺAllows any module in the call stack to emit progress events without
     4Ôćĺreceiving a callback parameter. In CLI mode the context var is None
     5Ôćĺand calls are silently ignored. In Web mode, the TaskQueue worker
     6Ôćĺsets the callback before running each task.
     7Ôćĺ"""
     8Ôćĺ
     9Ôćĺimport asyncio
    10Ôćĺimport contextvars
    11Ôćĺfrom typing import Any, Callable, Optional
    12Ôćĺ
    13Ôćĺfrom loguru import logger
    14Ôćĺ
    15Ôćĺ_progress_ctx: contextvars.ContextVar[Optional[Callable]] = contextvars.ContextVar(
    16Ôćĺ    '_progress_ctx', default=None
    17Ôćĺ)
    18Ôćĺ
    19Ôćĺ
    20Ôćĺdef set_progress_callback(callback: Optional[Callable]) -> contextvars.Token:
    21Ôćĺ    """Set the progress callback for the current async context."""
    22Ôćĺ    return _progress_ctx.set(callback)
    23Ôćĺ
    24Ôćĺ
    25Ôćĺdef reset_progress_callback(token: contextvars.Token) -> None:
    26Ôćĺ    """Reset the progress callback to its previous value."""
    27Ôćĺ    _progress_ctx.reset(token)
    28Ôćĺ
    29Ôćĺ
    30Ôćĺdef emit_progress(event: str, **data: Any) -> None:
    31Ôćĺ    """Emit a progress event if a callback is registered.
    32Ôćĺ
    33Ôćĺ    Safe to call from anywhere ÔÇö does nothing in CLI mode.
    34Ôćĺ    In Web mode, schedules the async callback as a fire-and-forget task.
    35Ôćĺ    """
    36Ôćĺ    cb = _progress_ctx.get()
    37Ôćĺ    if cb is not None:
    38Ôćĺ        try:
    39Ôćĺ            loop = asyncio.get_running_loop()
    40Ôćĺ            task = loop.create_task(cb(event, data))
    41Ôćĺ            task.add_done_callback(_handle_task_exception)
    42Ôćĺ        except RuntimeError:
    43Ôćĺ            pass  # No running event loop
    44Ôćĺ
    45Ôćĺ
    46Ôćĺdef _handle_task_exception(task: asyncio.Task) -> None:
    47Ôćĺ    """Log exceptions from fire-and-forget progress tasks."""
    48Ôćĺ    try:
    49Ôćĺ        task.result()
    50Ôćĺ    except asyncio.CancelledError:
    51Ôćĺ        pass
    52Ôćĺ    except Exception as e:
    53Ôćĺ        logger.error(f"Error in progress callback: {e}")
    54Ôćĺ

1Ôćĺ"""Pydantic schemas for Web request validation."""
     2Ôćĺ
     3Ôćĺfrom typing import List, Optional
     4Ôćĺ
     5Ôćĺfrom pydantic import BaseModel, field_validator
     6Ôćĺ
     7Ôćĺ
     8Ôćĺclass PipelineParams(BaseModel):
     9Ôćĺ    """Validated pipeline start parameters."""
    10Ôćĺ    keywords: List[str]
    11Ôćĺ    template_name: str
    12Ôćĺ    location: Optional[str] = None
    13Ôćĺ    pages: int = 3
    14Ôćĺ    batch_pages: int = 0
    15Ôćĺ    experience: Optional[str] = None
    16Ôćĺ    education: Optional[str] = None
    17Ôćĺ    salary: Optional[str] = None
    18Ôćĺ    skip_messaged: bool = True

    20Ôćĺ
    21Ôćĺ    @field_validator('keywords', mode='before')
    22Ôćĺ    @classmethod
    23Ôćĺ    def parse_keywords(cls, v):
    24Ôćĺ        if isinstance(v, str):
    25Ôćĺ            return [k.strip() for k in v.split(",") if k.strip()]
    26Ôćĺ        return v
    27Ôćĺ
    28Ôćĺ    @field_validator('keywords')
    29Ôćĺ    @classmethod
    30Ôćĺ    def keywords_not_empty(cls, v):
    31Ôćĺ        if not v:
    32Ôćĺ            raise ValueError("Ŕ»ĚŔżôňůąňů│Úö«Ŕ»Ź")
    33Ôćĺ        return v
    34Ôćĺ
    35Ôćĺ    @field_validator('template_name')

    37Ôćĺ    def template_not_empty(cls, v):
    38Ôćĺ        if not v or not v.strip():
    39Ôćĺ            raise ValueError("Ŕ»ĚÚÇëŠőęŠÂłŠü»ŠĘíŠŁ┐")
    40Ôćĺ        return v.strip()
    41Ôćĺ
    42Ôćĺ    @field_validator('pages')
    43Ôćĺ    @classmethod
    44Ôćĺ    def pages_range(cls, v):
    45Ôćĺ        return max(1, min(v, 20))
    46Ôćĺ
    47Ôćĺ    @field_validator('batch_pages')

    51Ôćĺ
    52Ôćĺ    @field_validator('location', 'experience', 'education', 'salary', mode='before')

    55Ôćĺ        if isinstance(v, str) and not v.strip():
    56Ôćĺ            return None
    57Ôćĺ        return v
    58Ôćĺ
    59Ôćĺ
    60Ôćĺclass SearchParams(BaseModel):
    61Ôćĺ    """Validated search parameters."""
    62Ôćĺ    keywords: List[str]
    63Ôćĺ    location: Optional[str] = None

    65Ôćĺ    experience: Optional[str] = None

    69Ôćĺ    @field_validator('keywords', mode='before')

    76Ôćĺ    @field_validator('keywords')

    78Ôćĺ    def keywords_not_empty(cls, v):
    79Ôćĺ        if not v:
    80Ôćĺ            raise ValueError("Ŕ»ĚŔżôňůąŠÉťš┤óňů│Úö«Ŕ»Ź")

    83Ôćĺ    @field_validator('pages')
    84Ôćĺ    @classmethod

    86Ôćĺ        return max(1, min(v, 20))
    87Ôćĺ
    88Ôćĺ    @field_validator('location', 'experience', 'education', 'salary', mode='before')
    89Ôćĺ    @classmethod
    90Ôćĺ    def empty_str_to_none(cls, v):
    91Ôćĺ        if isinstance(v, str) and not v.strip():

1Ôćĺ"""FastAPI application factory for Boss Assistant Web service."""
     2Ôćĺ
     3Ôćĺfrom contextlib import asynccontextmanager
     4Ôćĺfrom pathlib import Path
     5Ôćĺ
     6Ôćĺfrom fastapi import FastAPI, Request
     7Ôćĺfrom fastapi.staticfiles import StaticFiles
     8Ôćĺfrom fastapi.templating import Jinja2Templates
     9Ôćĺfrom loguru import logger
    10Ôćĺ
    11Ôćĺfrom src.web.services.chrome_manager import ChromeProcessManager
    12Ôćĺfrom src.web.task_queue import TaskQueue
    13Ôćĺ
    14ÔćĺWEB_DIR = Path(__file__).resolve().parent
    15ÔćĺTEMPLATES_DIR = WEB_DIR / "templates"
    16ÔćĺSTATIC_DIR = WEB_DIR / "static"
    17Ôćĺ
    18Ôćĺ# Shared instances
    19Ôćĺchrome_manager = ChromeProcessManager()
    20Ôćĺtask_queue = TaskQueue()
    21Ôćĺtemplates = Jinja2Templates(directory=str(TEMPLATES_DIR))
    22Ôćĺ
    23Ôćĺ
    24Ôćĺ@asynccontextmanager
    25Ôćĺasync def lifespan(app: FastAPI):
    26Ôćĺ    """Application lifespan: start/stop Chrome and DB."""
    27Ôćĺ    logger.info("Starting Boss Assistant Web service...")
    28Ôćĺ
    29Ôćĺ    # Initialize database
    30Ôćĺ    from src.models.database import get_db_manager
    31Ôćĺ    get_db_manager()
    32Ôćĺ
    33Ôćĺ    # Start Chrome and task queue
    34Ôćĺ    await chrome_manager.start()
    35Ôćĺ    await task_queue.start()
    36Ôćĺ
    37Ôćĺ    yield
    38Ôćĺ
    39Ôćĺ    # Shutdown
    40Ôćĺ    logger.info("Shutting down Boss Assistant Web service...")
    41Ôćĺ    await task_queue.stop()
    42Ôćĺ    await chrome_manager.stop()
    43Ôćĺ
    44Ôćĺ    # Close browser connection
    45Ôćĺ    from src.core.browser import BrowserManager
    46Ôćĺ    await BrowserManager.reset_instance()
    47Ôćĺ
    48Ôćĺ    logger.info("Shutdown complete")
    49Ôćĺ
    50Ôćĺ
    51Ôćĺdef create_app() -> FastAPI:
    52Ôćĺ    """Create and configure the FastAPI application."""
    53Ôćĺ    app = FastAPI(
    54Ôćĺ        title="Boss Assistant",
    55Ôćĺ        description="BossšŤ┤ŔüśňŹŐŔç¬ňŐĘŠőŤŔüśňŐęŠëő",
    56Ôćĺ        lifespan=lifespan,
    57Ôćĺ    )
    58Ôćĺ
    59Ôćĺ    # Mount static files
    60Ôćĺ    app.mount("/static", StaticFiles(directory=str(STATIC_DIR)), name="static")
    61Ôćĺ
    62Ôćĺ    # Register routes
    63Ôćĺ    from src.web.routes.dashboard import router as dashboard_router
    64Ôćĺ    from src.web.routes.auth import router as auth_router
    65Ôćĺ    from src.web.routes.search import router as search_router
    66Ôćĺ    from src.web.routes.candidates import router as candidates_router
    67Ôćĺ    from src.web.routes.messages import router as messages_router
    68Ôćĺ    from src.web.routes.pipeline import router as pipeline_router
    69Ôćĺ    from src.web.routes.export import router as export_router
    70Ôćĺ    from src.web.routes.templates import router as templates_router
    71Ôćĺ    from src.web.routes.settings import router as settings_router
    72Ôćĺ    from src.web.routes.status import router as status_router
    73Ôćĺ
    74Ôćĺ    app.include_router(dashboard_router)
    75Ôćĺ    app.include_router(auth_router, prefix="/auth", tags=["auth"])
    76Ôćĺ    app.include_router(search_router, prefix="/search", tags=["search"])
    77Ôćĺ    app.include_router(candidates_router, prefix="/candidates", tags=["candidates"])
    78Ôćĺ    app.include_router(messages_router, prefix="/messages", tags=["messages"])
    79Ôćĺ    app.include_router(pipeline_router, prefix="/pipeline", tags=["pipeline"])
    80Ôćĺ    app.include_router(export_router, prefix="/export", tags=["export"])
    81Ôćĺ    app.include_router(templates_router, prefix="/templates", tags=["templates"])
    82Ôćĺ    app.include_router(settings_router, prefix="/settings", tags=["settings"])
    83Ôćĺ    app.include_router(status_router, prefix="/status", tags=["status"])
    84Ôćĺ
    85Ôćĺ    return app
    86Ôćĺ

1Ôćĺ"""Chrome process lifecycle manager for Web service.
     2Ôćĺ
     3ÔćĺManages starting, health-checking, and restarting the Chrome browser
     4Ôćĺprocess with CDP enabled. Used by the Web service lifespan to ensure
     5ÔćĺChrome is always available for browser automation tasks.
     6Ôćĺ"""
     7Ôćĺ
     8Ôćĺimport asyncio
     9Ôćĺimport shutil
    10Ôćĺimport signal
    11Ôćĺimport subprocess
    12Ôćĺimport sys
    13Ôćĺfrom pathlib import Path
    14Ôćĺfrom typing import Optional
    15Ôćĺ
    16Ôćĺimport httpx
    17Ôćĺfrom loguru import logger
    18Ôćĺ
    19Ôćĺfrom src.utils.config import get_config
    20Ôćĺ
    21Ôćĺ
    22Ôćĺclass ChromeProcessManager:
    23Ôćĺ    """Manages the Chrome browser process for the Web service.
    24Ôćĺ
    25Ôćĺ    - Auto-starts Chrome in headed mode with --remote-debugging-port
    26Ôćĺ    - Periodically health-checks via CDP HTTP endpoint
    27Ôćĺ    - Auto-restarts Chrome if it crashes
    28Ôćĺ    - Gracefully terminates Chrome on shutdown
    29Ôćĺ    """
    30Ôćĺ
    31Ôćĺ    def __init__(self):
    32Ôćĺ        self._config = get_config()
    33Ôćĺ        self._process: Optional[subprocess.Popen] = None
    34Ôćĺ        self._health_task: Optional[asyncio.Task] = None
    35Ôćĺ        self._running = False
    36Ôćĺ
    37Ôćĺ    @property
    38Ôćĺ    def debug_port(self) -> int:
    39Ôćĺ        return self._config.get('web.chrome_debug_port', 9222)
    40Ôćĺ
    41Ôćĺ    @property
    42Ôćĺ    def user_data_dir(self) -> str:
    43Ôćĺ        return self._config.get('web.chrome_user_data_dir', 'data/.chrome-profile')
    44Ôćĺ
    45Ôćĺ    @property
    46Ôćĺ    def cdp_url(self) -> str:
    47Ôćĺ        return f'http://127.0.0.1:{self.debug_port}'
    48Ôćĺ
    49Ôćĺ    @property
    50Ôćĺ    def is_chrome_running(self) -> bool:
    51Ôćĺ        return self._process is not None and self._process.poll() is None
    52Ôćĺ
    53Ôćĺ    def _find_chrome_binary(self) -> str:
    54Ôćĺ        """Find Chrome binary on the current platform."""
    55Ôćĺ        if sys.platform == 'darwin':
    56Ôćĺ            candidates = [
    57Ôćĺ                '/Applications/Google Chrome.app/Contents/MacOS/Google Chrome',
    58Ôćĺ                '/Applications/Chromium.app/Contents/MacOS/Chromium',
    59Ôćĺ            ]
    60Ôćĺ        elif sys.platform == 'win32':
    61Ôćĺ            candidates = [
    62Ôćĺ                r'C:\Program Files\Google\Chrome\Application\chrome.exe',
    63Ôćĺ                r'C:\Program Files (x86)\Google\Chrome\Application\chrome.exe',
    64Ôćĺ            ]
    65Ôćĺ        else:
    66Ôćĺ            candidates = [
    67Ôćĺ                'google-chrome',
    68Ôćĺ                'google-chrome-stable',
    69Ôćĺ                'chromium',
    70Ôćĺ                'chromium-browser',
    71Ôćĺ            ]
    72Ôćĺ
    73Ôćĺ        for candidate in candidates:
    74Ôćĺ            if Path(candidate).exists() or shutil.which(candidate):
    75Ôćĺ                return candidate
    76Ôćĺ
    77Ôćĺ        raise RuntimeError(
    78Ôćĺ            'Chrome binary not found. Install Google Chrome or set the path manually.'
    79Ôćĺ        )
    80Ôćĺ
    81Ôćĺ    async def _check_cdp_health(self) -> bool:
    82Ôćĺ        """Check if Chrome CDP endpoint is responsive."""
    83Ôćĺ        try:
    84Ôćĺ            async with httpx.AsyncClient() as client:
    85Ôćĺ                resp = await client.get(
    86Ôćĺ                    f'{self.cdp_url}/json/version',
    87Ôćĺ                    timeout=5.0,
    88Ôćĺ                )
    89Ôćĺ                return resp.status_code == 200
    90Ôćĺ        except Exception:
    91Ôćĺ            return False
    92Ôćĺ
    93Ôćĺ    def _start_chrome_process(self) -> None:
    94Ôćĺ        """Start Chrome with CDP enabled."""
    95Ôćĺ        chrome_binary = self._find_chrome_binary()
    96Ôćĺ        user_data = Path(self.user_data_dir).resolve()
    97Ôćĺ        user_data.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    98Ôćĺ
    99Ôćĺ        args = [
   100Ôćĺ            chrome_binary,
   101Ôćĺ            f'--remote-debugging-port={self.debug_port}',
   102Ôćĺ            f'--user-data-dir={user_data}',
   103Ôćĺ            '--no-first-run',
   104Ôćĺ            '--no-default-browser-check',
   105Ôćĺ            '--disable-background-timer-throttling',
   106Ôćĺ            '--disable-backgrounding-occluded-windows',
   107Ôćĺ            '--disable-renderer-backgrounding',
   108Ôćĺ        ]
   109Ôćĺ
   110Ôćĺ        logger.info(f'Starting Chrome: {" ".join(args[:3])}...')
   111Ôćĺ        self._process = subprocess.Popen(
   112Ôćĺ            args,
   113Ôćĺ            stdout=subprocess.DEVNULL,
   114Ôćĺ            stderr=subprocess.DEVNULL,
   115Ôćĺ        )
   116Ôćĺ        logger.info(f'Chrome started with PID {self._process.pid}')
   117Ôćĺ
   118Ôćĺ    async def start(self) -> None:
   119Ôćĺ        """Start Chrome and begin health monitoring.
   120Ôćĺ
   121Ôćĺ        If Chrome is already running on the debug port (e.g. user started
   122Ôćĺ        it manually), we skip launching a new process and just monitor.
   123Ôćĺ        """
   124Ôćĺ        self._running = True
   125Ôćĺ
   126Ôćĺ        # Check if Chrome is already running on the port
   127Ôćĺ        if await self._check_cdp_health():
   128Ôćĺ            logger.info(f'Chrome already running on port {self.debug_port}, skipping launch')
   129Ôćĺ        elif self._config.get('web.chrome_auto_launch', True):
   130Ôćĺ            self._start_chrome_process()
   131Ôćĺ            # Wait for Chrome to be ready
   132Ôćĺ            for _ in range(30):
   133Ôćĺ                if await self._check_cdp_health():
   134Ôćĺ                    logger.info('Chrome CDP endpoint is ready')
   135Ôćĺ                    break
   136Ôćĺ                await asyncio.sleep(1)
   137Ôćĺ            else:
   138Ôćĺ                logger.error('Chrome failed to start within 30 seconds')
   139Ôćĺ        else:
   140Ôćĺ            logger.warning(
   141Ôćĺ                'Chrome auto-launch disabled and no Chrome detected on '
   142Ôćĺ                f'port {self.debug_port}'
   143Ôćĺ            )
   144Ôćĺ
   145Ôćĺ        # Start health check loop
   146Ôćĺ        self._health_task = asyncio.create_task(self._health_loop())
   147Ôćĺ
   148Ôćĺ    async def _health_loop(self) -> None:
   149Ôćĺ        """Periodically check Chrome health and restart if needed."""
   150Ôćĺ        while self._running:
   151Ôćĺ            await asyncio.sleep(10)
   152Ôćĺ            if not self._running:
   153Ôćĺ                break
   154Ôćĺ
   155Ôćĺ            healthy = await self._check_cdp_health()
   156Ôćĺ            if not healthy:
   157Ôćĺ                logger.warning('Chrome health check failed')
   158Ôćĺ                if self._config.get('web.chrome_auto_launch', True):
   159Ôćĺ                    await self._restart_chrome()
   160Ôćĺ
   161Ôćĺ    async def _restart_chrome(self) -> None:
   162Ôćĺ        """Restart Chrome process and reset BrowserManager connection."""
   163Ôćĺ        logger.info('Restarting Chrome...')
   164Ôćĺ
   165Ôćĺ        # Kill existing process if any
   166Ôćĺ        self._kill_process()
   167Ôćĺ
   168Ôćĺ        await asyncio.sleep(2)
   169Ôćĺ
   170Ôćĺ        # Start fresh
   171Ôćĺ        self._start_chrome_process()
   172Ôćĺ
   173Ôćĺ        # Wait for ready
   174Ôćĺ        for _ in range(30):
   175Ôćĺ            if await self._check_cdp_health():
   176Ôćĺ                logger.info('Chrome restarted successfully')
   177Ôćĺ                break
   178Ôćĺ            await asyncio.sleep(1)
   179Ôćĺ        else:
   180Ôćĺ            logger.error('Chrome restart failed')
   181Ôćĺ            return
   182Ôćĺ
   183Ôćĺ        # Reset BrowserManager singleton so it reconnects
   184Ôćĺ        from src.core.browser import BrowserManager
   185Ôćĺ        await BrowserManager.reset_instance()
   186Ôćĺ
   187Ôćĺ    def _kill_process(self) -> None:
   188Ôćĺ        """Terminate the Chrome process."""
   189Ôćĺ        if self._process is None:
   190Ôćĺ            return
   191Ôćĺ
   192Ôćĺ        try:
   193Ôćĺ            self._process.send_signal(signal.SIGTERM)
   194Ôćĺ            try:
   195Ôćĺ                self._process.wait(timeout=5)
   196Ôćĺ            except subprocess.TimeoutExpired:
   197Ôćĺ                self._process.kill()
   198Ôćĺ                self._process.wait(timeout=5)
   199Ôćĺ            logger.info('Chrome process terminated')
   200Ôćĺ        except Exception as e:
   201Ôćĺ            logger.warning(f'Error terminating Chrome: {e}')
   202Ôćĺ        finally:
   203Ôćĺ            self._process = None
   204Ôćĺ
   205Ôćĺ    async def stop(self) -> None:
   206Ôćĺ        """Stop health monitoring and terminate Chrome."""
   207Ôćĺ        self._running = False
   208Ôćĺ
   209Ôćĺ        if self._health_task and not self._health_task.done():
   210Ôćĺ            self._health_task.cancel()
   211Ôćĺ            try:
   212Ôćĺ                await self._health_task
   213Ôćĺ            except asyncio.CancelledError:
   214Ôćĺ                pass
   215Ôćĺ
   216Ôćĺ        self._kill_process()
   217Ôćĺ        logger.info('ChromeProcessManager stopped')
   218Ôćĺ

1Ôćĺ"""Dashboard route ÔÇö GET /"""
     2Ôćĺ
     3Ôćĺfrom datetime import datetime, timezone
     4Ôćĺ
     5Ôćĺfrom fastapi import APIRouter, Request
     6Ôćĺ
     7Ôćĺfrom src.web.app import chrome_manager, task_queue, templates
     8Ôćĺfrom src.models.database import Candidate, Message, SearchHistory, get_db_manager
     9Ôćĺfrom src.utils.rate_limiter import get_rate_limiter
    10Ôćĺ
    11Ôćĺrouter = APIRouter()
    12Ôćĺ
    13Ôćĺ
    14Ôćĺ@router.get("/")
    15Ôćĺasync def dashboard(request: Request):
    16Ôćĺ    """Main dashboard with status overview and today's stats."""
    17Ôćĺ    db = get_db_manager()
    18Ôćĺ    today_start = datetime.now(timezone.utc).replace(hour=0, minute=0, second=0, microsecond=0)
    19Ôćĺ
    20Ôćĺ    with db.session_scope() as session:
    21Ôćĺ        total_candidates = session.query(Candidate).count()
    22Ôćĺ        total_messages_sent = session.query(Message).filter(Message.status == 'sent').count()
    23Ôćĺ        today_searches = session.query(SearchHistory).filter(
    24Ôćĺ            SearchHistory.executed_at >= today_start
    25Ôćĺ        ).count()
    26Ôćĺ        today_messages = session.query(Message).filter(
    27Ôćĺ            Message.created_at >= today_start,
    28Ôćĺ            Message.status == 'sent',
    29Ôćĺ        ).count()
    30Ôćĺ
    31Ôćĺ    # Chrome status
    32Ôćĺ    chrome_healthy = await chrome_manager._check_cdp_health()
    33Ôćĺ
    34Ôćĺ    # Pipeline status
    35Ôćĺ    pipeline_busy = task_queue.is_busy
    36Ôćĺ    pipeline_task_id = task_queue.current_task_id
    37Ôćĺ
    38Ôćĺ    # Rate limiter status
    39Ôćĺ    try:
    40Ôćĺ        rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()
    41Ôćĺ        throttle = rate_limiter.throttle_factor
    42Ôćĺ    except Exception:
    43Ôćĺ        throttle = 1.0
    44Ôćĺ
    45Ôćĺ    return templates.TemplateResponse("dashboard.html", {
    46Ôćĺ        "request": request,
    47Ôćĺ        "chrome_healthy": chrome_healthy,
    48Ôćĺ        "pipeline_busy": pipeline_busy,
    49Ôćĺ        "pipeline_task_id": pipeline_task_id,
    50Ôćĺ        "total_candidates": total_candidates,
    51Ôćĺ        "total_messages_sent": total_messages_sent,
    52Ôćĺ        "today_searches": today_searches,
    53Ôćĺ        "today_messages": today_messages,
    54Ôćĺ        "throttle_factor": throttle,
    55Ôćĺ    })
    56Ôćĺ

1Ôćĺ"""CLI interface for Boss Assistant.

     3ÔćĺProvides Click-based commands for BossšŤ┤Ŕüś recruitment automation:
     4Ôćĺ- login: Verify BossšŤ┤Ŕüś login status

    29Ôćĺ    finally:
    30Ôćĺ        loop.close()

   222Ôćĺ            browser=browser,

   224Ôćĺ    except KeyboardInterrupt:
   225Ôćĺ        console.print("\n[yellow]Pipeline interrupted. Progress saved to checkpoint.[/yellow]")
   226Ôćĺ    except Exception as e:
   227Ôćĺ        console.print(f"[red]Error: {e}[/red]")
   228Ôćĺ        sys.exit(1)
   229Ôćĺ    finally:
   230Ôćĺ        run_async(browser.close())

   232Ôćĺ
   233Ôćĺ@cli.command()
   234Ôćĺ@click.option('-o', '--output', default=None, help='Output file path')
   235Ôćĺ@click.option('-f', '--format', 'fmt', type=click.Choice(['excel', 'csv']), default='excel', help='Export format')
   236Ôćĺ@click.option('--no-messages', is_flag=True, help='Exclude message history')
   237Ôćĺdef export(output, fmt, no_messages):
   238Ôćĺ    """Export candidate data to Excel or CSV."""
   239Ôćĺ    from src.modules.export import export_candidates
   240Ôćĺ
   241Ôćĺ    try:
   242Ôćĺ        path = export_candidates(
   243Ôćĺ            output_format=fmt,
   244Ôćĺ            output_path=output,
   245Ôćĺ            include_messages=not no_messages,
   246Ôćĺ        )
   247Ôćĺ        if path:
   248Ôćĺ            console.print(f"[green]Export complete: {path}[/green]")
   249Ôćĺ    except Exception as e:
   250Ôćĺ        console.print(f"[red]Error: {e}[/red]")
   251Ôćĺ        sys.exit(1)
   252Ôćĺ
   253Ôćĺ
   254Ôćĺ@cli.command()
   255Ôćĺdef templates():
   256Ôćĺ    """List available message templates."""
   257Ôćĺ    from src.utils.config import get_config
   258Ôćĺ
   259Ôćĺ    config = get_config()
   260Ôćĺ    template_names = config.list_templates()
   261Ôćĺ
   262Ôćĺ    table = Table(title="Message Templates")
   263Ôćĺ    table.add_column("Name", style="bold")
   264Ôćĺ    table.add_column("Description")
   265Ôćĺ    table.add_column("Variables")
   266Ôćĺ
   267Ôćĺ    for name in template_names:
   268Ôćĺ        tmpl = config.get_template(name)
   269Ôćĺ        desc = tmpl.get('name', '') + ' - ' + tmpl.get('description', '')
   270Ôćĺ        vars_list = ', '.join(tmpl.get('variables', []))
   271Ôćĺ        table.add_row(name, desc, vars_list or "(none)")
   272Ôćĺ
   273Ôćĺ    console.print(table)
   274Ôćĺ
   275Ôćĺ
   276Ôćĺ@cli.command()
   277Ôćĺdef status():
   278Ôćĺ    """View rate limit quota status."""
   279Ôćĺ    from src.utils.rate_limiter import get_rate_limiter
   280Ôćĺ
   281Ôćĺ    rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()
   282Ôćĺ
   283Ôćĺ    table = Table(title="Rate Limit Status")
   284Ôćĺ    table.add_column("Action")
   285Ôćĺ    table.add_column("Hourly Used")
   286Ôćĺ    table.add_column("Hourly Limit")
   287Ôćĺ    table.add_column("Hourly Remaining")
   288Ôćĺ    table.add_column("Daily Used")
   289Ôćĺ    table.add_column("Daily Limit")
   290Ôćĺ    table.add_column("Daily Remaining")
   291Ôćĺ
   292Ôćĺ    for action_type in ['search', 'view_profile', 'send_message']:
   293Ôćĺ        quota = rate_limiter.get_quota_status(action_type)
   294Ôćĺ        h = quota['hourly']
   295Ôćĺ        d = quota['daily']
   296Ôćĺ
   297Ôćĺ        table.add_row(
   298Ôćĺ            action_type,
   299Ôćĺ            str(h['used']),
   300Ôćĺ            str(h['limit']),
   301Ôćĺ            str(h['remaining']),
   302Ôćĺ            str(d['used']),
   303Ôćĺ            str(d['limit']),
   304Ôćĺ            str(d['remaining']),
   305Ôćĺ        )
   306Ôćĺ
   307Ôćĺ    console.print(table)
   308Ôćĺ
   309Ôćĺ    throttle = rate_limiter.throttle_factor
   310Ôćĺ    if throttle < 1.0:
   311Ôćĺ        console.print(f"\n[yellow]Adaptive throttle active: {throttle:.1f}x[/yellow]")
   312Ôćĺ    else:
   313Ôćĺ        console.print(f"\n[green]Throttle: normal (1.0x)[/green]")

   320Ôćĺ

   332Ôćĺ    cli(obj={})

1Ôćĺ"""Templates routes ÔÇö list and edit message templates."""
     2Ôćĺ
     3Ôćĺimport json
     4Ôćĺfrom pathlib import Path
     5Ôćĺ
     6Ôćĺfrom fastapi import APIRouter, Request, Body
     7Ôćĺfrom fastapi.responses import HTMLResponse, JSONResponse
     8Ôćĺ
     9Ôćĺfrom src.web.app import templates
    10Ôćĺfrom src.utils.config import get_config
    11Ôćĺ
    12Ôćĺrouter = APIRouter()
    13Ôćĺ
    14Ôćĺ
    15Ôćĺ@router.get("/", response_class=HTMLResponse)
    16Ôćĺasync def templates_page(request: Request):
    17Ôćĺ    """List templates page, or return JSON list if format=json."""
    18Ôćĺ    config = get_config()
    19Ôćĺ    template_names = config.list_templates()
    20Ôćĺ
    21Ôćĺ    # Support JSON format for AJAX requests
    22Ôćĺ    if request.query_params.get("format") == "json":
    23Ôćĺ        result = []
    24Ôćĺ        for name in template_names:
    25Ôćĺ            tmpl = config.get_template(name)
    26Ôćĺ            result.append({
    27Ôćĺ                "name": name,
    28Ôćĺ                "display_name": tmpl.get("name", name),
    29Ôćĺ                "description": tmpl.get("description", ""),
    30Ôćĺ                "variables": tmpl.get("variables", []),
    31Ôćĺ            })
    32Ôćĺ        return JSONResponse(result)
    33Ôćĺ
    34Ôćĺ    template_list = []
    35Ôćĺ    for name in template_names:
    36Ôćĺ        tmpl = config.get_template(name)
    37Ôćĺ        template_list.append({
    38Ôćĺ            "name": name,
    39Ôćĺ            "display_name": tmpl.get("name", name),
    40Ôćĺ            "description": tmpl.get("description", ""),
    41Ôćĺ            "content": tmpl.get("content", ""),
    42Ôćĺ            "variables": tmpl.get("variables", []),
    43Ôćĺ        })
    44Ôćĺ
    45Ôćĺ    return templates.TemplateResponse("templates.html", {
    46Ôćĺ        "request": request,
    47Ôćĺ        "template_list": template_list,
    48Ôćĺ    })
    49Ôćĺ
    50Ôćĺ
    51Ôćĺ@router.put("/{name}")
    52Ôćĺasync def update_template(name: str, body: dict = Body(...)):
    53Ôćĺ    """Update a message template's content."""
    54Ôćĺ    config = get_config()
    55Ôćĺ
    56Ôćĺ    # Verify template exists
    57Ôćĺ    config.get_template(name)
    58Ôćĺ
    59Ôćĺ    # Update in-memory
    60Ôćĺ    config._message_templates[name]["content"] = body.get("content", "")
    61Ôćĺ    if "variables" in body:
    62Ôćĺ        config._message_templates[name]["variables"] = body["variables"]
    63Ôćĺ
    64Ôćĺ    # Persist to disk
    65Ôćĺ    templates_path = Path(config.config_dir) / "message_templates.json"
    66Ôćĺ    with open(templates_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    67Ôćĺ        json.dump(config._message_templates, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)
    68Ôćĺ
    69Ôćĺ    return {"status": "ok", "message": f"Template '{name}' updated"}
    70Ôćĺ

1Ôćĺ"""Entry point for Boss Assistant Web service.
     2Ôćĺ
     3ÔćĺUsage:
     4Ôćĺ    python run_web.py
     5Ôćĺ    python run_web.py --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8080
     6Ôćĺ"""
     7Ôćĺ
     8Ôćĺimport argparse
     9Ôćĺimport sys
    10Ôćĺ
    11Ôćĺimport uvicorn
    12Ôćĺ
    13Ôćĺfrom src.utils.config import get_config
    14Ôćĺ
    15Ôćĺ
    16Ôćĺdef main():
    17Ôćĺ    config = get_config()
    18Ôćĺ
    19Ôćĺ    default_host = config.get('web.host', '0.0.0.0')
    20Ôćĺ    default_port = config.get('web.port', 8080)
    21Ôćĺ
    22Ôćĺ    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description='Boss Assistant Web Service')
    23Ôćĺ    parser.add_argument('--host', default=default_host, help=f'Host (default: {default_host})')
    24Ôćĺ    parser.add_argument('--port', type=int, default=default_port, help=f'Port (default: {default_port})')
    25Ôćĺ    parser.add_argument('--reload', action='store_true', help='Enable auto-reload for development')
    26Ôćĺ    args = parser.parse_args()
    27Ôćĺ
    28Ôćĺ    print(f"Starting Boss Assistant Web at http://{args.host}:{args.port}")
    29Ôćĺ    print("Press Ctrl+C to stop")
    30Ôćĺ
    31Ôćĺ    uvicorn.run(
    32Ôćĺ        "src.web.app:create_app",
    33Ôćĺ        host=args.host,
    34Ôćĺ        port=args.port,
    35Ôćĺ        factory=True,
    36Ôćĺ        reload=args.reload,
    37Ôćĺ    )
    38Ôćĺ
    39Ôćĺ
    40Ôćĺif __name__ == '__main__':
    41Ôćĺ    main()
    42Ôćĺ
