    47Ôćĺ
    48Ôćĺdef render_template(template: Dict, variables: Dict[str, str]) -> str:
    49Ôćĺ    """
    50Ôćĺ    Render a message template with variable substitution.
    51Ôćĺ
    52Ôćĺ    Uses a single-pass approach to avoid recursive replacement issues
    53Ôćĺ    (e.g., variable values containing {other_var} patterns).
    54Ôćĺ
    55Ôćĺ    Args:
    56Ôćĺ        template: Template dict with 'content' and 'variables' keys
    57Ôćĺ        variables: Variable name-value pairs
    58Ôćĺ
    59Ôćĺ    Returns:
    60Ôćĺ        Rendered message string
    61Ôćĺ    """
    62Ôćĺ    import re
    63Ôćĺ
    64Ôćĺ    content = template['content']
    65Ôćĺ
    66Ôćĺ    def replacer(match):
    67Ôćĺ        var_name = match.group(1)
    68Ôćĺ        if var_name in variables:
    69Ôćĺ            return str(variables[var_name])
    70Ôćĺ        return match.group(0)  # Keep original if no matching variable
    71Ôćĺ
    72Ôćĺ    content = re.sub(r'\{(\w+)\}', replacer, content)
    73Ôćĺ    return content
    74Ôćĺ
    75Ôćĺ
    76Ôćĺasync def send_message(
    77Ôćĺ    boss_id: str,
    78Ôćĺ    template_name: str,
    79Ôćĺ    variables: Optional[Dict[str, str]] = None,
    80Ôćĺ    preview_only: bool = False,
    81Ôćĺ    interactive: bool = True,
    82Ôćĺ    browser: Optional[BrowserManager] = None,
    83Ôćĺ) -> bool:
    84Ôćĺ    """
    85Ôćĺ    Send a templated message to a candidate on BossšŤ┤Ŕüś.
    86Ôćĺ
    87Ôćĺ    Args:
    88Ôćĺ        boss_id: Candidate Boss ID
    89Ôćĺ        template_name: Name of the message template
    90Ôćĺ        variables: Template variable overrides
    91Ôćĺ        preview_only: If True, only preview the message without sending
    92Ôćĺ        browser: Browser manager instance
    93Ôćĺ
    94Ôćĺ    Returns:
    95Ôćĺ        True if message sent successfully
    96Ôćĺ    """
    97Ôćĺ    if browser is None:
    98Ôćĺ        browser = get_browser_manager()
    99Ôćĺ
   100Ôćĺ    page = browser.page
   101Ôćĺ    if not page:
   102Ôćĺ        page = await browser.start()
   103Ôćĺ
   104Ôćĺ    config = get_config()
   105Ôćĺ    rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()
   106Ôćĺ    db_manager = get_db_manager()
   107Ôćĺ
   108Ôćĺ    # Load template
   109Ôćĺ    template = config.get_template(template_name)
   110Ôćĺ
   111Ôćĺ    # Merge variables
   112Ôćĺ    final_vars = dict(variables or {})
   113Ôćĺ
   114Ôćĺ    # Try to fill candidate info from database
   115Ôćĺ    with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   116Ôćĺ        candidate = session.query(Candidate).filter_by(boss_id=boss_id).first()
   117Ôćĺ        if candidate:
   118Ôćĺ            if 'name' not in final_vars and candidate.name:
   119Ôćĺ                final_vars['name'] = candidate.name
   120Ôćĺ            if 'company' not in final_vars and candidate.company:
   121Ôćĺ                final_vars['company'] = candidate.company
   122Ôćĺ            if 'position' not in final_vars and candidate.title:
   123Ôćĺ                final_vars['position'] = candidate.title
   124Ôćĺ
   125Ôćĺ    # Validate variables
   126Ôćĺ    validate_template_variables(template, final_vars)
   127Ôćĺ
   128Ôćĺ    # Render message
   129Ôćĺ    message_content = render_template(template, final_vars)
   130Ôćĺ
   131Ôćĺ    # Preview
   132Ôćĺ    console.print(Panel(
   133Ôćĺ        f"[bold]To:[/bold] {boss_id}\n"
   134Ôćĺ        f"[bold]Template:[/bold] {template_name}\n"
   135Ôćĺ        f"[bold]Message:[/bold]\n{message_content}",
   136Ôćĺ        title="Message Preview",
   137Ôćĺ        border_style="cyan"
   138Ôćĺ    ))
   139Ôćĺ
   140Ôćĺ    if preview_only:
   141Ôćĺ        console.print("[dim]Preview only ÔÇö message not sent.[/dim]")
   142Ôćĺ        return False
   143Ôćĺ
   144Ôćĺ    # Confirm send ÔÇö skip confirmation in non-interactive mode (Web)
   145Ôćĺ    import sys
   146Ôćĺ    if not interactive:
   147Ôćĺ        confirm = True
   148Ôćĺ    elif sys.stdin.isatty():
   149Ôćĺ        confirm = questionary.confirm(
   150Ôćĺ            "Send this message?",
   151Ôćĺ            default=False,
   152Ôćĺ        ).ask()
   153Ôćĺ    else:
   154Ôćĺ        confirm = False
   155Ôćĺ
   156Ôćĺ    if not confirm:
   157Ôćĺ        console.print("[yellow]Message cancelled.[/yellow]")
   158Ôćĺ        # Record cancellation
   159Ôćĺ        _save_message_to_db(boss_id, template_name, message_content, 'cancelled', db_manager)
   160Ôćĺ        return False
   161Ôćĺ
   162Ôćĺ    # Rate limit check
   163Ôćĺ    await async_check_rate_limit('send_message')
   164Ôćĺ
   165Ôćĺ    try:
   166Ôćĺ        # Navigate to chat with the candidate
   167Ôćĺ        success = await _navigate_to_chat(page, boss_id, db_manager)
   168Ôćĺ        if not success:
   169Ôćĺ            raise BrowserError(f"Failed to open chat with {boss_id}")
   170Ôćĺ
   171Ôćĺ        # Type and send the message
   172Ôćĺ        await _type_and_send_message(page, message_content)
   173Ôćĺ
   174Ôćĺ        # Log success
   175Ôćĺ        rate_limiter.log_action('send_message', {'boss_id': boss_id, 'template': template_name})
   176Ôćĺ        _save_message_to_db(boss_id, template_name, message_content, 'sent', db_manager)
   177Ôćĺ
   178Ôćĺ        console.print(f"[green]Message sent to {boss_id}![/green]")
   179Ôćĺ        return True
   180Ôćĺ
   181Ôćĺ    except PermanentFailureError as e:
   182Ôćĺ        logger.error(f"Permanent failure sending to {boss_id}: {e}")
   183Ôćĺ        _save_message_to_db(boss_id, template_name, message_content, 'failed', db_manager)
   184Ôćĺ        rate_limiter.report_error()
   185Ôćĺ        console.print(f"[red]Failed to send: {e}[/red]")
   186Ôćĺ        return False
   187Ôćĺ    except Exception as e:
   188Ôćĺ        logger.error(f"Error sending message to {boss_id}: {e}")
   189Ôćĺ        _save_message_to_db(boss_id, template_name, message_content, 'failed', db_manager)
   190Ôćĺ        rate_limiter.report_error()
   191Ôćĺ        console.print(f"[red]Error: {e}[/red]")
   192Ôćĺ        return False
   193Ôćĺ
   194Ôćĺ
   195Ôćĺasync def send_message_batch(
   196Ôćĺ    candidates: list,
   197Ôćĺ    template_name: str,
   198Ôćĺ    variables: Optional[Dict[str, str]] = None,
   199Ôćĺ    interactive: bool = True,
   200Ôćĺ    skip_messaged: bool = True,
   201Ôćĺ    dry_run: bool = False,
   202Ôćĺ    browser: Optional[BrowserManager] = None,
   203Ôćĺ) -> Dict[str, int]:
   204Ôćĺ    """
   205Ôćĺ    Send messages to multiple candidates.
   206Ôćĺ
   207Ôćĺ    Args:
   208Ôćĺ        candidates: List of CandidateBasic or dicts with boss_id
   209Ôćĺ        template_name: Template name
   210Ôćĺ        variables: Shared template variables
   211Ôćĺ        interactive: Confirm each message individually
   212Ôćĺ        skip_messaged: Skip candidates already messaged
   213Ôćĺ        dry_run: Simulate without actually sending
   214Ôćĺ        browser: Browser manager instance
   215Ôćĺ
   216Ôćĺ    Returns:
   217Ôćĺ        Dict with counts: sent, failed, skipped, cancelled
   218Ôćĺ    """
   219Ôćĺ    if browser is None:
   220Ôćĺ        browser = get_browser_manager()
   221Ôćĺ
   222Ôćĺ    config = get_config()
   223Ôćĺ    db_manager = get_db_manager()
   224Ôćĺ    rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()
   225Ôćĺ
   226Ôćĺ    stats = {'sent': 0, 'failed': 0, 'skipped': 0, 'cancelled': 0}
   227Ôćĺ
   228Ôćĺ    for i, candidate in enumerate(candidates):
   229Ôćĺ        if isinstance(candidate, dict):
   230Ôćĺ            boss_id = candidate.get('boss_id', '')
   231Ôćĺ            name = candidate.get('name', '')
   232Ôćĺ            title = candidate.get('title', '')
   233Ôćĺ            company = candidate.get('company', '')
   234Ôćĺ        else:
   235Ôćĺ            boss_id = getattr(candidate, 'boss_id', '')
   236Ôćĺ            name = getattr(candidate, 'name', '')
   237Ôćĺ            title = getattr(candidate, 'title', '')
   238Ôćĺ            company = getattr(candidate, 'company', '')
   239Ôćĺ
   240Ôćĺ        if not boss_id:
   241Ôćĺ            stats['skipped'] += 1
   242Ôćĺ            continue
   243Ôćĺ
   244Ôćĺ        console.print(f"\n[cyan]({i+1}/{len(candidates)})[/cyan] {name} - {title} @ {company}")
   245Ôćĺ
   246Ôćĺ        # Check if already messaged
   247Ôćĺ        if skip_messaged:
   248Ôćĺ            with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   249Ôćĺ                existing_msg = session.query(Message).filter_by(
   250Ôćĺ                    candidate_boss_id=boss_id, status='sent'
   251Ôćĺ                ).first()
   252Ôćĺ                if existing_msg:
   253Ôćĺ                    console.print(f"  [dim]Already messaged, skipping[/dim]")
   254Ôćĺ                    stats['skipped'] += 1
   255Ôćĺ                    continue
   256Ôćĺ
   257Ôćĺ        if dry_run:
   258Ôćĺ            console.print(f"  [dim]Dry run ÔÇö would send '{template_name}' template[/dim]")
   259Ôćĺ            stats['sent'] += 1
   260Ôćĺ            continue
   261Ôćĺ
   262Ôćĺ        # Build per-candidate variables
   263Ôćĺ        per_vars = dict(variables or {})
   264Ôćĺ        if name:
   265Ôćĺ            per_vars.setdefault('name', name)
   266Ôćĺ        if company:
   267Ôćĺ            per_vars.setdefault('company', company)
   268Ôćĺ        if title:
   269Ôćĺ            per_vars.setdefault('position', title)
   270Ôćĺ
   271Ôćĺ        try:
   272Ôćĺ            if interactive:
   273Ôćĺ                # Use single send (with preview + confirmation)
   274Ôćĺ                result = await send_message(
   275Ôćĺ                    boss_id=boss_id,
   276Ôćĺ                    template_name=template_name,
   277Ôćĺ                    variables=per_vars,
   278Ôćĺ                    browser=browser,
   279Ôćĺ                )
   280Ôćĺ                if result:
   281Ôćĺ                    stats['sent'] += 1
   282Ôćĺ                else:
   283Ôćĺ                    stats['cancelled'] += 1
   284Ôćĺ            else:
   285Ôćĺ                # Non-interactive: send without confirmation
   286Ôćĺ                await async_check_rate_limit('send_message')
   287Ôćĺ
   288Ôćĺ                template = config.get_template(template_name)
   289Ôćĺ                validate_template_variables(template, per_vars)
   290Ôćĺ                message_content = render_template(template, per_vars)
   291Ôćĺ
   292Ôćĺ                page = browser.page
   293Ôćĺ                success = await _navigate_to_chat(page, boss_id, db_manager)
   294Ôćĺ                if success:
   295Ôćĺ                    await _type_and_send_message(page, message_content)
   296Ôćĺ                    rate_limiter.log_action('send_message', {'boss_id': boss_id})
   297Ôćĺ                    _save_message_to_db(boss_id, template_name, message_content, 'sent', db_manager)
   298Ôćĺ                    stats['sent'] += 1
   299Ôćĺ                    console.print(f"  [green]Sent![/green]")
   300Ôćĺ                else:
   301Ôćĺ                    _save_message_to_db(boss_id, template_name, message_content, 'failed', db_manager)
   302Ôćĺ                    stats['failed'] += 1
   303Ôćĺ                    console.print(f"  [red]Failed to open chat[/red]")
   304Ôćĺ
   305Ôćĺ        except Exception as e:
   306Ôćĺ            logger.error(f"Error sending to {boss_id}: {e}")
   307Ôćĺ            stats['failed'] += 1
   308Ôćĺ            console.print(f"  [red]Error: {e}[/red]")
   309Ôćĺ
   310Ôćĺ        # Delay between messages
   311Ôćĺ        if i < len(candidates) - 1:
   312Ôćĺ            await async_random_delay('message')
   313Ôćĺ
   314Ôćĺ    # Summary
   315Ôćĺ    console.print(Panel(
   316Ôćĺ        f"[green]Sent: {stats['sent']}[/green] | "
   317Ôćĺ        f"[red]Failed: {stats['failed']}[/red] | "
   318Ôćĺ        f"[yellow]Skipped: {stats['skipped']}[/yellow] | "
   319Ôćĺ        f"[dim]Cancelled: {stats['cancelled']}[/dim]",
   320Ôćĺ        title="Batch Message Summary",
   321Ôćĺ    ))
   322Ôćĺ
   323Ôćĺ    return stats
   324Ôćĺ
   325Ôćĺ
   326Ôćĺasync def _navigate_to_chat(page: Page, boss_id: str, db_manager) -> bool:
   327Ôćĺ    """
   328Ôćĺ    Navigate to the chat window for a candidate.
   329Ôćĺ
   330Ôćĺ    Tries multiple strategies:
   331Ôćĺ    1. Direct chat URL (if known)
   332Ôćĺ    2. Navigate to candidate profile and click "šźőňŹ│Š▓čÚÇÜ"
   333Ôćĺ    3. Search in existing conversations
   334Ôćĺ
   335Ôćĺ    Args:
   336Ôćĺ        page: Playwright page instance
   337Ôćĺ        boss_id: Candidate Boss ID
   338Ôćĺ        db_manager: Database manager
   339Ôćĺ
   340Ôćĺ    Returns:
   341Ôćĺ        True if chat window is ready
   342Ôćĺ    """
   343Ôćĺ    encrypt_id = boss_id.replace('zp_', '') if boss_id.startswith('zp_') else boss_id
   344Ôćĺ
   345Ôćĺ    # Get profile URL from database
   346Ôćĺ    profile_url = None
   347Ôćĺ    with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   348Ôćĺ        candidate = session.query(Candidate).filter_by(boss_id=boss_id).first()
   349Ôćĺ        if candidate and candidate.profile_url:
   350Ôćĺ            profile_url = candidate.profile_url
   351Ôćĺ
   352Ôćĺ    # Strategy 1: Navigate to profile and click chat button
   353Ôćĺ    if profile_url:
   354Ôćĺ        try:
   355Ôćĺ            await retry_navigation(page, profile_url, wait_until='domcontentloaded')
   356Ôćĺ            await async_random_delay('page_load')
   357Ôćĺ            await check_captcha(page, report_to_rate_limiter=True)
   358Ôćĺ
   359Ôćĺ            # Look for "šźőňŹ│Š▓čÚÇÜ" button
   360Ôćĺ            chat_button = await _find_chat_button(page)
   361Ôćĺ            if chat_button:
   362Ôćĺ                await chat_button.click()
   363Ôćĺ                await async_random_delay('action')
   364Ôćĺ                # Wait for chat to load
   365Ôćĺ                await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
   366Ôćĺ                return True
   367Ôćĺ        except Exception as e:
   368Ôćĺ            logger.warning(f"Strategy 1 (profile click) failed for {boss_id}: {e}")
   369Ôćĺ
   370Ôćĺ    # Strategy 2: Try direct geek URL
   371Ôćĺ    try:
   372Ôćĺ        geek_url = f"https://www.zhipin.com/web/geek/{encrypt_id}"
   373Ôćĺ        await retry_navigation(page, geek_url, wait_until='domcontentloaded')
   374Ôćĺ        await async_random_delay('page_load')
   375Ôćĺ        await check_captcha(page, report_to_rate_limiter=True)
   376Ôćĺ
   377Ôćĺ        chat_button = await _find_chat_button(page)
   378Ôćĺ        if chat_button:
   379Ôćĺ            await chat_button.click()
   380Ôćĺ            await async_random_delay('action')
   381Ôćĺ            await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
   382Ôćĺ            return True
   383Ôćĺ    except Exception as e:
   384Ôćĺ        logger.warning(f"Strategy 2 (direct geek URL) failed for {boss_id}: {e}")
   385Ôćĺ
   386Ôćĺ    # Strategy 3: Try to find a chat link on the current page
   387Ôćĺ    try:
   388Ôćĺ        # Check if there's a chat link on the current page
   389Ôćĺ        chat_link = await page.query_selector(
   390Ôćĺ            'a[href*="chat"], a[href*="im"], [class*="chat-link"]'
   391Ôćĺ        )
   392Ôćĺ        if chat_link:
   393Ôćĺ            await chat_link.click()
   394Ôćĺ            await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
   395Ôćĺ            return True
   396Ôćĺ    except Exception as e:
   397Ôćĺ        logger.warning(f"Strategy 3 (chat link) failed for {boss_id}: {e}")
   398Ôćĺ
   399Ôćĺ    logger.error(f"All chat navigation strategies failed for {boss_id}")
   400Ôćĺ    return False
   401Ôćĺ
   402Ôćĺ
   403Ôćĺasync def _find_chat_button(page: Page):
   404Ôćĺ    """Find the chat/communication button on the page."""
   405Ôćĺ    selectors = [
   406Ôćĺ        'button:has-text("ŠÉťš┤óšĽůŔüŐňŹí")',
   407Ôćĺ        'button:has-text("šźőňŹ│Š▓čÚÇÜ")',
   408Ôćĺ        'a:has-text("šźőňŹ│Š▓čÚÇÜ")',
   409Ôćĺ        'button:has-text("ň╝ÇňžőŠ▓čÚÇÜ")',
   410Ôćĺ        'button:has-text("š╗žš╗şŠ▓čÚÇÜ")',
   411Ôćĺ        '[class*="btn-chat"]',
   412Ôćĺ        '[class*="chat-btn"]',
   413Ôćĺ    ]
   414Ôćĺ
   415Ôćĺ    for selector in selectors:
   416Ôćĺ        try:
   417Ôćĺ            element = await page.query_selector(selector)
   418Ôćĺ            if element and await element.is_visible():
   419Ôćĺ                return element
   420Ôćĺ        except Exception:
   421Ôćĺ            continue
   422Ôćĺ
   423Ôćĺ    return None
   424Ôćĺ
   425Ôćĺ
   426Ôćĺasync def _type_and_send_message(page: Page, message: str) -> None:
   427Ôćĺ    """
   428Ôćĺ    Type a message into the chat input and send it.
   429Ôćĺ
   430Ôćĺ    Args:
   431Ôćĺ        page: Playwright page instance
   432Ôćĺ        message: Message text to send
   433Ôćĺ    """
   434Ôćĺ    # Find the message input
   435Ôćĺ    # Recording confirmed: #boss-chat-global-input is the primary chat input (a div element)
   436Ôćĺ    input_selectors = [
   437Ôćĺ        '#boss-chat-global-input',
   438Ôćĺ        '[contenteditable="true"]',
   439Ôćĺ        '[class*="chat-input"] textarea',
   440Ôćĺ        '[class*="input-area"] textarea',
   441Ôćĺ        'textarea[class*="message"]',
   442Ôćĺ        'textarea',
   443Ôćĺ    ]
   444Ôćĺ
   445Ôćĺ    input_element = None
   446Ôćĺ    for selector in input_selectors:
   447Ôćĺ        try:
   448Ôćĺ            element = await page.query_selector(selector)
   449Ôćĺ            if element and await element.is_visible():
   450Ôćĺ                input_element = element
   451Ôćĺ                break
   452Ôćĺ        except Exception:
   453Ôćĺ            continue
   454Ôćĺ
   455Ôćĺ    if not input_element:
   456Ôćĺ        raise SelectorNotFoundError("Chat message input not found")
   457Ôćĺ
   458Ôćĺ    # Click to focus
   459Ôćĺ    await input_element.click()
   460Ôćĺ    await page.wait_for_timeout(300)
   461Ôćĺ
   462Ôćĺ    # Clear any existing content (use Meta+a on macOS, Control+a elsewhere)
   463Ôćĺ    import sys
   464Ôćĺ    select_all_key = "Meta+a" if sys.platform == "darwin" else "Control+a"
   465Ôćĺ    await page.keyboard.press(select_all_key)
   466Ôćĺ    await page.keyboard.press("Backspace")
   467Ôćĺ    await page.wait_for_timeout(200)
   468Ôćĺ
   469Ôćĺ    # Type message with human-like timing
   470Ôćĺ    # For longer messages, use fill() to avoid timeout, then add small delay
   471Ôćĺ    if len(message) > 50:
   472Ôćĺ        await input_element.fill(message)
   473Ôćĺ    else:
   474Ôćĺ        await input_element.type(message, delay=80)
   475Ôćĺ
   476Ôćĺ    await async_random_delay('action')
   477Ôćĺ
   478Ôćĺ    # Find and click send button
   479Ôćĺ    # Recording confirmed: send button contains text "ňĆĹÚÇü" (span inside button)
   480Ôćĺ    send_selectors = [
   481Ôćĺ        'text="ňĆĹÚÇü"',
   482Ôćĺ        'button:has-text("ňĆĹÚÇü")',
   483Ôćĺ        '[class*="btn-send"]',
   484Ôćĺ        '[class*="send-btn"]',
   485Ôćĺ    ]
   486Ôćĺ
   487Ôćĺ    for selector in send_selectors:
   488Ôćĺ        try:
   489Ôćĺ            btn = await page.query_selector(selector)
   490Ôćĺ            if btn and await btn.is_visible():
   491Ôćĺ                await btn.click()
   492Ôćĺ                await page.wait_for_timeout(1000)
   493Ôćĺ                logger.info("Message sent via send button click")
   494Ôćĺ                return
   495Ôćĺ        except Exception:
   496Ôćĺ            continue
   497Ôćĺ
   498Ôćĺ    # Fallback: try pressing Enter to send
   499Ôćĺ    await page.keyboard.press("Enter")
   500Ôćĺ    await page.wait_for_timeout(1000)
   501Ôćĺ    logger.info("Message sent via Enter key")
   502Ôćĺ
   503Ôćĺ
   504Ôćĺdef _save_message_to_db(
   505Ôćĺ    boss_id: str,
   506Ôćĺ    template_name: str,
   507Ôćĺ    content: str,
   508Ôćĺ    status: str,
   509Ôćĺ    db_manager,
   510Ôćĺ) -> None:
   511Ôćĺ    """Save a message record to the database."""
   512Ôćĺ    with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   513Ôćĺ        message = Message(
   514Ôćĺ            candidate_boss_id=boss_id,
   515Ôćĺ            template_name=template_name,
   516Ôćĺ            content=content,
   517Ôćĺ            status=status,
   518Ôćĺ            sent_at=datetime.now(timezone.utc) if status == 'sent' else None,
   519Ôćĺ        )
   520Ôćĺ        session.add(message)
   521Ôćĺ

1Ôćĺ"""Retry utilities for navigation and network operations."""
     2Ôćĺ
     3Ôćĺfrom tenacity import retry, stop_after_attempt, wait_exponential, retry_if_exception_type
     4Ôćĺfrom patchright.async_api import Page, Error as PlaywrightError
     5Ôćĺfrom loguru import logger
     6Ôćĺ
     7Ôćĺ
     8Ôćĺ@retry(
     9Ôćĺ    stop=stop_after_attempt(3),
    10Ôćĺ    wait=wait_exponential(multiplier=1, min=2, max=10),
    11Ôćĺ    retry=retry_if_exception_type((PlaywrightError, TimeoutError, ConnectionError)),
    12Ôćĺ    before_sleep=lambda retry_state: logger.warning(
    13Ôćĺ        f"Navigation failed (attempt {retry_state.attempt_number}), retrying..."
    14Ôćĺ    ),
    15Ôćĺ    reraise=True,
    16Ôćĺ)
    17Ôćĺasync def retry_navigation(page: Page, url: str, **kwargs) -> None:
    18Ôćĺ    """Navigate to a URL with automatic retry on failure.
    19Ôćĺ
    20Ôćĺ    Args:
    21Ôćĺ        page: Playwright page instance
    22Ôćĺ        url: URL to navigate to
    23Ôćĺ        **kwargs: Additional arguments passed to page.goto()
    24Ôćĺ    """
    25Ôćĺ    await page.goto(url, **kwargs)
    26Ôćĺ

1Ôćĺ"""Pipeline checkpoint manager for resume capability."""
     2Ôćĺ
     3Ôćĺimport json
     4Ôćĺimport os
     5Ôćĺimport tempfile
     6Ôćĺfrom datetime import datetime, timezone
     7Ôćĺfrom pathlib import Path
     8Ôćĺfrom typing import Any, Dict, List, Optional, Set
     9Ôćĺ
    10Ôćĺfrom loguru import logger
    11Ôćĺ
    12Ôćĺ
    13ÔćĺCHECKPOINT_DIR = Path("data/.checkpoints")
    14Ôćĺ
    15Ôćĺ
    16Ôćĺclass CheckpointManager:
    17Ôćĺ    """Manages pipeline checkpoint save/load for resume support."""
    18Ôćĺ
    19Ôćĺ    def __init__(self, checkpoint_id: Optional[str] = None):
    20Ôćĺ        CHECKPOINT_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    21Ôćĺ
    22Ôćĺ        if checkpoint_id:
    23Ôćĺ            self.checkpoint_path = CHECKPOINT_DIR / f"{checkpoint_id}.json"
    24Ôćĺ        else:
    25Ôćĺ            ts = datetime.now(timezone.utc).strftime("%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")
    26Ôćĺ            self.checkpoint_path = CHECKPOINT_DIR / f"pipeline_{ts}.json"
    27Ôćĺ
    28Ôćĺ        self._data: Dict[str, Any] = {}
    29Ôćĺ
    30Ôćĺ    def save(
    31Ôćĺ        self,
    32Ôćĺ        keywords: tuple,
    33Ôćĺ        template: str,
    34Ôćĺ        variables: dict,
    35Ôćĺ        company: tuple,
    36Ôćĺ        location: Optional[str],
    37Ôćĺ        max_pages: int,
    38Ôćĺ        batch_pages: int,
    39Ôćĺ        skip_messaged: bool,
    40Ôćĺ        interactive: bool,
    41Ôćĺ        completed_pages: int,
    42Ôćĺ        sent_ids: List[str],
    43Ôćĺ        seen_ids: List[str],
    44Ôćĺ        total_results: Optional[dict] = None,
    45Ôćĺ        mode: str = "recommend",
    46Ôćĺ        dry_run: bool = False,
    47Ôćĺ    ) -> None:
    48Ôćĺ        self._data = {
    49Ôćĺ            "created_at": self._data.get("created_at", datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat()),
    50Ôćĺ            "updated_at": datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),
    51Ôćĺ            "params": {
    52Ôćĺ                "keywords": list(keywords),
    53Ôćĺ                "template": template,
    54Ôćĺ                "variables": variables,
    55Ôćĺ                "company": list(company) if company else [],
    56Ôćĺ                "location": location,
    57Ôćĺ                "max_pages": max_pages,
    58Ôćĺ                "batch_pages": batch_pages,
    59Ôćĺ                "skip_messaged": skip_messaged,
    60Ôćĺ                "interactive": interactive,
    61Ôćĺ                "mode": mode,
    62Ôćĺ                "dry_run": dry_run,
    63Ôćĺ            },
    64Ôćĺ            "progress": {
    65Ôćĺ                "completed_pages": completed_pages,
    66Ôćĺ                "sent_ids": sent_ids,
    67Ôćĺ                "seen_ids": seen_ids,
    68Ôćĺ                "total_results": total_results or {},
    69Ôćĺ            },
    70Ôćĺ        }
    71Ôćĺ
    72Ôćĺ        try:
    73Ôćĺ            tmp_fd, tmp_path = tempfile.mkstemp(
    74Ôćĺ                dir=self.checkpoint_path.parent, suffix=".tmp"
    75Ôćĺ            )
    76Ôćĺ            try:
    77Ôćĺ                with os.fdopen(tmp_fd, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    78Ôćĺ                    json.dump(self._data, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)
    79Ôćĺ                os.replace(tmp_path, self.checkpoint_path)
    80Ôćĺ            except BaseException:
    81Ôćĺ                try:
    82Ôćĺ                    os.unlink(tmp_path)
    83Ôćĺ                except OSError:
    84Ôćĺ                    pass
    85Ôćĺ                raise
    86Ôćĺ            logger.debug(f"Checkpoint saved: {self.checkpoint_path}")
    87Ôćĺ        except Exception as e:
    88Ôćĺ            logger.error(f"Failed to save checkpoint: {e}")
    89Ôćĺ            raise
    90Ôćĺ
    91Ôćĺ    @classmethod
    92Ôćĺ    def load_latest(cls) -> Optional["CheckpointManager"]:
    93Ôćĺ        CHECKPOINT_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    94Ôćĺ        files = sorted(CHECKPOINT_DIR.glob("pipeline_*.json"), key=lambda p: p.stat().st_mtime, reverse=True)
    95Ôćĺ
    96Ôćĺ        if not files:
    97Ôćĺ            return None
    98Ôćĺ
    99Ôćĺ        try:
   100Ôćĺ            mgr = object.__new__(cls)
   101Ôćĺ            mgr.checkpoint_path = files[0]
   102Ôćĺ            mgr._data = {}
   103Ôćĺ            with open(files[0], "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
   104Ôćĺ                mgr._data = json.load(f)
   105Ôćĺ            logger.info(f"Loaded checkpoint: {files[0]}")
   106Ôćĺ            return mgr
   107Ôćĺ        except Exception as e:
   108Ôćĺ            logger.error(f"Failed to load checkpoint: {e}")
   109Ôćĺ            return None
   110Ôćĺ
   111Ôćĺ    @property
   112Ôćĺ    def params(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
   113Ôćĺ        return self._data.get("params", {})
   114Ôćĺ
   115Ôćĺ    @property
   116Ôćĺ    def progress(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
   117Ôćĺ        return self._data.get("progress", {})
   118Ôćĺ
   119Ôćĺ    @property
   120Ôćĺ    def completed_pages(self) -> int:
   121Ôćĺ        return self.progress.get("completed_pages", 0)
   122Ôćĺ
   123Ôćĺ    @property
   124Ôćĺ    def sent_ids(self) -> List[str]:
   125Ôćĺ        return list(self.progress.get("sent_ids", []))
   126Ôćĺ
   127Ôćĺ    @property
   128Ôćĺ    def seen_ids(self) -> Set[str]:
   129Ôćĺ        return set(self.progress.get("seen_ids", []))
   130Ôćĺ
   131Ôćĺ    @property
   132Ôćĺ    def total_results(self) -> Dict[str, int]:
   133Ôćĺ        return self.progress.get("total_results", {})
   134Ôćĺ
   135Ôćĺ    @property
   136Ôćĺ    def summary(self) -> str:
   137Ôćĺ        p = self.params
   138Ôćĺ        pr = self.progress
   139Ôćĺ        created = self._data.get("created_at", "unknown")
   140Ôćĺ        updated = self._data.get("updated_at", "unknown")
   141Ôćĺ        mode = p.get("mode", "recommend")
   142Ôćĺ        return (
   143Ôćĺ            f"Keywords: {p.get('keywords', [])}\n"
   144Ôćĺ            f"Template: {p.get('template', '')}\n"
   145Ôćĺ            f"Mode: {mode}\n"
   146Ôćĺ            f"Pages completed: {pr.get('completed_pages', 0)} / {p.get('max_pages', '?')}\n"
   147Ôćĺ            f"Candidates seen: {len(pr.get('seen_ids', []))}\n"
   148Ôćĺ            f"Messages sent: {len(pr.get('sent_ids', []))}\n"
   149Ôćĺ            f"Created: {created}\n"
   150Ôćĺ            f"Last updated: {updated}"
   151Ôćĺ        )
   152Ôćĺ
   153Ôćĺ    def delete(self) -> None:
   154Ôćĺ        try:
   155Ôćĺ            if self.checkpoint_path.exists():
   156Ôćĺ                self.checkpoint_path.unlink()
   157Ôćĺ                logger.debug(f"Checkpoint deleted: {self.checkpoint_path}")
   158Ôćĺ        except Exception as e:
   159Ôćĺ            logger.error(f"Failed to delete checkpoint: {e}")
   160Ôćĺ

1Ôćĺ"""CLI interface for Boss Assistant.
     2Ôćĺ
     3ÔćĺProvides Click-based commands for BossšŤ┤Ŕüś recruitment automation:
     4Ôćĺ- login: Verify BossšŤ┤Ŕüś login status
     5Ôćĺ- search: Search for candidates
     6Ôćĺ- profile: Extract candidate profile details
     7Ôćĺ- message: Send templated messages
     8Ôćĺ- pipeline: Full search Ôćĺ score Ôćĺ send pipeline
     9Ôćĺ- export: Export candidate data
    10Ôćĺ- templates: List message templates
    11Ôćĺ- status: View rate limit quota
    12Ôćĺ- logout: Clear session
    13Ôćĺ"""
    14Ôćĺ
    15Ôćĺimport sys
    16Ôćĺimport asyncio
    17Ôćĺimport click
    18Ôćĺfrom rich.console import Console
    19Ôćĺfrom rich.table import Table
    20Ôćĺ
    21Ôćĺconsole = Console()
    22Ôćĺ
    23Ôćĺ
    24Ôćĺdef run_async(coro):
    25Ôćĺ    """Run an async coroutine from synchronous Click context."""
    26Ôćĺ    loop = asyncio.new_event_loop()
    27Ôćĺ    try:
    28Ôćĺ        return loop.run_until_complete(coro)
    29Ôćĺ    finally:
    30Ôćĺ        loop.close()
    31Ôćĺ
    32Ôćĺ
    33Ôćĺ@click.group()
    34Ôćĺ@click.option('--cdp', default=None, help='CDP endpoint (default: http://127.0.0.1:9222)')
    35Ôćĺ@click.pass_context
    36Ôćĺdef cli(ctx, cdp):
    37Ôćĺ    """Boss Assistant - BossšŤ┤ŔüśňŹŐŔç¬ňŐĘŠőŤŔüśňŐęŠëő"""
    38Ôćĺ    ctx.ensure_object(dict)
    39Ôćĺ    ctx.obj['cdp'] = cdp
    40Ôćĺ
    41Ôćĺ
    42Ôćĺ@cli.command()
    43Ôćĺ@click.pass_context
    44Ôćĺdef login(ctx):
    45Ôćĺ    """Verify BossšŤ┤Ŕüś login status and wait for manual login if needed."""
    46Ôćĺ    from src.core.browser import get_browser_manager
    47Ôćĺ    from src.modules.auth import login as do_login
    48Ôćĺ
    49Ôćĺ    browser = get_browser_manager()
    50Ôćĺ    if ctx.obj.get('cdp'):
    51Ôćĺ        browser.set_cdp_endpoint(ctx.obj['cdp'])
    52Ôćĺ
    53Ôćĺ    try:
    54Ôćĺ        result = run_async(do_login(browser))
    55Ôćĺ        if not result:
    56Ôćĺ            sys.exit(1)
    57Ôćĺ    except Exception as e:
    58Ôćĺ        console.print(f"[red]Error: {e}[/red]")
    59Ôćĺ        sys.exit(1)
    60Ôćĺ    finally:
    61Ôćĺ        run_async(browser.close())
    62Ôćĺ
    63Ôćĺ
    64Ôćĺ@cli.command()
    65Ôćĺ@click.option('-k', '--keywords', required=True, multiple=True, help='Search keywords (can specify multiple)')
    66Ôćĺ@click.option('-l', '--location', default=None, help='Location filter (e.g., ňîŚń║Č)')
    67Ôćĺ@click.option('-p', '--pages', default=1, type=int, help='Scroll rounds to load more results (default: 1)')
    68Ôćĺ@click.option('--experience', default=None, help='Experience filter (e.g., 3-5ň╣┤)')
    69Ôćĺ@click.option('--education', default=None, help='Education filter (e.g., ŠťČšžĹ)')
    70Ôćĺ@click.option('--salary', default=None, help='Salary filter (e.g., 20-40K)')
    71Ôćĺ@click.option('-e', '--export-file', default=None, help='Export results to file')
    72Ôćĺ@click.pass_context
    73Ôćĺdef search(ctx, keywords, location, pages, experience, education, salary, export_file):
    74Ôćĺ    """Search for candidates on BossšŤ┤Ŕüś. Uses infinite scroll to load results."""
    75Ôćĺ    from src.core.browser import get_browser_manager
    76Ôćĺ    from src.modules.auth import ensure_logged_in
    77Ôćĺ    from src.modules.search import search_candidates
    78Ôćĺ
    79Ôćĺ    browser = get_browser_manager()
    80Ôćĺ    if ctx.obj.get('cdp'):
    81Ôćĺ        browser.set_cdp_endpoint(ctx.obj['cdp'])
    82Ôćĺ
    83Ôćĺ    try:
    84Ôćĺ        run_async(ensure_logged_in(browser))
    85Ôćĺ
    86Ôćĺ        candidates = run_async(search_candidates(
    87Ôćĺ            keywords=list(keywords),
    88Ôćĺ            location=location,
    89Ôćĺ            max_pages=pages,
    90Ôćĺ            experience=experience,
    91Ôćĺ            education=education,
    92Ôćĺ            salary=salary,
    93Ôćĺ            browser=browser,
    94Ôćĺ        ))
    95Ôćĺ
    96Ôćĺ        console.print(f"\n[bold]Total candidates found: {len(candidates)}[/bold]")
    97Ôćĺ
    98Ôćĺ        if export_file and candidates:
    99Ôćĺ            from src.modules.export import export_candidates
   100Ôćĺ            fmt = 'csv' if export_file.endswith('.csv') else 'excel'
   101Ôćĺ            export_candidates(output_format=fmt, output_path=export_file)
   102Ôćĺ            console.print(f"[green]Results exported to: {export_file}[/green]")
   103Ôćĺ
   104Ôćĺ    except Exception as e:
   105Ôćĺ        console.print(f"[red]Error: {e}[/red]")
   106Ôćĺ        sys.exit(1)
   107Ôćĺ    finally:
   108Ôćĺ        run_async(browser.close())
   109Ôćĺ
   110Ôćĺ
   111Ôćĺ@cli.command()
   112Ôćĺ@click.argument('boss_id')
   113Ôćĺ@click.pass_context
   114Ôćĺdef profile(ctx, boss_id):
   115Ôćĺ    """Extract detailed profile for a candidate."""
   116Ôćĺ    from src.core.browser import get_browser_manager
   117Ôćĺ    from src.modules.auth import ensure_logged_in
   118Ôćĺ    from src.modules.profile import extract_profile
   119Ôćĺ
   120Ôćĺ    browser = get_browser_manager()
   121Ôćĺ    if ctx.obj.get('cdp'):
   122Ôćĺ        browser.set_cdp_endpoint(ctx.obj['cdp'])
   123Ôćĺ
   124Ôćĺ    try:
   125Ôćĺ        run_async(ensure_logged_in(browser))
   126Ôćĺ        run_async(extract_profile(boss_id=boss_id, browser=browser))
   127Ôćĺ    except Exception as e:
   128Ôćĺ        console.print(f"[red]Error: {e}[/red]")
   129Ôćĺ        sys.exit(1)
   130Ôćĺ    finally:
   131Ôćĺ        run_async(browser.close())
   132Ôćĺ
   133Ôćĺ
   134Ôćĺ@cli.command()
   135Ôćĺ@click.argument('boss_id')
   136Ôćĺ@click.option('-t', '--template', required=True, help='Message template name')
   137Ôćĺ@click.option('-v', '--variable', multiple=True, help='Template variable (key=value)')
   138Ôćĺ@click.option('--preview', is_flag=True, help='Preview message without sending')
   139Ôćĺ@click.pass_context
   140Ôćĺdef message(ctx, boss_id, template, variable, preview):
   141Ôćĺ    """Send a message to a candidate."""
   142Ôćĺ    from src.core.browser import get_browser_manager
   143Ôćĺ    from src.modules.auth import ensure_logged_in
   144Ôćĺ    from src.modules.message import send_message
   145Ôćĺ
   146Ôćĺ    browser = get_browser_manager()
   147Ôćĺ    if ctx.obj.get('cdp'):
   148Ôćĺ        browser.set_cdp_endpoint(ctx.obj['cdp'])
   149Ôćĺ
   150Ôćĺ    # Parse variables
   151Ôćĺ    variables = {}
   152Ôćĺ    for v in variable:
   153Ôćĺ        if '=' in v:
   154Ôćĺ            key, value = v.split('=', 1)
   155Ôćĺ            variables[key.strip()] = value.strip()
   156Ôćĺ
   157Ôćĺ    try:
   158Ôćĺ        run_async(ensure_logged_in(browser))
   159Ôćĺ        run_async(send_message(
   160Ôćĺ            boss_id=boss_id,
   161Ôćĺ            template_name=template,
   162Ôćĺ            variables=variables,
   163Ôćĺ            preview_only=preview,
   164Ôćĺ            browser=browser,
   165Ôćĺ        ))
   166Ôćĺ    except Exception as e:
   167Ôćĺ        console.print(f"[red]Error: {e}[/red]")
   168Ôćĺ        sys.exit(1)
   169Ôćĺ    finally:
   170Ôćĺ        run_async(browser.close())
   171Ôćĺ
   172Ôćĺ
   173Ôćĺ@cli.command()
   174Ôćĺ@click.option('-k', '--keywords', required=True, multiple=True, help='Search keywords')
   175Ôćĺ@click.option('-t', '--template', required=True, help='Message template name')
   176Ôćĺ@click.option('-v', '--variable', multiple=True, help='Template variable (key=value)')
   177Ôćĺ@click.option('-l', '--location', default=None, help='Location filter')
   178Ôćĺ@click.option('-p', '--pages', default=3, type=int, help='Scroll rounds per keyword (default: 3)')
   179Ôćĺ@click.option('--batch-pages', default=0, type=int, help='Send after every N pages (0=all at end)')
   180Ôćĺ@click.option('--experience', default=None, help='Experience filter')
   181Ôćĺ@click.option('--education', default=None, help='Education filter')
   182Ôćĺ@click.option('--salary', default=None, help='Salary filter')
   183Ôćĺ@click.option('--interactive/--no-interactive', default=True, help='Confirm each message')
   184Ôćĺ@click.option('--skip-messaged/--no-skip-messaged', default=True, help='Skip already messaged')
   185Ôćĺ@click.option('--dry-run', is_flag=True, help='Simulate without sending')
   186Ôćĺ@click.option('--resume', is_flag=True, help='Resume from last checkpoint')
   187Ôćĺ@click.pass_context
   188Ôćĺdef pipeline(ctx, keywords, template, variable, location, pages, batch_pages,
   189Ôćĺ             experience, education, salary, interactive, skip_messaged, dry_run, resume):
   190Ôćĺ    """Run full pipeline: search Ôćĺ score Ôćĺ send messages."""
   191Ôćĺ    from src.core.browser import get_browser_manager
   192Ôćĺ    from src.modules.auth import ensure_logged_in
   193Ôćĺ    from src.services.pipeline import run_pipeline
   194Ôćĺ
   195Ôćĺ    browser = get_browser_manager()
   196Ôćĺ    if ctx.obj.get('cdp'):
   197Ôćĺ        browser.set_cdp_endpoint(ctx.obj['cdp'])
   198Ôćĺ
   199Ôćĺ    # Parse variables
   200Ôćĺ    variables = {}
   201Ôćĺ    for v in variable:
   202Ôćĺ        if '=' in v:
   203Ôćĺ            key, value = v.split('=', 1)
   204Ôćĺ            variables[key.strip()] = value.strip()
   205Ôćĺ
   206Ôćĺ    try:
   207Ôćĺ        run_async(ensure_logged_in(browser))
   208Ôćĺ        run_async(run_pipeline(
   209Ôćĺ            keywords=keywords,
   210Ôćĺ            template_name=template,
   211Ôćĺ            variables=variables,
   212Ôćĺ            location=location,
   213Ôćĺ            max_pages=pages,
   214Ôćĺ            batch_pages=batch_pages,
   215Ôćĺ            experience=experience,
   216Ôćĺ            education=education,
   217Ôćĺ            salary=salary,
   218Ôćĺ            interactive=interactive,
   219Ôćĺ            skip_messaged=skip_messaged,
   220Ôćĺ            dry_run=dry_run,
   221Ôćĺ            resume=resume,
   222Ôćĺ            browser=browser,
   223Ôćĺ        ))
   224Ôćĺ    except KeyboardInterrupt:
   225Ôćĺ        console.print("\n[yellow]Pipeline interrupted. Progress saved to checkpoint.[/yellow]")
   226Ôćĺ    except Exception as e:
   227Ôćĺ        console.print(f"[red]Error: {e}[/red]")
   228Ôćĺ        sys.exit(1)
   229Ôćĺ    finally:
   230Ôćĺ        run_async(browser.close())
   231Ôćĺ
   232Ôćĺ
   233Ôćĺ@cli.command()
   234Ôćĺ@click.option('-o', '--output', default=None, help='Output file path')
   235Ôćĺ@click.option('-f', '--format', 'fmt', type=click.Choice(['excel', 'csv']), default='excel', help='Export format')
   236Ôćĺ@click.option('--no-messages', is_flag=True, help='Exclude message history')
   237Ôćĺdef export(output, fmt, no_messages):
   238Ôćĺ    """Export candidate data to Excel or CSV."""
   239Ôćĺ    from src.modules.export import export_candidates

   243Ôćĺ            output_format=fmt,

1Ôćĺ"""Input validation utilities."""
     2Ôćĺ
     3Ôćĺimport re
     4Ôćĺfrom typing import Dict, Any
     5Ôćĺ
     6Ôćĺfrom src.exceptions.errors import ValidationError
     7Ôćĺ
     8Ôćĺ
     9Ôćĺdef validate_boss_id(boss_id: str) -> str:
    10Ôćĺ    """Validate BossšŤ┤Ŕüś candidate ID format.
    11Ôćĺ
    12Ôćĺ    BossšŤ┤Ŕüś uses encrypted IDs (encryptGeekId), stored as zp_{id}.
    13Ôćĺ
    14Ôćĺ    Args:
    15Ôćĺ        boss_id: BossšŤ┤Ŕüś candidate ID to validate
    16Ôćĺ
    17Ôćĺ    Returns:
    18Ôćĺ        Validated and cleaned ID
    19Ôćĺ
    20Ôćĺ    Raises:
    21Ôćĺ        ValidationError: If ID format is invalid
    22Ôćĺ    """
    23Ôćĺ    if not boss_id:
    24Ôćĺ        raise ValidationError("Boss ID cannot be empty")
    25Ôćĺ
    26Ôćĺ    boss_id = str(boss_id).strip()
    27Ôćĺ
    28Ôćĺ    if not re.match(r'^[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+$', boss_id):
    29Ôćĺ        raise ValidationError(f"Invalid Boss ID format: {boss_id}")
    30Ôćĺ
    31Ôćĺ    return boss_id
    32Ôćĺ
    33Ôćĺ
    34Ôćĺdef validate_keywords(keywords: str) -> str:
    35Ôćĺ    """Validate search keywords."""
    36Ôćĺ    if not keywords or not keywords.strip():
    37Ôćĺ        raise ValidationError("Search keywords cannot be empty")
    38Ôćĺ
    39Ôćĺ    keywords = keywords.strip()
    40Ôćĺ
    41Ôćĺ    if len(keywords) < 2:
    42Ôćĺ        raise ValidationError("Search keywords must be at least 2 characters")
    43Ôćĺ
    44Ôćĺ    if len(keywords) > 200:
    45Ôćĺ        raise ValidationError("Search keywords cannot exceed 200 characters")
    46Ôćĺ
    47Ôćĺ    return keywords
    48Ôćĺ
    49Ôćĺ
    50Ôćĺdef validate_template_variables(template: Dict[str, Any], variables: Dict[str, str]) -> None:
    51Ôćĺ    """Validate that all required template variables are provided."""
    52Ôćĺ    required_vars = template.get('variables', [])
    53Ôćĺ    provided_vars = set(variables.keys())
    54Ôćĺ    required_set = set(required_vars)
    55Ôćĺ
    56Ôćĺ    missing_vars = required_set - provided_vars
    57Ôćĺ
    58Ôćĺ    if missing_vars:
    59Ôćĺ        raise ValidationError(
    60Ôćĺ            f"Missing required template variables: {', '.join(missing_vars)}"
    61Ôćĺ        )
    62Ôćĺ

1Ôćĺ"""Shared captcha detection utility.
     2Ôćĺ
     3ÔćĺDetects captcha elements on page and pauses for manual resolution.
     4ÔćĺBossšŤ┤Ŕüś may use Geetest slider captcha or similar mechanisms.
     5Ôćĺ
     6ÔćĺIn Web mode, emits an SSE notification via emit_progress and polls
     7Ôćĺuntil the captcha element disappears (user solves it in Chrome).
     8Ôćĺ"""
     9Ôćĺ
    10Ôćĺimport asyncio
    11Ôćĺ
    12Ôćĺfrom patchright.async_api import Page
    13Ôćĺfrom loguru import logger
    14Ôćĺ
    15Ôćĺfrom src.utils.progress import emit_progress
    16Ôćĺ
    17Ôćĺ
    18ÔćĺCAPTCHA_SELECTORS = [
    19Ôćĺ    '[class*="captcha"]',
    20Ôćĺ    '[class*="verify"]',
    21Ôćĺ    '[id*="captcha"]',
    22Ôćĺ    '[class*="slider"]',
    23Ôćĺ    '[class*="geetest"]',
    24Ôćĺ    'iframe[src*="captcha"]',
    25Ôćĺ    '[class*="verify-wrap"]',
    26Ôćĺ    '[class*="slide-verify"]',
    27Ôćĺ]
    28Ôćĺ
    29Ôćĺ
    30Ôćĺasync def _captcha_still_visible(page: Page) -> bool:
    31Ôćĺ    """Check if any captcha selector is still visible on the page."""
    32Ôćĺ    for selector in CAPTCHA_SELECTORS:
    33Ôćĺ        try:
    34Ôćĺ            elem = await page.query_selector(selector)
    35Ôćĺ            if elem and await elem.is_visible():
    36Ôćĺ                return True
    37Ôćĺ        except Exception as e:
    38Ôćĺ            logger.debug(f"Captcha selector check failed for '{selector}': {e}")
    39Ôćĺ            continue
    40Ôćĺ    return False
    41Ôćĺ
    42Ôćĺ
    43Ôćĺasync def check_captcha(
    44Ôćĺ    page: Page,
    45Ôćĺ    report_to_rate_limiter: bool = False,
    46Ôćĺ) -> None:
    47Ôćĺ    """Detect captcha elements on page and pause for manual resolution.
    48Ôćĺ
    49Ôćĺ    In Web mode (emit_progress callback set), polls until captcha disappears.
    50Ôćĺ    In CLI mode, blocks on stdin for user to solve manually.
    51Ôćĺ    """
    52Ôćĺ    for selector in CAPTCHA_SELECTORS:
    53Ôćĺ        try:
    54Ôćĺ            elem = await page.query_selector(selector)
    55Ôćĺ            if elem and await elem.is_visible():
    56Ôćĺ                if report_to_rate_limiter:
    57Ôćĺ                    from src.utils.rate_limiter import get_rate_limiter
    58Ôćĺ                    rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()
    59Ôćĺ                    rate_limiter.report_captcha()
    60Ôćĺ
    61Ôćĺ                emit_progress("captcha_detected")
    62Ôćĺ                logger.warning("Captcha detected ÔÇö waiting for user to solve in Chrome")
    63Ôćĺ
    64Ôćĺ                # Poll until captcha disappears (works for both Web and CLI)
    65Ôćĺ                max_wait = 300  # 5 minutes
    66Ôćĺ                elapsed = 0
    67Ôćĺ                while elapsed < max_wait:
    68Ôćĺ                    await asyncio.sleep(3)
    69Ôćĺ                    elapsed += 3
    70Ôćĺ                    if not await _captcha_still_visible(page):
    71Ôćĺ                        logger.info("Captcha resolved")
    72Ôćĺ                        await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
    73Ôćĺ                        return
    74Ôćĺ                logger.error("Captcha timeout after 5 minutes")
    75Ôćĺ                return
    76Ôćĺ        except Exception as e:
    77Ôćĺ            logger.debug(f"Captcha detection failed for '{selector}': {e}")
    78Ôćĺ            continue
    79Ôćĺ

1Ôćĺ"""Logging configuration using Loguru."""
     2Ôćĺ
     3Ôćĺimport sys
     4Ôćĺfrom pathlib import Path
     5Ôćĺ
     6Ôćĺfrom loguru import logger
     7Ôćĺ
     8Ôćĺfrom src.utils.config import get_config
     9Ôćĺ
    10Ôćĺ
    11Ôćĺdef setup_logger():
    12Ôćĺ    """Configure Loguru logger with settings from config."""
    13Ôćĺ    config = get_config()
    14Ôćĺ
    15Ôćĺ    logger.remove()
    16Ôćĺ
    17Ôćĺ    log_level = config.get('logging.level', 'INFO')
    18Ôćĺ    log_format = config.get('logging.format')
    19Ôćĺ    rotation = config.get('logging.rotation', '10 MB')
    20Ôćĺ    retention = config.get('logging.retention', '30 days')
    21Ôćĺ    log_dir = Path(config.get('data.log_dir', 'data/logs'))
    22Ôćĺ
    23Ôćĺ    log_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    24Ôćĺ
    25Ôćĺ    logger.add(
    26Ôćĺ        sys.stdout,
    27Ôćĺ        format=log_format,
    28Ôćĺ        level=log_level,
    29Ôćĺ        colorize=True,
    30Ôćĺ    )
    31Ôćĺ
    32Ôćĺ    logger.add(
    33Ôćĺ        log_dir / "boss_assistant_{time:YYYY-MM-DD}.log",
    34Ôćĺ        format=log_format,
    35Ôćĺ        level=log_level,
    36Ôćĺ        rotation=rotation,
    37Ôćĺ        retention=retention,
    38Ôćĺ        encoding='utf-8',
    39Ôćĺ    )
    40Ôćĺ
    41Ôćĺ    logger.info(f"Logger initialized with level: {log_level}")
    42Ôćĺ

1Ôćĺ"""Database models and setup using SQLAlchemy."""
     2Ôćĺ
     3Ôćĺfrom contextlib import contextmanager

     5Ôćĺfrom pathlib import Path
     6Ôćĺfrom typing import Optional
     7Ôćĺ
     8Ôćĺfrom sqlalchemy import (
     9Ôćĺ    Column, Integer, String, Text, DateTime, JSON,
    10Ôćĺ    ForeignKey, create_engine, Index, CheckConstraint
    11Ôćĺ)
    12Ôćĺfrom sqlalchemy.orm import declarative_base, sessionmaker, relationship
    13Ôćĺfrom sqlalchemy.pool import NullPool
    14Ôćĺfrom loguru import logger
    15Ôćĺ
    16Ôćĺfrom src.utils.config import get_config
    17Ôćĺ
    18ÔćĺBase = declarative_base()
    19Ôćĺ
    20Ôćĺ
    21Ôćĺdef _utcnow():
    22Ôćĺ    """Return timezone-aware UTC now."""
    23Ôćĺ    return datetime.now(timezone.utc)
    24Ôćĺ
    25Ôćĺ
    26Ôćĺclass Candidate(Base):
    27Ôćĺ    """Candidate model - stores candidate profile information."""
    28Ôćĺ
    29Ôćĺ    __tablename__ = 'candidates'
    30Ôćĺ
    31Ôćĺ    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)
    32Ôćĺ    boss_id = Column(String(50), unique=True, nullable=False, index=True)
    33Ôćĺ    name = Column(String(100))
    34Ôćĺ    title = Column(String(200))
    35Ôćĺ    company = Column(String(200))
    36Ôćĺ    location = Column(String(100))
    37Ôćĺ    salary_expect = Column(String(100))      # BossšŤ┤Ŕüś: expected salary
    38Ôćĺ    work_years = Column(String(50))           # BossšŤ┤Ŕüś: work years
    39Ôćĺ    education_level = Column(String(50))      # BossšŤ┤Ŕüś: education level
    40Ôćĺ    profile_url = Column(Text)
    41Ôćĺ
    42Ôćĺ    # JSON fields for structured data
    43Ôćĺ    basic_info = Column(JSON)
    44Ôćĺ    education = Column(JSON)
    45Ôćĺ    work_experience = Column(JSON)
    46Ôćĺ    skills = Column(JSON)
    47Ôćĺ
    48Ôćĺ    # Metadata
    49Ôćĺ    first_seen = Column(DateTime, default=_utcnow)
    50Ôćĺ    last_updated = Column(DateTime, default=_utcnow, onupdate=_utcnow)
    51Ôćĺ    source_search = Column(Text)
    52Ôćĺ
    53Ôćĺ    # Relationships
    54Ôćĺ    messages = relationship("Message", back_populates="candidate")
    55Ôćĺ
    56Ôćĺ    def __repr__(self):
    57Ôćĺ        return f"<Candidate(boss_id='{self.boss_id}', name='{self.name}', company='{self.company}')>"
    58Ôćĺ
    59Ôćĺ
    60Ôćĺclass Message(Base):
    61Ôćĺ    """Message model - stores sent messages to candidates."""
    62Ôćĺ
    63Ôćĺ    __tablename__ = 'messages'
    64Ôćĺ
    65Ôćĺ    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)
    66Ôćĺ    candidate_boss_id = Column(String(50), ForeignKey('candidates.boss_id'), index=True)
    67Ôćĺ    template_name = Column(String(100))
    68Ôćĺ    content = Column(Text, nullable=False)
    69Ôćĺ    status = Column(String(20), CheckConstraint("status IN ('sent', 'failed', 'cancelled')"))
    70Ôćĺ    sent_at = Column(DateTime)

    72Ôćĺ
    73Ôćĺ    # Relationships
    74Ôćĺ    candidate = relationship("Candidate", back_populates="messages")
    75Ôćĺ
    76Ôćĺ    def __repr__(self):
    77Ôćĺ        return f"<Message(id={self.id}, candidate_id='{self.candidate_boss_id}', status='{self.status}')>"
    78Ôćĺ
    79Ôćĺ
    80Ôćĺclass SearchHistory(Base):
    81Ôćĺ    """Search history model - tracks all searches performed."""
    82Ôćĺ
    83Ôćĺ    __tablename__ = 'search_history'
    84Ôćĺ

    89Ôćĺ
    90Ôćĺ    def __repr__(self):
    91Ôćĺ        return f"<SearchHistory(id={self.id}, results={self.results_count}, date='{self.executed_at}')>"
    92Ôćĺ
    93Ôćĺ
    94Ôćĺclass ActionLog(Base):
    95Ôćĺ    """Action log model - tracks all actions for rate limiting."""
    96Ôćĺ
    97Ôćĺ    __tablename__ = 'action_logs'
    98Ôćĺ
    99Ôćĺ    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)
   100Ôćĺ    action_type = Column(String(50), nullable=False)
   101Ôćĺ    timestamp = Column(DateTime, default=_utcnow, nullable=False)
   102Ôćĺ    details = Column(JSON)
   103Ôćĺ
   104Ôćĺ    __table_args__ = (
   105Ôćĺ        Index('idx_action_logs_type_time', 'action_type', 'timestamp'),
   106Ôćĺ    )
   107Ôćĺ
   108Ôćĺ    def __repr__(self):
   109Ôćĺ        return f"<ActionLog(id={self.id}, type='{self.action_type}', time='{self.timestamp}')>"
   110Ôćĺ
   111Ôćĺ
   112Ôćĺclass PipelineRun(Base):
   113Ôćĺ    """Pipeline run history ÔÇö tracks each pipeline execution."""
   114Ôćĺ
   115Ôćĺ    __tablename__ = 'pipeline_runs'
   116Ôćĺ
   117Ôćĺ    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)
   118Ôćĺ    task_id = Column(String(50), unique=True, nullable=False, index=True)
   119Ôćĺ    status = Column(
   120Ôćĺ        String(20),
   121Ôćĺ        CheckConstraint("status IN ('running', 'completed', 'cancelled', 'failed')"),
   122Ôćĺ        default='running',
   123Ôćĺ    )
   124Ôćĺ    keywords = Column(JSON)
   125Ôćĺ    template_name = Column(String(100))
   126Ôćĺ    params = Column(JSON)
   127Ôćĺ    result = Column(JSON)
   128Ôćĺ    started_at = Column(DateTime, default=_utcnow)
   129Ôćĺ    finished_at = Column(DateTime, nullable=True)
   130Ôćĺ
   131Ôćĺ    def __repr__(self):
   132Ôćĺ        return f"<PipelineRun(task_id='{self.task_id}', status='{self.status}')>"
   133Ôćĺ
   134Ôćĺ
   135Ôćĺclass DatabaseManager:
   136Ôćĺ    """Database manager for initialization and session management."""
   137Ôćĺ
   138Ôćĺ    def __init__(self, db_path: Optional[str] = None):
   139Ôćĺ        if db_path is None:
   140Ôćĺ            config = get_config()
   141Ôćĺ            db_path = config.get('data.database_path', 'data/boss.db')
   142Ôćĺ
   143Ôćĺ        db_file = Path(db_path)
   144Ôćĺ        db_file.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
   145Ôćĺ
   146Ôćĺ        self.db_path = db_path
   147Ôćĺ        # NullPool: each session gets a fresh connection, safe for
   148Ôćĺ        # concurrent Web + background task access to SQLite.
   149Ôćĺ        self.engine = create_engine(
   150Ôćĺ            f'sqlite:///{db_path}',
   151Ôćĺ            echo=False,
   152Ôćĺ            poolclass=NullPool,
   153Ôćĺ            connect_args={"check_same_thread": False},
   154Ôćĺ        )
   155Ôćĺ        self.Session = sessionmaker(bind=self.engine)
   156Ôćĺ
   157Ôćĺ        self.init_db()
   158Ôćĺ        logger.info(f"Database initialized at: {db_path}")
   159Ôćĺ
   160Ôćĺ    def init_db(self):
   161Ôćĺ        """Create all tables and run pending migrations."""
   162Ôćĺ        Base.metadata.create_all(self.engine)
   163Ôćĺ        logger.info("Database tables created successfully")
   164Ôćĺ
   165Ôćĺ        from src.models.migrations import run_migrations
   166Ôćĺ        run_migrations(self.engine)
   167Ôćĺ
   168Ôćĺ    @contextmanager
   169Ôćĺ    def session_scope(self):
   170Ôćĺ        """Provide a transactional scope with auto commit/rollback/close."""
   171Ôćĺ        session = self.Session()
   172Ôćĺ        try:
   173Ôćĺ            yield session
   174Ôćĺ            session.commit()
   175Ôćĺ        except Exception:
   176Ôćĺ            session.rollback()
   177Ôćĺ            raise
   178Ôćĺ        finally:
   179Ôćĺ            session.close()
   180Ôćĺ
   181Ôćĺ    def drop_all(self):
   182Ôćĺ        """Drop all tables (use with caution!)."""
   183Ôćĺ        Base.metadata.drop_all(self.engine)
   184Ôćĺ        logger.warning("All database tables dropped")
   185Ôćĺ
   186Ôćĺ
   187Ôćĺ# Global database manager instance
   188Ôćĺ_db_manager = None
   189Ôćĺ
   190Ôćĺ
   191Ôćĺdef get_db_manager() -> DatabaseManager:
   192Ôćĺ    """Get global database manager instance."""
   193Ôćĺ    global _db_manager
   194Ôćĺ    if _db_manager is None:
   195Ôćĺ        _db_manager = DatabaseManager()
   196Ôćĺ    return _db_manager
   197Ôćĺ
   198Ôćĺ
   199Ôćĺdef reset_db_manager() -> None:
   200Ôćĺ    """Reset global database manager (for testing)."""
   201Ôćĺ    global _db_manager
   202Ôćĺ    _db_manager = None
   203Ôćĺ

1Ôćĺ"""Pydantic schemas for Web request validation."""
     2Ôćĺ
     3Ôćĺfrom typing import List, Optional
     4Ôćĺ
     5Ôćĺfrom pydantic import BaseModel, field_validator
     6Ôćĺ
     7Ôćĺ
     8Ôćĺclass PipelineParams(BaseModel):
     9Ôćĺ    """Validated pipeline start parameters."""
    10Ôćĺ    keywords: List[str]
    11Ôćĺ    template_name: str
    12Ôćĺ    location: Optional[str] = None
    13Ôćĺ    pages: int = 3
    14Ôćĺ    batch_pages: int = 0
    15Ôćĺ    experience: Optional[str] = None
    16Ôćĺ    education: Optional[str] = None
    17Ôćĺ    salary: Optional[str] = None
    18Ôćĺ    skip_messaged: bool = True
    19Ôćĺ    dry_run: bool = False
    20Ôćĺ
    21Ôćĺ    @field_validator('keywords', mode='before')
    22Ôćĺ    @classmethod
    23Ôćĺ    def parse_keywords(cls, v):
    24Ôćĺ        if isinstance(v, str):
    25Ôćĺ            return [k.strip() for k in v.split(",") if k.strip()]
    26Ôćĺ        return v
    27Ôćĺ
    28Ôćĺ    @field_validator('keywords')
    29Ôćĺ    @classmethod
    30Ôćĺ    def keywords_not_empty(cls, v):
    31Ôćĺ        if not v:
    32Ôćĺ            raise ValueError("Ŕ»ĚŔżôňůąňů│Úö«Ŕ»Ź")
    33Ôćĺ        return v
    34Ôćĺ
    35Ôćĺ    @field_validator('template_name')
    36Ôćĺ    @classmethod
    37Ôćĺ    def template_not_empty(cls, v):
    38Ôćĺ        if not v or not v.strip():
    39Ôćĺ            raise ValueError("Ŕ»ĚÚÇëŠőęŠÂłŠü»ŠĘíŠŁ┐")
    40Ôćĺ        return v.strip()
    41Ôćĺ
    42Ôćĺ    @field_validator('pages')
    43Ôćĺ    @classmethod
    44Ôćĺ    def pages_range(cls, v):
    45Ôćĺ        return max(1, min(v, 20))
    46Ôćĺ
    47Ôćĺ    @field_validator('batch_pages')
    48Ôćĺ    @classmethod
    49Ôćĺ    def batch_pages_range(cls, v):
    50Ôćĺ        return max(0, min(v, 20))
    51Ôćĺ
    52Ôćĺ    @field_validator('location', 'experience', 'education', 'salary', mode='before')
    53Ôćĺ    @classmethod
    54Ôćĺ    def empty_str_to_none(cls, v):
    55Ôćĺ        if isinstance(v, str) and not v.strip():
    56Ôćĺ            return None
    57Ôćĺ        return v
    58Ôćĺ
    59Ôćĺ
    60Ôćĺclass SearchParams(BaseModel):
    61Ôćĺ    """Validated search parameters."""
    62Ôćĺ    keywords: List[str]

    64Ôćĺ    pages: int = 1

    72Ôćĺ        if isinstance(v, str):

    83Ôćĺ    @field_validator('pages')

1Ôćĺ"""Status route ÔÇö GET /status (rate limit dashboard)."""
     2Ôćĺ

     5Ôćĺfrom src.web.app import templates
     6Ôćĺfrom src.utils.rate_limiter import get_rate_limiter

    11Ôćĺ@router.get("/")
    12Ôćĺasync def status_page(request: Request):
    13Ôćĺ    """Display rate limit quota status."""
    14Ôćĺ    rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()
    15Ôćĺ
    16Ôćĺ    actions = []

    21Ôćĺ    throttle = rate_limiter.throttle_factor

    23Ôćĺ    return templates.TemplateResponse("status.html", {

    25Ôćĺ        "actions": actions,
    26Ôćĺ        "throttle_factor": throttle,
    27Ôćĺ    })
